description:
I’m looking for an experienced and detail-oriented Medical Billing Specialist to take ownership of our claims, collections, and billing workflow.



I need someone who understands the nuances of insurance funding and can ensure our financial operations run smoothly and accurately. You’ll be a key part of our team, helping us maintain a healthy revenue cycle while providing clear, professional support to our patients regarding their accounts.



Primary Responsibilities



- Billing & Claims Management: You will verify insurance coverage, benefits, and deductibles while obtaining necessary authorizations for our services. You'll prepare and submit billing across various cycles (daily to monthly) to funding sources, including clearinghouses and regional center e-billing systems.



- Accuracy & Submission: I need you to review all claims and invoices for completeness before submission to ensure we avoid unnecessary delays. This includes managing school funding invoices when applicable.



- Collections & Follow-ups: You’ll review EOBs for accuracy, identify discrepancies, and proactively research issues like underpayments or denials. I’ll count on you to hop on the phone with insurance companies or use payer portals to resolve unpaid claims and track appeals.



- Account Maintenance: You will post charges, process payments, and perform regular account reconciliations. You’ll also monitor patient balances, send out statements, and manage the collections process for any outstanding accounts.



- Communication & Documentation: You’ll handle billing inquiries from patients via phone and
 and keep our internal staff updated on outstanding balances. It’s vital that you document every follow-up and communication clearly.



- Process & System Support: I’m looking for someone who can help us improve our workflows and drive efficiency. We are also migrating to a new EHR/scheduling platform, and I’ll need your help with data migration and validation during that transition.



 

Qualifications



- Proven experience in medical billing, specifically with claims submission, denials, and follow-ups.

- A strong grasp of insurance processes, EOBs, and payer requirements.

- Proficiency with EMR/EHR systems, clearinghouses, and various payer portals.

- The ability to analyze AR reports and move beyond standard aging timelines to resolve issues.

- Excellent communication skills, with a professional touch when speaking to both insurance reps and patients.

- High organizational skills and the ability to hit deadlines in a fast-paced environment.

- A proactive, responsive approach to
s and task management.

 

Work Schedule



- This is a full-time role (40 hours per week).

- You must be available to work during US Pacific business hours.

- You will report progress and updates directly to our Patient Accounts Manager.



Apply here:

title: Outreach & Messaging VA for Instagram Coach
description:
Instagram Outreach & Nurture VA for Coaching Agency



About Us

We are a consulting agency that helps fitness coaches and creators scale using AI powered sales systems. We handle the tech, the sales team, and the strategy. Our VAs are the first human touch in a system that books calls and closes deals. You will be working directly with our operations team and assigned to specific client accounts.



Compensation

$200/month base

Performance bonuses on a case by case basis

Long term role with growth path for top performers



Schedule and Availability

6 days per week (Monday to Saturday)

Sunday calls still need confirmation messages scheduled

Standard PH hours work well as they overlap with US morning and evening windows

Midday PH is less ideal but still workable

You must be available to spread your shifts across the day (5 shifts, spaced 45 to 60 minutes apart)



What You Will Own



Outreach and Lead Generation

Send 15 to 20 personalized Instagram DM openers per shift across 5 daily shifts. Qualify leads from story engagement, new followers, and post interactions using our priority system.



Call Nurture and Show Rate

Schedule confirmation messages every morning for all booked calls that day using Instagram's scheduled message feature. Like and comment on profiles of prospects with upcoming calls.



Follow Up and Thread Revival

Reopen cold DM threads after 24 hours with light touch messages so our AI setter can re-engage. Keep conversations alive without being pushy.



Reporting and Accountability

Log all messages sent in your daily EOD form. Confirm scheduled messages in 
 with names and times. Flag any issues immediately.



You Are a Fit If



You have experience sending DMs and working inside Instagram daily

You can write naturally in English and personalize messages (no copy paste)

You are organized enough to manage multiple client accounts and shift schedules

You follow SOPs precisely without cutting

corners

You are proactive and flag problems before they become issues

You understand that exceeding message limits can shut down an account and you treat that seriously



To Apply



Go to this link and read the full training document carefully:





At the bottom of the training, click "Apply for This Role" and complete the 10 question quiz plus your contact details. You may also include an optional Loom or welcome video introducing yourself.



Once you have submitted your application on the training site, come back here to OnlineJobs and reply confirming you have applied.



Applications without a completed quiz will not be reviewed. If you skip the training and guess the answers, it will be obvious. Read everything first.

title: French Tutor
description:
Online French Tutor for 9-Year-Old (Long-Term Role)



Position: Part-Time Online French Tutor (Grade 4/5 Level)

Location: Toronto Canada

Hours: 1–2 hours/day, Monday to Friday

Schedule: Flexible (typically between 5:00–7:00 PM Toronto time; occasional weekend option)



About the Role



We are looking for a dedicated and patient French tutor to support a 9-year-old student with his daily French learning. This is a long-term, stable position with the goal of continuing for several years.



???? Responsibilities

Review and assist with daily French homework from an online classroom

Support reading, writing, and comprehension at a Grade 4–5 level

Reinforce grammar, vocabulary, and pronunciation

Provide additional exercises and practice when needed

Encourage confidence and make learning engaging and positive

? Requirements

Fluent in French and English (spoken and written)

Experience teaching or tutoring children (preferred)

Patient, reliable, and engaging personality

Strong communication skills

Ability to commit long-term

???? Schedule Details

Weekdays: 1–2 hours between 5:00–7:00 PM (Toronto, Canada time)

Some flexibility required (schedule may vary slightly)

Optional weekend sessions if mutually agreed

???? Position Type

Part-time

Long-term / ongoing role

???? How to Apply



Please include:



A short introduction about yourself

Your experience teaching or working with children

Your level of French proficiency

Your availability (including weekends if applicable)



Starting at $10–$12 CAD/hour, with increases based on performance and long-term commitment.”

title: Amazon Online Arbitrage Virtual Assistant (Long-Term Opportunity)
description:
Amazon Online Arbitrage Virtual Assistant (Long-Term Opportunity)



We are looking for a reliable, detail-oriented Virtual Assistant to join our growing Amazon business team.



This is a long-term opportunity for someone who is hardworking, coachable, and eager to learn. Experience with Amazon tools is a plus, but not required—we will provide training for the right person.



Main Responsibilities



Product Sourcing / Research

- Search online retail stores to find profitable products to sell on Amazon

- Compare store prices with Amazon selling prices

- Analyze product data using tools such as Keepa and SellerAmp

- Track profitable leads in Google Sheets



What We’re Looking For



Required:

- Strong attention to detail

- Good problem-solving skills

- Fast learner / coachable mindset

- Reliable internet connection

- Fluent English (written and spoken)

- Comfortable using Google Sheets



Preferred (Not Required): 

Experience with:

- Keepa

- SellerAmp

- Amazon Seller Central



Compensation & Benefits

- Flexible work schedule

- Fixed training schedule for first 4–6 weeks (mutually agreed)

- Biweekly pay

- Flexible time off with notice

- Performance bonuses

- Holiday pay

-13th month pay (for long-term tea
mbers)*



To Apply:

Please answer the following in your application:



1. Tell me a little about yourself.

2. What experience do you have working with US-based employers?

3. Have you worked for an Amazon business before? If yes, what were your responsibilities?

4. Have you used Keepa, SellerAmp, or Amazon Seller Central before?

5. On a scale of 1–10, how confident are you in learning new skills if properly trained?

6. Start your subject line with: Purple Bear

7. Include anything else that would strengthen your application.



Important

After applying, selected candidates will have a short chat interview via messages. A small number will move on to the next stage.



Thank you for your time—we look forward to hearing from you.

title: Creative Brand & Digital Marketing Specialist
description:
We are an Australian company on a strong growth trajectory, building out our offshore marketing capability. We are ideally seeking two specialists — a Creative Brand Designer and a Digital Marketing & Website Specialist — but we know that occasionally the right person brings genuine mastery in both disciplines.



This combined role is for that person. You will be a trusted, senior member of our offshore marketing team, working directly with our Australian marketing lead to deliver across brand, creative, digital, and social. You'll be given real ownership, real variety, and real opportunity to grow with the business.



We are an open, collaborative team. We value people who ask smart questions, challenge thinking respectfully, understand confidentiality, and bring their best work every day regardless of what the brief says.



CORE CAPABILITIES



BRAND & CREATIVE

• Brand creation | building identity, visual language, and tone from brief to launch

• Developing complete brand asset suites | logos, colour systems, typography, templates

• Translating campaign briefs into compelling, on-brand creative executions

• Designing across formats | digital, print, presentations, events, video, social



DIGITAL & WEBSITE

• Website ownership | maintenance, development, and performance optimisation via Webflow

• SEO strategy and execution | organic growth, keyword development, technical SEO

• SEM campaign management | Google Ads and paid search

• Digital campaign delivery across channels with clear performance reporting

• Social Media | posting across channels with relevant content to support key marketing outcomes



WHAT YOU'LL BE PRODUCING

Brand identities & asset libraries   ·   Marketing campaigns   ·   Research papers   ·   Pitch documents   ·   Event collateral   ·   Digital campaigns   ·   Video content   ·   Social media campaigns   ·   SEO content   ·   Performance reports



REQUIRED SKILLS & TOOLS



Creative & Brand

Adobe Photoshop   ·   Adobe Illustrator   ·   Adobe InDesign   ·   Canva (advanced)   ·   Brand identity development   ·   Asset library management



Digital & Website

Webflow   ·   HTML / CSS   ·   SEO strategy   ·   SEM / Google Ads   ·   Google Analytics   ·   Search Console   ·   Typeflow

Bonus skills

Video editing   ·   Social media management   ·   Content strategy   ·  
 marketing



WHAT WE'RE LOOKING FOR

• Minimum 4–6 years across both brand design and digital marketing, in genuine specialist roles, not hybrid admin positions

• A portfolio demonstrating brand creation work AND measurable digital results

• Experience working with international or Australian organisations

• Excellent written and spoken English, you will be communicating daily with senior Australian stakeholders

• A strategic mindset - you understand the commercial reason behind every brief 

• High personal standards around confidentiality, data security, and commercial sensitivity

• Ability to manage a broad, fast-moving workload without losing quality

• Proactive and solutions-oriented you raise issues early and bring options with them

• Culturally adaptable, comfortable working across different styles, time zones, and expectations

• Not afraid to push back, ask questions, or suggest a better way



This is a rare brief and we know it. We are not looking for someone who is "pretty good" at both — we need someone with genuine depth in both disciplines, evidenced by their portfolio and their results. Please include a portfolio link or PDF showing brand creation work, AND measurable digital marketing outcomes (traffic growth, ranking improvements, campaign performance). Applications without both will not be considered.

I'm not looking to just fill a role. I'm looking for someone to build 

with long-term. If that's you, send me your work.

title: Senior PHP Engineer
description:
We’re looking for a Senior Backend PHP Engineer to help design and build the scalable backbone of HelloPrint’s ecommerce platforms. You’ll work on microservices, APIs, and integrations, while mentoring others and driving technical excellence.



You’ll take a leading role in shaping the architecture of our ecommerce infrastructure. You’ll build reliable APIs, optimize performance, and ensure our systems scale as we expand globally. Beyond coding, you’ll mentor teammates, influence technical direction, and contribute to a high-performance engineering culture.





What You’ll Do:



Architect Our API-First Future: Design, develop, and maintain a robust and high-performance API layer that will serve as the core of our headless platform.



Own the Backend: Take full ownership of key backend services, from design to deployment, ensuring they align with our API-first strategy.



Drive Modernization: Lead the modernization of our existing system, with a clear focus on decoupling the frontend from the backend and creating a clean, API-first architecture. We prefer a pragmatic approach over the complexity and overhead of microservices.



Mentor and Lead: Guide and mentor other backend developers, sharing your expertise in API design, performance, and best practices.



Collaborate and Innovate: Work closely with frontend engineers, product managers, and business stakeholders to translate ambitious goals into practical, well-engineered API specifications and solutions.



Champion Best Practices: Introduce and advocate for modern API development tools, standards, and methodologies (e.g., OpenAPI, CI/CD, comprehensive testing).













Requirements

What We’re Looking For:



Proven Seniority: At least 5+ years of professional experience in backend development, with a strong focus on PHP.



API-First Mindset: Demonstrated experience designing and building scalable, RESTful or GraphQL APIs. You have a deep understanding of what it means to build a headless system.



PHP8 Expertise: Deep, hands-on experience with modern PHP, including PHP8 and modern design patterns like TDD. You are comfortable with frameworks like Symfony and understand the nuances of the PHP ecosystem.



Strategic & Pragmatic: You are a problem-solver who prioritizes impact and understands the challenges of a large-scale modernization project. You know when to refactor and when to build new, all while avoiding unnecessary complexity.



Ownership Mentality: You are proactive about identifying and fixing issues and feel a strong sense of responsibility for the performance and health of the codebase.



Data Savvy: Strong experience with relational databases (MySQL/MariaDB) and a solid understanding of database design, optimization, and query performance in an API context.



Experience with Git and agile methodologies (Scrum, Kanban).



AI-Accelerated Development: You are knowledgeable about and in favor of using AI to accelerate the software development lifecycle. You're keen on exploring how AI can be leveraged to generate code, improve quality, and maximize output.





Nice to Have:



Experience with e-commerce or high-traffic consumer environments.



Familiarity with cloud platforms (AWS, GCP) and containerization (Docker, Kubernetes).



Experience with message queues (e.g., GCP PubSub) or other asynchronous processing technologies.







What We Offer:





- Growth & Ownership: A performance culture where you grow fast, take ownership early, and design your own path: with access to AI learning and real responsibility.



- International Experience: Join a diverse team of 150+ HelloPrinters from 34+ nationalities, collaborating across countries, cultures, and functions.



- Impact & Innovation: Work in a fast-paced, tech-driven scale-up where your ideas shape the future of customised products.



- Collaboration: Learn from experienced leaders, contribute to meaningful projects, and thrive in a team that’s serious about performance and people.



- Celebrations & Culture: From work anniversaries and team events to monthly Keynotes and seasonal awards, we make time to celebrate wins and give back through volunteering.



Ready to Build the Future?

We are looking for bold thinkers, decisive executors, and engineers who embrace AI-first development.



If you're interested, apply here:

title: Senior Backend PHP Engineer - Remote
description:
We’re looking for a Senior Backend PHP Engineer to design and build the scalable backbone of HelloPrint’s e-commerce platforms. You’ll work on APIs, integrations, and core backend services while mentoring peers and elevating engineering standards across the organization.



You will play a key role in shaping our API-first architecture, optimizing system performance, and ensuring our infrastructure scales globally. Beyond implementation, you will influence technical direction and contribute to a high-performance engineering culture.



What You’ll Do

- Architect Our API-First Platform: Design, develop, and maintain a high-performance API layer that powers our headless commerce ecosystem. 

- Own Core Backend Services: Take end-to-end ownership of backend components—from system design and development to deployment and monitoring.

- Drive Platform Modernization: Lead the evolution of our legacy systems toward a clean, decoupled, API-first architecture, applying pragmatic engineering decisions over unnecessary complexity.

- Mentor and Elevate: Coach backend engineers on API design, performance optimization, and maintainable code practices.

- Collaborate Cross-Functionally: Partner with frontend engineers, product managers, and stakeholders to translate business objectives into robust API specifications.

- Champion Engineering Excellence: Advocate for modern development standards, including OpenAPI specifications, CI/CD pipelines, automated testing, and strong documentation practices.



What We’re Looking For

- Senior-Level Experience: 5+ years of professional backend development experience, with a strong emphasis on PHP.

- API-First Expertise: Proven experience building scalable RESTful or GraphQL APIs and designing headless architectures.

- PHP 8 Proficiency: Deep hands-on experience with modern PHP (PHP 8+), design patterns, and testing methodologies such as TDD. Experience with Symfony or similar frameworks is strongly preferred.

- Strategic & Pragmatic Thinking: Ability to balance refactoring versus rebuilding while navigating large-scale modernization initiatives.

- Strong Ownership Mentality: Proactive in identifying technical debt, performance bottlenecks, and architectural improvements.

- Database Mastery: Extensive experience with relational databases (MySQL/MariaDB), including schema design, query optimization, and performance tuning in API-driven environments.

- Agile & Version Control: Experience working with Git and agile methodologies such as Scrum or Kanban.

- AI-Accelerated Development: Comfortable leveraging AI tools to enhance productivity, code quality, and development velocity.



Nice to Have

- Experience in e-commerce or high-traffic consumer platforms.

- Familiarity with cloud environments (AWS or GCP) and containerization technologies (Docker, Kubernetes).

- Experience with asynchronous processing or message queues (e.g., GCP Pub/Sub).



What We Offer

- Growth & Ownership: A high-performance culture where you gain responsibility early and accelerate your development, supported by AI-driven learning.

- International Environment: Collaborate with 150+ HelloPrinters from 34+ nationalities across multiple countries.

- Impact & Innovation: Work in a fast-scaling, tech-driven company where your contributions directly influence product evolution.

- Collaborative Culture: Learn from experienced leaders and contribute to meaningful, high-impact projects.

- Celebration & Recognition: From team events and milestone celebrations to company-wide keynotes and awards, we recognize and celebrate achievements.



Ready to Build the Future?

We are looking for bold thinkers, decisive executors, and engineers who embrace AI-first development.



If you're interested, apply here:

Full-Time | Work From Home | U.S. Steel Detailing Firm

This is a rare, specialized opportunity — not a modeling role. We need someone who builds the tools, components, and environments that the entire detailing team depends on.

YOU ARE THE RIGHT FIT IF YOU HAVE:

- At least 3 years of Trimble Connect experience

- Strong experience building and editing parametric custom components

- Experience with drawing templates and XSR/XSL-based reports

BONUS POINTS FOR:

BENEFITS:

- Paid training and onboarding

- Pay raise opportunities

- Additional leave

- Company Christmas gift and events



COMPENSATION:

PHP 200–300 per hour | Full-time | Permanent



TO APPLY:

2. Are you comfortable working remotely on the night shift or U.S. business hours?

title: Real Estate Title & Records Research Specialist
description:
ABOUT US

We are a U.S.-based real estate investment company focused on in-depth property research, locating owners and heirs, gathering public records, and helping resolve title defects.



THE ROLE

- This role combines property research, data gathering, information filtering, and CRM data entry.

- Your work will help our team resolve title issues by uncovering missing ownership, probate, and record information.

- Please do not apply if your experience is limited to data entry, simple owner lookups, lead scraping, list pulling, or surface-level real estate VA work.



WHAT WE'RE LOOKING FOR

- Deep research experience beyond basic property lookups.

- Hands-on experience tracing deceased owners through probate courts, building family trees, and identifying breaks or gaps in ownership history.

- Familiarity with deeds, liens, mortgages, probate, chain of title, and title defects.

- 
 and FindAGrave experience strongly preferred.

- Reliable high-speed internet and a dual-monitor setup are required.

- Strong English reading comprehension for legal and court documents.



BONUS EXPERIENCE

- Tax-sale overages, excess proceeds, surplus-funds, or claimant research is a plus.



SCHEDULE & COMPENSATION

- Approximately 15 hours/week between 10:00 AM and 3:00 PM ET, Monday-Friday (exact schedule to be agreed).

- $5.00/hour, paid weekly.



HOW TO APPLY

1. Tell us about your experience with U.S. property records, including which counties, states, or online portals you've used most often.

2. List up to 5 research tools you use regularly, starting with the one you use most.

3. Tell us your available hours in Eastern Time and confirm that you have a dual-monitor setup.

4. Describe one specific research challenge you've handled, such as a deceased owner with no clear heirs, a broken chain of title, a tax-sale overage claim, or a hard-to-locate owner. Explain the steps you took, the records you searched, and how you reached your conclusion.

title: AOL Genius
description:
AOL Operations Genius – Leading Australian Finance Broking Business



About the Role

This is a very busy, high?impact role supporting a leading Australian finance broking business. You will be the engine behind the brokers – owning AOL work, operations, administration, client coordination and keeping everything organised, accurate and moving quickly.



The ideal candidate is highly organised, energetic and has a strong “can?do” approach, keen to take on a wide variety of tasks with the drive to constantly improve the client experience and internal efficiency.



Key Responsibilities

AOL & Lending Operations  -this is the main part of the role



Work in AOL every day to support brokers with pricing,  and lodgements.



Enter and maintain accurate data in AOL for all client applications and opportunities.



Use AOL to track deals from initial scenario through to lodgement, approval and settlement.



Ensure all notes, documents and status updates in AOL are complete, accurate and up to date.



Identify and fix data issues in AOL and proactively clean up and organise records.



Manage client files and enquiries, ensuring information is accurate, complete and current.



Respond to inbound communications on multiple platforms (phone,
, messages) in a professional and friendly manner.



Act as a point of contact between clients and brokers, answering questions where appropriate and escalating when required.



Provide quality customer service so clients feel looked after, supported and confident in our process.



Maintain accurate, timely and comprehensive records in our systems (AOL, CRM, spreadsheets, drive folders, task boards).



Assist with preparation of summaries, checklists and basic documentation for the brokers.



Help track applications, follow up required documents and keep all moving parts organised.



Perform other administration tasks that support the broader team and improve turnaround times.



Continually look for better ways of operating and suggest improvements to systems, templates and processes.



Ideal Candidate Profile

Experience & Skills (Non?negotiable)



Minimum 5 years’ experience working in AOL every day in an Australian mortgage/finance broking environment.



Previous experience in an administrative role in finance (mortgage broking, lending, banking, or similar).



Strong computer skills – comfortable with Google Workspace (Gmail, Calendar, Sheets, Docs, Drive), Excel and web?based business tools.



Proven ability to pick up new software systems and tools quickly.



Naturally pays close attention to detail – especially with names, numbers, dates and documents.



Communication & Attitude



Client?oriented, outgoing and friendly with a professional and approachable communication style.



Strong interpersonal, written and verbal communication skills with excellent phone etiquette.



You MUST have great spoken English and feel confident talking to clients and tea
mbers.



You MUST love talking to and helping people – you enjoy solving problems and putting people at ease.



Strong sense of personal integrity and confidentiality.



Able to work independently while being a part of a team.



Not afraid to ask questions and clarify instructions when needed.



Work Setup & Schedule

Full?time, long?term role (work?from?home).



Reliable internet connection and a quiet, professional workspace.



Willing and able to work mainly in Australian business hours -AWST (with some flexibility by agreement).



Important: Video Application Requirement

To be considered for this role, you MUST submit a short video along with your application.



Please follow these instructions carefully:



Record a video (2–3 minutes) in English.



In the video, please:



Introduce yourself (name, location, total years in finance and specifically in AOL).



Explain your day?to?day responsibilities using AOL in your current or previous roles.



Describe one example where your use of AOL helped a broker or client get a better outcome or faster result.



Tell us about a time you handled a difficult client or situation and how you resolved it.



What We Offer

Stable, long?term role with a growing Australian finance broking business.



A chance to become the key AOL and operations person in the company.



Direct access to the business owner and senior brokers; your ideas will be heard.



A supportive team that values initiative, continuous improvement and clear communication.



How to Apply



Your updated resume.



A short cover letter explaining why you are the right AOL Operations Genius  for this role.



The link to your application video (required).



If this is you, you should apply. Send your applications to: 



If it’s not, please don’t apply.

title: Social Media Manager (YouTube Expert) /Graphic Designer/Website Manager/Go High Level (GHL); Copywriter/Growth Manager
description:
Job Title:  Content & Operations Manager (YouTube + Travel Brand Growth)



Cross Functional:   Social Media Manager (YouTube Expert) /Graphic Designer/Website 

Manager/Go High Level (GHL); Copywriter/Growth Manager



Part-Time | Remote | Long-Term Opportunity



About the Company

iTravel for Culture is a growing travel documentary brand and YouTube channel hosted by Gibbs—a business builder turned cultural storyteller.



The brand explores culture through everyday people—food, music, traditions, and communities—told with a cinematic, grounded style inspired by Anthony Bourdain.



What started as a YouTube channel is now expanding into a curated tourism company, offering real-world travel experiences based on the stories we tell.



***We are a few hundred subscribers away from monetization.

*** YouTube is our primary growth engine.

***This role will directly impact how fast we grow.

***Read This First (Important)***

This is NOT a basic virtual assistant role.



If you are someone who:

+Waits for instructions

+Needs step-by-step guidance

+Submits work with frequent errors

=This role will not work for you.



We are looking for someone who:

+Thinks independently

+Anticipates needs

+Takes ownership of outcomes

+Executes at a high level without constant supervision



The Role

You will act as a Content & Operations Manager—supporting the growth of the YouTube channel while helping build the tourism side of the business.



You will work directly with Gibbs (the host) and help manage the day-to-day execution of content and platforms.



*** You will also communicate and respond on platforms as if you are Gibbs, maintaining brand voice and tone.

***Bonus if you have advanced skill in developing, designing, building, updating, and maintaining websites and SEO strategy there may be extra work available to you.  Please mention this in your response.  



Key Responsibilities of primary job

1. YouTube Management & Monetization (Primary Focus)

Upload and fully optimize videos (titles, descriptions, tags, thumbnails)

Use tools like VidIQ to improve SEO and reach

Ensure every video is positioned for maximum CTR and watch time

Track performance and suggest improvements

Help move the channel to and beyond monetization

***You must understand YouTube strategy—not just uploading.



2. Social Media Management

Manage and post across:

Instagram


TikTok

YouTube (primary)

Repurpose YouTube content for short-form platforms

Write captions and respond to comments/messages in Gibbs’ voice

Maintain consistent brand tone across all platforms



3. Graphic Design - Thumbnail Creation & Visual Content

Design high-CTR YouTube thumbnails

Create supporting graphics for social and promotions

Maintain consistent brand look and feel

*** This role replaces a previous graphic designer—you must be capable here.



4. Website & Content Uploads

Upload videos and content to the website

Publish:

Travel guides

Experience pages

Blog/cultural content

Ensure formatting, accuracy, and quality



5. CRM & Marketing Support – Go High Level (GHL)

Use Go High Level (GHL) for:

Lead tracking

Automation support

Contact organization

Support promotions and audience engagement workflows



6. Organization & Operations

Maintain clean file systems and content organization

Coordinate assets (videos, thumbnails, captions, etc.)

Ensure everything runs smoothly behind the scenes



7. Strategic Thinking

Identify what needs to be done without being told

Suggest improvements to content, systems, and growth strategy

Help connect YouTube growth to the tourism business



Required Skills:

Strong written English (natural, conversational, culturally aware)

YouTube SEO + optimization knowledge

Social media management experience

Graphic design skills (thumbnails + branding)

Strong attention to detail (very important)

Ability to think critically and work independently



Required Tools / Applications:

You must already have experience using:

Go High Level (GHL)

VidIQ

Graphic Design Software (Photoshop, Canva, or equivalent)



Key Skill Areas

Social Media Management

Website Content Management

Virtual File Organization

Branding & Visual Consistency

Promotions & Audience Engagement

Thumbnail Creation (High CTR Focus)



Work Structure;

Part-time role

~16 hours per week (~64 hours per month)

Flexible schedule based on workload

Paid monthly in advance

Fully remote

***This role will grow as the company grows.



Who This Role Is For

You will do well if you:

Take initiative without being told

Catch mistakes before submitting work

Care about quality and performance

Are curious about travel, culture, and storytelling

Want to grow with a brand long-term



How to Apply (Read Carefully)

We are intentionally filtering for serious candidates.



Step 1: Written Response

Answer the following:

Why are you a strong fit for this role?

What would you do to help a YouTube channel reach monetization faster?

What makes a thumbnail high CTR? (Be specific)



Step 2: Proof of Work

Provide:

2–3 thumbnails you created

1 example of a YouTube video you optimized (if available)

Any social media accounts you have managed



Step 3: Attention Test

Include this line at the top of your application:



“How I do my work matters.”

*** Applications without this line will not be reviewed.



Final Note

This role requires:

Ownership

Precision

Initiative



If you are the type of person who sees what needs to be done and handles it—this is a long-term opportunity.  If not, this is not the right fit.

title: Real Estate Research VA — Realtor Database Builder (North Fort Worth, TX)
description:
I am a new home sales consultant launching in the North Fort Worth / Denton corridor in Texas. I need a detail-oriented VA to build and maintain a database of active buyer and listing agents in my target market. This is an ongoing part-time role with potential to grow.



Your Primary Task:

Research recently sold homes in specific zip codes using 
 and Zillow and record the following information in a Google Sheet for each transaction:

• Sale address

• Date of sale

• List price and sale price

• Buyer’s agent name

• Buyer’s agent brokerage

• Buyer’s agent
 (if publicly available)

• Buyer’s agent phone (if publicly available)

• Listing agent name

• Listing agent brokerage

• Listing agent
 (if publicly available)

• Listing agent phone (if publicly available)

• Notes on price point range



Target Geography:

You will be assigned specific zip codes in the North Fort Worth / Wise County / Denton County area including but not limited to: 76071, 76052, 76179, 76131, 76177, 76247, 76078, 76244, 76248, 76020, 76023. New zip codes will be added as the database grows.



Target Price Range:

Focus on sold homes between $220,000 and $650,000 only. Skip anything outside this range.



What We’re Looking For:

The ideal candidate is someone who takes pride in clean, accurate work and understands that the quality of this database directly impacts real business results. You must be proficient in Google Sheets including basic formatting, duplicate detection, and data organization. You should be comfortable conducting manual research across multiple websites simultaneously and cross-referencing information for accuracy.



Experience with real estate platforms like 
 and Zillow is strongly preferred. We are building a professional outreach database, so experience building lead lists, contact databases, or outreach lists for sales teams is a major plus. 



Attention to detail is non-negotiable. This role requires clean, consistent, verified data entry. Sloppy or unverified records are not acceptable and will be flagged immediately. If you are someone who takes shortcuts, this is not the right fit. If you are someone who takes pride in delivering spotless work, we want to hear from you.



Requirements:

• Proficient in Google Sheets including formatting, organization, and duplicate detection

• Comfortable researching across multiple websites simultaneously

• Experience with 
, Zillow, or similar real estate platforms

• Strong attention to detail — data accuracy is critical

• Available for at least 10-15 hours per week

• Reliable internet connection

• Good written English for occasional communication



What Success Looks Like:

Delivering
clean, verified records per week with consistent formatting and zero duplicate entries. Speed and accuracy will improve as you become familiar with the target zip codes and data format. Weekly output will be reviewed and constructive feedback provided to help you continuously improve.



Compensation:

$5-6 USD per hour depending on experience. Paid weekly via Wise or PayPal.



To Apply:

Please send a short message explaining any experience you have with real estate research, data entry, or lead list building. Include the word “NorthTexas” somewhere in your application so I know you read this fully.

title: Customer Service Representative – Workers Comp Drug and Alcohol Testing
description:
CUSTOMER SERVICE REPRESENTATIVE – WORKERS’ COMPENSATION 

DRUG & ALCOHOL TESTING (REMOTE – PHILIPPINES) 

*LOCATION: METRO MANILA & CAVITE APPLICANTS ONLY 



=== ABOUT THE ROLE === 

USA Mobile Drug Testing (USAMDT) is hiring a Customer Service Representative (CSR) to support our Workers’ Compensation Drug and Alcohol Testing operations. 



This role works closely with our Workers’ Compensation and Claims teams to process testing requests, coordinate collections, and obtain results as quickly and accurately as possible. Speed, attention to detail, and clear communication are critical. 



This is a specialized CSR position, not a script-based call center role. You will handle live calls, time-sensitive injury-related requests, documentation, and follow-up. 



We operate in a process-driven, accountability-focused environment and are organizing the company around the EOS / Traction framework, emphasizing role clarity, ownership, and disciplined execution. 



This is a long-term role with structured training, scorecards, and defined milestones. 



=== KEY RESPONSIBILITIES === 

PHONE &
 COMMUNICATION 

• Answer inbound calls live and professionally 

• Return voi
s within 30 minutes 

• Respond to
s within 4 hours 

• Interpret unclear or rambling explanations related to injuries or claims 

• Ask clarifying questions to ensure correct testing is ordered 

• Communicate expectations, timelines, and next steps clearly 

• Log all calls and interactions accurately 

• Escalate urgent or high-risk situations immediately 



WORKERS’ COMPENSATION TESTING COORDINATION 

• Process workers’ compensation drug and alcohol testing requests 

• Coordinate with employers, claims teams, collectors, clinics, and labs 

• Schedule collections quickly and accurately 

• Confirm availability before finalizing schedules 

• Prioritize cases based on urgency and client requirements 

• Maintain accurate job and claim status codes 



RESULTS TRACKING & DOCUMENTATION 

• Track collections and follow up on incomplete or missing information 

• Monitor test progress and obtain results as quickly as possible 

• Process paperwork from collectors and clinics 

• Edit and finalize documents using Foxit PDF 

• Upload documents to SharePoint or route results internally 

• Update job logs with donor information, test stages, and claim status 

• Ensure documentation accuracy and compliance 



CUSTOMER & INTERNAL SUPPORT 

• Provide status updates to employers and internal teams 

• Assist with claims-related questions and next-step clarification 

• Maintain professionalism during sensitive or stressful calls 



=== REQUIRED EXPERIENCE AND QUALIFICATIONS === 

• Minimum 3 years supporting a small U.S.-based company 

• At least 3 years of live voice experience with U.S. customers 

• Strong verbal and written English at a professional level 

• Ability to manage time-sensitive requests in a fast-paced environment 

• Experience with Microsoft Office, SharePoint, and CRM tools 

• Comfort following documented workflows and escalation paths 

• High attention to detail and personal accountability 



=== CRITICAL CHARACTERISTICS FOR SUCCESS === 

The ideal candidate consistently demonstrates: 

• Critical thinking to interpret unclear or rambling explanations 

• Intellectual humility — asks questions and seeks clarity 

• Proactive behavior without waiting for direction 

• Strong sense of urgency, especially for injury-related cases 

• Attention to detail and follow-through 

• Effective priority management and time management 

• Punctuality and reliability 

• Integrity — doing what you said you would do, when you said you would do it, and cleaning it up when you don’t 

• Clear, concise communication that directly addresses the issue at hand 



=== ENGLISH COMMUNICATION REQUIREMENT (NON-NEGOTIABLE) === 

This role requires advanced English communication to support U.S.-based employers and internal claims teams. 



You must be able to: 

• Clearly understand American callers in real time 

• Communicate confidently without scripts 

• Handle urgent or sensitive conversations professionally 



--- USA ENGLISH LIVE CONVERSATION ASSESSMENT --- 

• Shortlisted candidates will complete a real-time English conversation assessment 

• Live voice or video format 

• Scenario-based discussion 

• Accent is not evaluated — clarity, comprehension, and professionalism are 



=== PERSONALITY & WORK-STYLE ASSESSMENT === 

Candidates may be asked to complete a personality or work-style assessment to help evaluate communication style, accountability, and role fit. Results are reviewed alongside interviews and performance indicators and are not used as standalone pass/fail criteria. 



=== POWER, INTERNET & EQUIPMENT REQUIREMENTS (NON-NEGOTIABLE) === 

POWER BACKUP 

• Within 90 days, you must have 7–8 hours of reliable backup power 

• Must support a laptop or desktop, second monitor, and modem/router 

• Stand-alone battery solution required (multiple units acceptable) 

• Photos and specifications must be provided 

*** FAILURE TO MEET THIS REQUIREMENT WITHIN 90 DAYS WILL RESULT IN TERMINATION *** 



HEADSET REQUIREMENT 

• Professional noise-cancelling headset suitable for U.S. phone support 

• Clear microphone quality with minimal background noise 

• Approved headset options provided during onboarding 



=== TRAINING, PERFORMANCE & CAREER PROGRESSION === 

INITIAL TRAINING (0–90 DAYS) 

• Workers’ Compensation testing workflows 

• Documentation standards and quality expectations 

• Performance scorecards and accountability metrics 



CSR LEVEL 1 

• Achieved at 90 days with performance score of 4 out of 5 or higher 



CSR LEVEL 2 

• Earned through consistent performance and skill mastery 

• Handles more complex cases with reduced supervision 



This role does not include secondary roles. Focus is on Workers’ Compensation testing accuracy and speed. 



=== COMPENSATION === 

• Compensation range: $4.00 to $7.00 USD per hour 

• $4.00 USD per hour during training 

• Raises at 90 days, 6 months, 9 months, and 12 months (performance-based) 

• Additional incentives tied to KPIs and role proficiency 

 

=== TIME OFF POLICY === 

• First 90 days: No time off 

• Remainder of first year: Up to 5 unpaid days 

• After one year: 5 paid days, usable in 2-hour increments 

Candidates will be asked to disclose any planned time off for the next 12 months during the interview. 



=== IMPORTANT NOTES === 

• Applicants must currently reside in Metro Manila or Cavite 

• This role requires stability, reliability, and long-term commitment

• Applicates can't have more than 2 jobs in 3 years or 3 jobs in 5 years.
salary: $4 per hour USD starting ($5 to $6 av...

title: ServiceM8 Admin Assistant

While training will be provided to develop your skills further, basic experience in building ServiceM8 forms or similar document/template systems is ideal but not essential.

-Assist with documenting internal processes and improving workflows.



As you become more familiar with our systems, you will:

-Become more involved in client scoping, feedback, and support.

-Assist with ServiceM8 setups and system optimisation.



Requirements

-Administrative Support

-Communication Skills

-Tech-savvy

-Basic experience building ServiceM8 forms or similar form/template systems (Ideal, but not essential)

-High attention to detail, especially in formatting, layout, and consistency

-Intermediate to advanced experience with Microsoft Word, including mail merge functionality and using IF statements and conditional logic in templates

Preferred Qualifications

-Experience working with Australian clients

-Strong understanding of merge fields, conditional logic, and content

-VA or admin experience (2+ years)

title: Executive Assistant
description:
READ THIS FIRST



[SHORT INTRO OF OUR COMPANY]



We are a Singapore based company.



Our main core business involves coaching and training a new generation of financial advisors to reach out to more people, transform more lives and build the business of their dreams.



We have coached more than 3000 Financial Advisors and have more than 8 years under our belt in doing so.



Our clients are mainly in Singapore, Malaysia and Hong Kong and we are on track to reaching out to more of them as we speak.



Right now, We are looking for an Executive Assistant to be part of our company, and to be working directly with the Chief Executive Officer (CEO).



As the Executive Assistant of our company, you will be responsible for coordinating, planning events, communicating to the team and clients, and organising all the backend logistics and operations of the company.



More importantly, your main objective is to buy back time for the CEO.



Your position will play an important and crucial role in the team’s success.





[HOW LIFE IS GONNA LOOK LIKE FOR YOU]



You will be involved in the day to day communications and supporting the CEO directly, assisting in random tasks or any tasks that the CEO requires.





There is no limit to duties an executive assistant can handle, which is why if you are taking on this role, you must have a confident, problem-solving-can-do attitude.



We will not sugarcoat anything but here’s how it is like as well.



You WILL be in a high pressure environment that will force you to step up and grow as an individual.



There will be no bullshit beautiful lies, but rather ugly truth - although necessary - but ugly all the same that will poise you for growth.



While it might be intense, the rewards are great.



Bonuses, employee benefits and perks that will ensure you get well remunerated for your efforts.



The “work hard, play hard and work even harder mantra” is here.



Because we are going to be poised for crazy growth and expansion, you will have to put on your thinking cap, initiative and out of your comfort zone to get things done.





You'll get to attend world-class business, marketing and personal development programs for FREE and rub elbows with renowned Asian entrepreneurs and Financial Advisors.



You’ll be working with an international team, and you’ll even get to hang out with them at least once a year at our annual retreat in an exotic location.





=========

If you are remotely interested after reading the above, click here for next step:

title: Short-Form Video Editor
description:
We're looking for a skilled short-form video editor to help us turn interview footage into engaging, scroll-stopping content for TikTok and Instagram Reels.



What you'll be doing:

Taking raw interview clips and editing them into mashup-style videos with strong pacing and flow. Adding text overlays, captions, and transcripts throughout the videos. Incorporating screen recordings and other visual elements to make the content feel interactive and dynamic. Editing for retention knowing where to cut, when to zoom, and how to keep viewers watching. Delivering final videos optimized for vertical short-form (9:16).



What we're looking for:

Someone who understands how short-form social content works on TikTok and Reels. Not just technical editing skills but an eye for what actually performs on these platforms. Experience with CapCut, Premiere Pro, or similar editing tools. Ability to take raw footage and make creative decisions on pacing, cuts, and text placement without needing hand-holding on every detail. Reliable communication and consistent turnaround.



Starting project:

10 videos at $300 total ($30/video). This is a test batch to see how we work together.



Ongoing opportunity:

This is not a one-off project. We are continuously producing new interview content and need an editor who can grow with us long-term. If the first batch goes well, there will be consistent ongoing work with the potential to increase volume and rate as we scale.



Please include in your application:

2-3 samples of short-form social content you've edited (interviews, mashups, or similar formats preferred). The tools you use. Your typical turnaround time per video. Confirmation that you're comfortable starting at $30/video for the initial batch.

We're looking to start immediately.

title: Social Media Content Creator - Boats
description:
We're looking for someone based in the Philippines to run day-to-day social media content for a boating brand. This is a full-time, ongoing role.



What you'll be doing:



Scouring social media platforms (TikTok, Instagram, YouTube,
) daily to find the best-performing boat content, viral clips, satisfying videos, and trending boating 
nts. Taking that content and creating new mashup/compilation-style videos with music, text overlays, and transitions. Posting our original branded content alongside the curated content. Publishing 10+ posts per day across our social channels. Staying on top of trending audio, formats, and what's performing in the boating and outdoor lifestyle space.



What we're looking for:



Someone who understands what makes content go viral on short-form platforms. Experience with video editing tools (CapCut, Premiere Pro, or similar). Ability to find, clip, and remix content quickly without sacrificing quality. Comfortable working independently and keeping a consistent posting schedule. Reliable, fast, and organized. You don't need to know everything about boats, but you need to have an eye for what looks good and what people engage with.



Please include in your application:



Any social media pages you've managed or grown. Examples of mashup or compilation-style videos you've created. The tools you use for editing. Your availability (this requires daily posting, 7 days a week ideally). Your monthly rate.



Compensation: $500/month depending on experience. Opportunity to grow with us as we scale.



This is a remote, full-time role starting immediately. If you love content, spend all day on social media anyway, and can move fast, we want to hear from you.

title: AI Animated Video Editor/Creator
description:
We're looking for a creative video editor based in the Philippines who can produce short-form AI animated videos for social media (TikTok, Instagram Reels,
).



Think Pixar-style animated characters, expressive faces, dramatic storytelling, text overlays, and trending audio. If you've seen these blowing up on social media lately, that's exactly what we need.



What you'll be doing:



Creating short AI animated videos (15-60 seconds) for brands across different niches. You'll receive a script or concept and be responsible for turning it into a finished, scroll-stopping animated video ready to post.



What we're looking for:



Someone with experience using AI animation tools (Runway, Kling, Pika, Minimax, Hailuo, or similar). Strong understanding of what performs on TikTok and Instagram. Ability to add text overlays, captions, music, and sound effects. Quick turnaround. Consistent quality. Able to work on multiple projects at once.



Please include in your application:



2-3 samples of AI animated videos you've created. The tools you use. Your turnaround time per video. Your rate (per video or monthly retainer).



We're looking to start immediately.

title: Electrical Engineer - Project Coordinator
description:
As a premier electrical contracting firm, we are looking for a versatile and driven **Electrical Engineer** to join our team. This role is a hybrid of technical design, project management, and strategic bidding. You won’t just be sitting behind a desk; you will be the bridge between complex electrical blueprints and successful project completion.



      Core Responsibilities  

* **Design & Drafting: : Develop comprehensive **shop drawings** and technical layouts using **AutoCAD** and **Bluebeam**.

* **Project Coordination: :  Read and interpret electrical drawings to create detailed work schedules, ensuring labor and materials align with project milestones.

* **Estimating & Bidding: : Analyze project specifications to prepare accurate and competitive bids for upcoming contracts.

* **Technical Compliance: : Ensure all designs and installations adhere to safety standards and industry regulations.

* **Cross-Functional Collaboration: : Act as the primary point of contact between the field crew, general contractors, and clients to ensure seamless project execution.



---



        **Requirements & Qualifications**

* **Technical Proficiency: : Advanced skills in **AutoCAD** and **Bluebeam** are required for drafting and document markup.

* **Blueprint Literacy: : Mastery in reading and interpreting electrical schematics, one-line diagrams, and architectural floor plans.

* **Regulatory Knowledge: :  A strong familiarity with the **National Electrical Code (NEC)** is a significant advantage and will be prioritized.

* **Organizational Skills: :  Proven ability to manage project timelines, coordinate resources, and meet strict deadlines.

* **Communication: :  Strong verbal and written skills to effectively relay technical information to non-technical stakeholders.



---



       **What We Are Looking For**

* **The "Perpetual Student" Mindset: :  In our industry, no two projects are the same. We need someone who is genuinely excited to learn new electrical concepts and emerging technologies every single day.

* **Problem Solvers: : You should be able to look at a complex electrical challenge and find a code-compliant, cost-effective solution.

* **Contracting Experience: : Previous experience working specifically within an electrical contracting environment is highly preferred.



---



    Why Join Us ?

We offer a fast-paced environment where your work has a direct impact on the skyline. You will gain hands-on experience in the full lifecycle of a project—from the first bid to the final inspection. If you are ready to grow your technical expertise while managing high-stakes projects, we want to hear from you.

title: Claims Processor
description:
Job Summary

We are seeking a detail-oriented and organized Claims Processor to join our team. In this role, you will be responsible for reviewing, processing, and managing claims accurately and efficiently, with a strong emphasis on manual claims entry from superbill submissions. You will play a key role in ensuring compliance, data integrity, and timely claim resolution while delivering excellent service to clients and internal stakeholders.

Key Responsibilities

Review and process incoming claims for completeness, accuracy, and compliance with company policies and applicable regulations

Perform manual claims entry from superbills, ensuring accurate transcription of all required data (patient details, CPT/HCPCS codes, dates of service, charges, etc.)

Verify claim information including patient/client details, dates of service, medication names, costs, and supporting documentation

Communicate with clients, providers, and internal departments to gather missing information or resolve discrepancies

Maintain accurate records and documentation for all processed claims

Track claim status and follow up on outstanding or pending claims

Identify and flag potentially fraudulent, duplicate, or inconsistent claims

Meet productivity and accuracy standards within established deadlines

Assist with reporting, auditing, and data entry as needed

Qualifications

High school diploma or GED required; Associate’s or Bachelor’s degree preferred

2–5 years of experience in claims processing, medical billing, or a related field required

Hands-on experience with manual claims entry from superbills is required

Strong attention to detail and high level of data entry accuracy

Familiarity with medical terminology, CPT/ICD coding, insurance claims, or pharmacy billing preferred

Proficiency in Microsoft Office (Excel, Word, Outlook) and claims management software

Strong organizational and time management skills

Excellent written and verbal communication skills

Ability to handle confidential information with discretion and professionalism

title: Build a Storm Alert Web App for a Roofing Leads Business
description:
What We Need Built

This is an MVP — keep it simple and fast. No CRM, no sales pipeline, no meteorologist portal. Just a focused tool that does a few things really well.



1.  Client Accounts & Onboarding

 • Simple login/signup 
 + password)

 • Each client sets their coverage area — by zip code, city, or radius around their location

 • Basic profile: company name, contact info, coverage zones



2.  Storm Map

 • Interactive map showing recent hail and wind storm events

 • Color-coded by severity (light / moderate / severe)

 • Clients can visually see which storms overlap their coverage area

 • Data pulled from a free or low-cost weather API (NOAA, 
, etc.) — developer's choice



3.  Storm Alerts

 •
 notification sent to client when a qualifying storm hits their coverage area

 • Alert includes: storm date, location, hail size or wind speed, and a map link

 • Optional SMS alerts via Twilio (nice to have, not required for MVP)



4.  Simple Admin Dashboard (for us)

 • View all clients and their coverage zones

 • Manually trigger an alert to a specific client or group if needed

 • See a log of alerts sent



What This Is NOT

To keep scope tight, the following are explicitly out of scope for this project:



 • No built-in lead generation or property lookup tools

 • No CRM or sales pipeline features

 • No mobile app (web only, but should be mobile-responsive)

 • No meteorologist review workflow

 • No customer billing or subscription management



We may build these later. For now, we just want the alert engine and map working reliably.



Tech Stack

We don't have strong opinions — use what you know best. Here's a reasonable starting point:



Frontend

React or plain HTML/JS — clean, mobile-responsive UI

Backend

Node.js, Python, or whatever you're comfortable with

Database

PostgreSQL or Firebase — simple user + alert storage

Maps

Mapbox GL JS, Google Maps, or Leaflet (free tier fine for MVP)

Weather Data

NOAA Storm Prediction Center API, 
, or OpenWeatherMap

Alerts

SendGrid or Mailgun for

description:
Operations Assistant (AU Accounting Support)

mbers and stakeholders have a clear, real-time view of project statuses and upcoming deadlines.

title: Director of Customer Acquisition DTC
description:
Urgent Hiring — Applications are reviewed on a rolling basis. The selection process may take up to 4 weeks, but early applicants are strongly encouraged.

Ready to build something that shapes the future?

Every parent wants to give their child the best start. They want to see curiosity light up their eyes. They want confidence, not constant screen time. They want learning to feel joyful again.



At Hadley Designs, we create screen-free tools that help families rediscover connection through hands-on learning. We are scaling quickly. We are building boldly. And we are looking for a leader who can turn vision into profitable growth.



That’s where you come in.



About Hadley Designs

Hadley Designs is a family-founded, female-led brand redefining early education through creativity, beauty, and connection. What began at a kitchen table has grown into a nationally loved brand trusted by millions of parents, grandparents, and teachers.



We believe learning should be fun and engaging.



We don’t just sell products, we shape futures.



We believe in screen-free, hands-on learning that builds confidence and connection. Beautiful design creates better learning.



Our mission is simple and powerful. Design screen-free products parents can trust to help their children learn, grow, and reach their full potential with confidence.



Our vision is bold. Build the most trusted children’s brand in the world. Reach $100M in revenue by 2030. Become a household name passed down for generations.



Now we are scaling our direct-to-consumer ecosystem. Shopify and TikTok Shop are our next major growth engines.



About the Role

As our Director of Customer Acquisition DTC, you are the General Manager of Shopify and TikTok Shop. You own the P&L. You own the strategy. You own the results.



Your Core Focus



-Scale Shopify and TikTok Shop to $20M+ in combined revenue within 18 months

-Achieve ?15% net margin on Shopify and ?5% on TikTok Shop

-Maintain Meta ROAS ? 2.0 and TikTok Shop ROAS ? 3.5

-Launch one new high-converting bundle-based funnel per month

-Drive
 and SMS to contribute ?25% of Shopify revenue

-Remove the CEO from daily ecommerce execution by owning strategy, systems, team, and outcomes



You are not here to manage tasks. You are here to architect a repeatable growth engine.



What You’ll Do



Traffic and Acquisition



-Partner with affiliate and UGC teams to scale winning creative

-Stay ahead of platform trends, formats, and policy updates

-Coordinate launches with Amazon for halo effects



Offers, Funnels, and CRO



L-aunch one new bundle-based funnel every month tied to educational outcomes

-Optimize CVR, AOV, CAC, LTV, upsells, and overall funnel economics weekly

-Oversee homepage, product pages, and collection merchandising

-Refactor and relaunch underperforming funnels with new hooks and offers

-Lead seasonal promotions including Back-to-School and Holiday campaigns

-Build and maintain funnel SOPs and testing roadmaps



Customer Nurture and LTV



-Lead lifecycle marketing through Klaviyo and Postscript

-Optimize welcome, cart abandonment, post-purchase, and win-back flows

-Build ascension paths from posters to workbooks to busy books

-Develop blog and SEO strategy to drive organic education-based traffic



Performance and Forecasting



-Review weekly P&Ls for Shopify and TikTok Shop

-Analyze AOV, CVR, CAC, LTV, ROAS, GP to CAC, and lifecycle revenue share

-Deliver weekly scorecards and monthly strategic growth plans

-Forecast performance and identify scaling levers



Team Leadership



-Lead and coach a cross-functional ecommerce pod of 6+ tea
mbers

-Establish clear ownership and weekly operating rhythms

-Hire and develop talent as funnel velocity increases

-Manage freelancers and specialized contractors

-Model Extreme Ownership, Relentless Innovation, and Integrity 

Above All



How Success Is Measured



-$20M+ DTC revenue within 18 months

-Consistent margin and ROAS targets achieved

-One profitable funnel launch per month


 and SMS driving at least 25% of Shopify revenue

-Documented systems that scale without founder dependency

-A high-performing team executing without burnout



Requirements



Who You Are



You think like a General Manager, not just a marketer.



You thrive in ownership. You love numbers. You respect creative. You build systems that make growth inevitable.



You align deeply with our values:



-Extreme Ownership. You solve problems and close loops without excuses.

-Relentless Innovation. You test boldly, learn fast, and iterate constantly.

-Integrity Above All. You report numbers accurately and tell the truth even when it is hard.



Experience That Sets You Apart



-5 to 10+ years in DTC ecommerce, especially Shopify and paid social

-Proven track record scaling ecommerce brands past $20M

-Experience owning revenue and profitability targets

-Deep expertise in Meta and TikTok Ads

-Hands-on experience with Klaviyo, Postscript, and Shopify CMS

-Strong background in bundles, upsells, and LTV optimization

-Ability to write and review high-converting landing pages

-Comfortable leading a fully remote team with clear weekly cadences



You are analytical and creative. Strategic and operational. Visionary and accountable.



You care about building something that lasts.



Benefits

Why You’ll Love Working Here



-You will have real ownership. Real trust. And real impact.

-Hadley Designs is a remote first company built on autonomy, creativity, and accountability.

-You will work closely with leadership, including the CEO, while having full authority to own your channels and decisions.

-Access to ongoing learning, training, and tools to sharpen your knowledge and strategies in the DTC space.

-You will be surrounded by A+ tea
mber that value excellence, growth, and doing the right thing.

-You will build something meaningful. Our products help families slow down, connect, and rediscover the joy of learning together.

-You will help shape a decade long vision to build the most trusted children’s brand in the world.

-Access Josh Hadley's vast network through his podcast Ecomm Breakthrough



To formally apply : apply here

We're trying to solve the world's biggest problem: People don't #Believe in themselves enough. For over 22 years, Evan Carmichael has been dedicated to this mission. The way we're approaching this problem is producing inspirational content at scale. The right video at the right time can completely change someone's life and we want to touch as many lives as possible. People may not have a supportive family or community around them, but our content can help give them the belief they need to chase their dreams and make the world a better place. title: Cold Caller
description:
Monarch Marketing is a US based marketing and automation agency serving med spa owners. We are hiring a full time cold caller to book discovery calls with med spa owners across the United States.



This role is a fit for you if you are comfortable on the phone, you handle rejection well, and you want a stable long term position with base pay plus commission.



WHAT YOU WILL DO

- Make 60 to 80 outbound calls per day from a provided lead list

- Follow our script and objection handling playbook

- Get past gatekeepers and reach the owner or decision maker

- Book qualified discovery calls directly into our calendar

- Log every call and outcome in our CRM (GoHighLevel)

- Join trainings and meetings with founder and coaches.



WHAT WE PROVIDE

- US phone number and dialer software

- Full script, objection responses, and gatekeeper bypass training

- Paid onboarding week to learn the offer and practice calls

- 2-3x weekly coaching for reviews and assessments.

- CRM access with call recordings so we can review and improve together



WORK HOURS

- Monday to Friday, 9 AM to 5 PM US Central Time

- In Manila time this is roughly 9 PM to 5 AM depending on US daylight saving

- You must be willing to work night shift long term. Please do not apply if you want day shift Manila time.



COMPENSATION

- Base pay: $4 USD per hour

- Commission: $30 USD per discovery call where the prospect shows up

- Realistic target: 10 to 15 showed calls per month

- Total expected monthly earnings: $900 to $1,100 USD

- Paid semi monthly

- Performance reviews at 30 and 90 days with raises based on results



WHO WE ARE LOOKING FOR

- Prior cold calling or appointment setting experience, ideally B2B or US based (we will consider strong candidates with less experience if your voice sample is excellent)

- Clear spoken English with a neutral or light accent

- Reliable internet connection and a good quality headset

- Comfortable with CRM tools (we use GoHighLevel, will train you)

- Confidence on the phone and quick thinking when handling objections



NICE TO HAVE

- Prior experience in beauty, wellness, healthcare, or med spa industries

- Prior work with US marketing or agency clients

- Appointment setting for higher ticket services



HOW TO APPLY



Please reply to this job post with the following three items in a single message.



1. A 60 to 90 second voice recording. Read the script below out loud as if you are on a real cold call with a med spa owner. Do not rush. Use a natural, warm, conversational tone.



The script has two 
nts where you will pause as if the prospect is speaking. These are marked with brackets like this: [Prospect: ...]. Do not read the bracketed lines out loud. Pause naturally, then continue with your next line.



---



"Hey, my name's [your name]. I was wondering if I could get your help real quick with something. Your business came across my team's research and we think we could do some meaningful work together. For something like that would you usually recommend just shooting over an
?



[Prospect: Yeah
 is probably best.]



Got it, I'll do that. Before I let you go though, quick question, is more patients something you guys can even handle right now or are you pretty booked out?



A lot of med spa owners we talk to are leaving money on the table because leads come in and nobody follows up fast enough, or the front desk misses calls during busy hours. We help fix that with some simple AI tools, nothing crazy. I'm not here to pitch you on the phone. I'd love to put together a quick audit of what's happening with your leads and walk you through it. Takes about 15 minutes.



[Prospect: I'm really not interested, we're doing fine.]



Totally fair, and honestly most owners say that at first. Can I ask one quick question though, when a new patient calls your spa after hours, what happens to that call right now? ... Okay, that's exactly the kind of thing we look at in the audit. How about I grab 15 minutes on your calendar next Tuesday or Wednesday and show you what we found? No pressure either way."



---



HOW TO SUBMIT YOUR VOICE SAMPLE



Use one of these two methods. We prefer Vocaroo because it is the fastest.



Option 1 (Recommended): Vocaroo

- Go to 
 on your phone or computer

- Click the red record button and read the script above

- Click "Save and Share" when done

- Copy the link and paste it into your application



Option 2: Google Drive

- Record the script using your phone's voice recorder app

- Upload the file to your Google Drive

- Right click the file, click "Share", and set access to "Anyone with the link"

- Copy the link and paste it into your application



Make sure the link works before you submit. If we cannot open your voice sample, we cannot review your application.



2. A short answer to each of these questions:

- What is your previous cold calling experience? Who did you call and what were you selling?

- Why does a night shift role work for your situation long term?



3. Include the word "Monarch" at the top of your application so we know you read the full post.



We review every complete application and respond to everyone who submits a voice sample. We are excited to hear from you. If accepted, there will be a group interview with our sales coach and a 1-1 interview with the founder.

title: P6 Scheduler and Estimator Mixed Use High Rise US Project
description:
P6 CONSTRUCTION PROJECT SCHEDULE FOR HIGH RISE MIXED USE MULTIFAMILY PROJECT IN UNITED STATES



Work hours are United States New York City Time, Eastern Time.



Applicant must have Demonstrated, Verifiable Experience working on United States High Rise Mixed Use Projects. 



Role and Responsibilities:

• Proficient with Primavera P6 scheduling software.

• Proficient with MS Project software.

• Assist project team to prepare develop the schedule for large, multi-phase hi-rise construction project.

• Perform all aspects of schedule updates with the project team.

• Analyze and evaluate schedule updates and explain impacts to the project team.

• Cost and resource load the schedule.

• Track change conditions and impacts to the schedule.

• Identify and articulate schedule concerns and delays to the project tea
mbers.

• Conduct Critical Path Method (CPM) analysis and scenario planning for executive decision-making.

• Responsible for independently creating, updating and monitoring Project schedules in P6.

• Direct, demonstrated portfolio experience estimating large, multi-component mixed use construction projects. 

• Additional duties as directed by the Company. 



Position Requirements: 

• Bachelor’s degree in Engineering, Construction Management, Architecture, Project Management, or related field.

• Minimum 5 years of scheduling experience in complex technology projects.

• Expert level skills in Primavera P6, Microsoft Project software and working knowledge of schedule integration and cost/resource loading (Knowledge of TILOS & Primavera Risk analysis a plus).

• Advanced/Expert skills in Microsoft Excel.

• Strong understanding of Critical Path Method (CPM), project controls, and construction sequencing.

• Self-starting; proactive, able to work independently with little oversight or guidance.

• Able to plan and manage project schedules requiring over 1,500 activities.

• Excellent Interpersonal skills with good verbal and written communication skills, with detail oriented and rigorous attention to detail mindset.



Required Skills /Training Requirements: 

• Experience supporting construction project management functions, including estimating, cost control, and coordination across multiple trades and work packages. 

• Experience managing schedules with over 1,500 activities and applying U.S. construction sequencing standards for high-rise and mixed-use developments.

• Experience creating Level 4-6 Baseline Schedules in Primavera P6 with logical sequencing across multiple trades and phases.

• Strong background in cost/resource loading, change tracking, and risk identification using tools like Oracle Aconex, Power BI, and RAID logs.

•Ability to create Power BI dashboards. 

• 5 years of direct construction scheduling experience, preferably in large high rise apartment and mixed use development projects. 



• **MUST Have: P6 Software experience**



**As part of the interview process applicant will be asked to conduct and lead a live, walk-through demonstration of a mixed-use complex development schedule to demonstrate applicant's aptitude and knowledge of scheduling and working on a mixed-use project in the United States** 



**The position is a Full Time position with the Company and applicant should not intend to hold other employment for other employers while working for the Company**
