title: Sales Closer — U.S. Graphic Design Agency (Remote / Work From Home)
description:
$500USD/month guaranteed base + 30% per close | Earn up to $1,600+/month USD



To Apply click here:





THE JOB:



We're a U.S.-based graphic design agency that has been running strong for nearly 10 years. We sell recurring monthly design subscriptions to businesses and we're looking for one sharp, confident Sales Closer to be the voice of this company.

This is not a grind-from-scratch commission-only hustle. You come in with a guaranteed base salary on day one. Then you earn a healthy bonus every single time you close  on top of that base. The more you close, the more you make. It's that simple.



Here's what the role actually looks like:

When a warm lead comes in (a prospect who has already responded to our outreach and raised their hand) you call them. Fast. Your job is to have a real conversation, understand their business, and close the deal. We give you the leads. You make the call.



On days when warm leads aren't flowing, you'll be cold calling U.S. businesses from targeted lists. 

We show you exactly how to build those lists and what to say. No guessing, no winging it. You'll be fully trained before you ever pick up the phone on our behalf.



What you earn:

$500/month guaranteed base — every month, no matter what

30% bonus on every new client you close

Close just 1–2 clients a month and you're earning up to $1,600+



What we're looking for:

This role comes down to one thing: how you sound on the phone. 

You need to be the kind of person that a U.S. business owner hears and immediately thinks: this person knows what they're talking about.



Excellent spoken English. 

clear, natural, and confident



Neutral or near-neutral accent.  

You will be speaking with business owners across the United States



Real sales or closing experience...

 not customer service, not appointment setting, actual closing



Quiet, professional workspace: 

reliable internet and a good headset are non-negotiable



We provide full training on the product, the call structure, how to handle objections, and how to prospect. You don't need to know graphic design. You need to know how to sell.



If you're a closer who's tired of roles with no base, no support, and no real product behind them... this is worth your time.





Click below to fill out our application.

title: DM Appointment Setter
description:
Genflow is the world's leading creator and business building agency. We work with some of the world's most influential creators to build, launch, scale, and monetise their brands across physical products, digital courses, communities, and high-ticket programmes. We're growing fast and this role sits at the front line of that growth.

We're looking for a sharp, personable DM Appointment Setter to own Instagram conversations across Genflow and our creator brand portfolio including Creator College and Shan's channels, converting leads into booked sales calls and driving product sales through authentic, high-quality engagement.



The Role:

You'll manage DMs across multiple Instagram accounts within the Genflow ecosystem, starting real conversations, building rapport, and moving prospects toward either a booked sales call or a direct purchase. This isn't copy-paste messaging. It's consultative, on-brand communication that reflects each creator's voice and converts across a range of offers from digital courses and communities to high-ticket coaching and brand programmes.



What You'll Be Doing:

- Managing Instagram DMs daily across Genflow, Creator College, Shan's accounts, and other creator brand profiles within the portfolio

- Opening and progressing conversations in a natural, brand-aligned way that reflects each account's tone and audience

- Selling Genflow products directly through DM conversations, including digital courses, programmes, and community memberships

- Qualifying leads and booking them into the sales team's calendar for high-ticket calls, where closers will take over

- Following up consistently with warm leads to maximise conversions and show-up rates

- Maintaining accurate tracking across leads, sales, bookings, and conversions

- Sharing insights with the sales team to sharpen messaging and improve results across all accounts



What We're Looking For:

- Excellent written communication - clear, confident, and human

- Comfortable navigating both direct sales and appointment-setting conversations

- Solid understanding of Instagram culture, DMs, and creator-space dynamics

- Able to handle objections calmly and keep conversations moving toward a close

- Self-motivated, reliable, and consistent with follow-through

- Able to adapt tone and voice across multiple brand accounts

- Receptive to coaching and committed to continuous improvement



Nice to Have:

- Prior experience as a DM setter, sales rep, or VA

- Exposure to high-ticket offers, digital products, or creator and education brands

- Familiarity with lead qualification frameworks or sales funnels

- Experience managing multiple social accounts simultaneously



Compensation:

- Competitive base pay

- Commission on direct sales and qualified booked calls

- Performance bonuses for top converters



What to Expect:

- Daily DM coverage across Genflow and creator brand accounts (shift hours confirmed at onboarding)

- Fast response times during active hours

- Weekly targets across bookings and direct sales

- A team invested in your development and progression



To apply for the role please fill out the form:

title: Full Stack Developer & AI Automation Engineer (n8n, Dify, Notion, Teams, GHL)
description:
We are a small Australian outdoor travel company looking for a full stack developer with extensive experience in AI automation. We want to implement a range of automations, AI agents and workflows to improve operational efficiency. 



Key tools include:

- Self-hosted n8n instance

- Self-hosted Dify instance

- Vector database (e.g. Pinecone)

- Notion

- Microsoft Teams (and broader 365 apps)

- GoHighLevel

- Tally

- Self-hosted Zammad instance



This is a developer role, not just connecting nodes in n8n. You must have extensive experience with RAG, vector databases, Docker containers, MCP servers etc. 



This role will start with a fixed cost initial project based on an agreed scope (initial budget of ~$2000AUD). After this project is complete, it will transition to a monthly retainer (plus an hourly rate for extra work). 



Whilst we have an initial build in mind, we are open to be guided by your experience and suggestions for the exacts tools used. 



To apply, please attach your resume and submit a short video introduction about yourself (1-2 minutes) addressing the following points:



1. Start the video by saying 'Hello Maddie' - so we know it's not a generic video :)

2. A brief introduction about yourself.

3. What tools you like to use to build AI agents and automations.

4. A recent example of a tough project you finished.



When submitting an application, please use the subject line “[your name] + [your favourite IDE]” :)



We look forward to working with you!

title: UI/UX Designer - HubSpot CMS
description:

$1,400–$2,000 USD/month

Project Based

Perth hours (same timezone as Philippines)

Immediate start



We're Lifewood — Australia's premium timber flooring company in Perth. $7M revenue, 22 years, 8,500+ installations. We run HubSpot Enterprise and we take digital marketing seriously. We're looking for a HubSpot CMS designer who thinks in conversions, not just pixels.

 templates, blog

 and social media messages.

,, Zappier, Notion, and other tools for recapture/marketing

content:

title: Virtual Assistant - Marketing and Administration
description:
Virtual Assistant | Marketing & Administration Support

Overview

Our Australian based building company is seeking a highly organised and capable Virtual Assistant to support our marketing and administration functions. This role is integral to maintaining structure, consistency and communication across the business, with a strong focus on marketing execution and internal systems.

You will work closely with the director and management team in a fast-paced, professional environment, with the opportunity to grow alongside the business.

We offer flexible working times, your birthday off as a paid holiday, training and support for your growth and development, the ability to grow with the team and working from home. 

To start we are looking for 20 hours per week with likely increase to required hours as skill ability is proven and work requirements increase. 

 

Position Requirements

• Strong written and verbal English communication skills

• Proficient in Microsoft Office including Excel and Word 

• Familiar with MacMail 

• Experience with Canva for content creation

• Experience with creating Looms 

• Working knowledge of WordPress

• Proficient in systems to manage social media marketing platforms

• High level of organisation and attention to detail

• Ability to manage multiple tasks and priorities efficiently

• Positive attitude and adaptable to change

• Strong problem-solving ability and initiative

• Good practical judgement and common sense

• Ability to identify issues and work towards solutions and continuously improve processes

 

Key Responsibilities

Marketing Execution

• Execute marketing tasks in line with the quarterly strategy

• Manage and maintain the marketing calendar across all platforms

• Schedule and publish content across social media, website and
 channels

• Coordinate and publish monthly newsletters

• Assist with content creation including social media posts and video editing

• Update the website content as required

Customer Relationship Management

• Manage and maintain a customer relationship management system for all incoming leads

• Ensure all enquiries are captured, tracked and followed up within required timeframes

• Manage and implement “keep warm”
 and engagement sequences

• Conduct monthly outreach to prospective clients

• Assist with appointment setting and client communication

Administration & Systems

• Provide personal assistant support to the director and management team

• Manage
 correspondence and general administrative tasks

• Assist with data entry across various business systems (Xero, Buildexact) 

• Create and maintain templates, documents and internal systems

• Upload invoices to Xero reporting & follow up missing invoices

• Maintain a structured filing system in Dropbox

Systems & Process Development

• Record and organise Loom videos for internal training, processes and procedures

• Create standard operating procedures for regular tasks

• Assist in developing and improving internal workflows and systems

Meetings & Coordination

• Book, confirm and coordinate weekly tea
etings

• Prepare meeting agendas in advance 

• Record meeting minutes and ensure all actions are tracked and followed-up 

• Support weekly alignment processes with management

 

KPI 1 – Marketing Qualified Leads

• Target: Minimum 3 qualified 5 star leads per month

• All leads captured, tracked and followed up with no gaps in communication

KPI 2 – Marketing Execution

• Marketing calendar maintained and executed weekly

• Content, newsletters and website updates delivered on schedule

KPI 3 – CRM & Client Engagement

• All enquiries responded to within agreed timeframes

• CRM kept fully up to date with accurate tracking and notes

• Monthly outreach and engagement activities completed

KPI 4 – Meetings & Reporting

• Weekly meetings coordinated and documented

• Weekly reporting completed with clear summary of performance and priorities

KPI 5 – Administration & Systems

• Administrative tasks completed within agreed timeframes

• Invoices processed weekly and systems maintained accurately

• SOPs and internal systems continuously improved

 

Weekly Reporting

• Submit a weekly Loom video outlining progress, key outcomes and any challenges

• Provide a summary of performance across marketing platforms and client engagement

• Maintain and update weekly KPI reporting and CEO scorecard in alignment with business priorities

 

Preferred Experience

• Experience in residential construction or building industry

• Familiarity with Xero and Buildxact or similar estimating software

• Experience with all social media platforms and marketing platforms

 

Application Requirements

If interested, please submit a written application of 2 pages maximum and a short video outlining:

• Why you are interested in the position

• How your experience aligns with the position requirements and key responsibilities

• Your desired income

• Areas where you may require further training

title: SEO Copywriter for Content Website
description:
Job Title: SEO Copywriter for Content Website



Overview

We are seeking a skilled and professional SEO copywriter to create engaging, high-quality content for an content website. The ideal candidate understands how to balance persuasive writing with search engine optimization, while maintaining discretion, professionalism, and compliance with content guidelines.



Responsibilities



Write compelling, original blog articles and website content tailored to an senior audience

Create SEO-optimized content based on keyword research and content briefs

Develop landing pages, city/location pages, and service descriptions

Craft engaging meta titles, descriptions, and on-page SEO elements

Maintain a consistent tone that is sensual, discreet, and brand-appropriate

Ensure all content is unique, plagiarism-free, and aligned with platform policies

Collaborate on content strategy and suggest topics to improve organic traffic

Update and optimize existing content for better rankings and user engagement



Requirements



Proven experience in SEO copywriting (portfolio required)

Strong understanding of on-page SEO (keywords, search intent, internal linking, etc.)

Ability to write confidently for themed content without being explicit or inappropriate

Excellent English writing, grammar, and editing skills

Familiarity with SEO tools (e.g., Ahrefs, SEMrush, SurferSEO, or similar)

Ability to meet deadlines and manage multiple projects

Understanding of privacy, discretion, and sensitive content handling



Preferred Qualifications



Experience writing for related industries

Knowledge of international SEO and location-based content strategies

Basic understanding of content marketing funnels and conversion-focused writing



What We’re Looking For



A writer who can combine creativity with data-driven SEO strategies

Someone comfortable working within a niche industry while maintaining professionalism

Attention to detail and the ability to adapt tone depending on the audience and region



Project Scope



Ongoing work (weekly or monthly content needs)

Blog posts (800–1500 words)

Website pages and landing pages

Content optimization and rewriting tasks



How to Apply

Please include:



Relevant writing samples

Brief overview of your SEO experience and tools you use

Availability and turnaround time



Note: Discretion and professionalism are essential for this role. All work must comply with applicable laws and platform guidelines.

title: WhatsApp Lead Generation & Outreach Specialist
description:
Job Title: WhatsApp Lead Generation & Outreach Specialist



Overview

We are looking for an experienced WhatsApp Lead Generation Specialist to help scale our outreach and customer acquisition efforts. The ideal candidate understands how to use WhatsApp as a marketing and communication channel to generate leads, build relationships, and drive conversions—while maintaining professionalism and respecting platform policies.



Responsibilities



Execute WhatsApp-based outreach campaigns to generate qualified leads

Initiate and manage conversations with prospects in a natural, engaging manner

Follow structured messaging scripts while adapting tone based on responses

Maintain organized records of conversations, leads, and follow-ups

Segment and manage contact lists effectively for targeted outreach

Optimize messaging strategies to improve response and conversion rates

Report on campaign performance (response rates, conversions, lead quality)

Collaborate to refine outreach strategies and messaging templates



Requirements



Proven experience with WhatsApp marketing, lead generation, or direct outreach

Strong communication and persuasion skills

Ability to handle high-volume messaging while maintaining quality interactions

Familiarity with CRM tools or lead tracking systems

Understanding of messaging best practices and customer engagement

Ability to work independently and meet outreach targets



Preferred Qualifications



Experience with WhatsApp Business tools or automation platforms

Background in sales, customer support, or digital marketing

Experience working with international audiences

Knowledge of compliance and anti-spam best practices



What We’re Looking For



Someone who can balance volume with personalization

A results-driven mindset focused on lead generation and conversions

Strong organizational skills and attention to detail

Professional and respectful communication style



Project Scope



Ongoing or campaign-based work

Daily outreach targets and performance benchmarks

Opportunity for long-term collaboration based on results



How to Apply

Please include:



Description of your experience with WhatsApp outreach or lead generation

Examples of campaigns or results you’ve achieved

Tools or systems you’ve used

Your availability and expected compensation



Important: All outreach must comply with WhatsApp policies and applicable regulations. Ethical, permission-based communication is required.

title: Weekend Home Care Recruiter
description:
*DO NOT APPLY IF YOU DO NOT HAVE ANY RECRUITING EXPERIENCE*



INSTRUCTIONS TO APPLY:

1.) Submit Resume.

2.) Send in your 30 second introduction video (talk about yourself and past experience as a Retention specialist).

3.) Provide a list of a 3 professional references from your previous roles, and their contact information 



Position Summary:

The Weekend Recruiter serves as a key point of contact for caregiver applicants, ensuring a smooth and professional hiring experience. This role focuses on conducting interviews, screening candidates, collecting required documents and certifications, and maintaining consistent communication with applicants. The recruiter plays a critical role in supporting staffing needs by identifying qualified caregivers and reporting progress to the Recruiting Manager.



Key Responsibilities:

- Applicant Screening & Interviews: Conduct phone and/or video interviews with caregiver applicants to assess experience, communication skills, and overall fit for the agency. Guide applicants through the hiring process and answer any questions they may have.

- Candidate Communication: Maintain consistent communication with applicants throughout the hiring process. Provide updates, next steps, and ensure a positive and professional candidate experience.

- Document & Certification Collection: Collect and review all required documents, including certifications, IDs, and onboarding paperwork. Ensure all applicant files are complete, accurate, and compliant before moving forward.

- Pipeline Management: Track applicant progress and maintain organized records within the agency’s system. Follow up with candidates who have incomplete items or are pending next steps.

- Collaboration with Recruiting Manager: Provide regular updates on applicant flow, interview outcomes, and hiring progress. Escalate any concerns or issues related to candidate quality or onboarding delays.



Administrative Duties:

- Maintain accurate and up-to-date applicant records.

- Document interview notes, applicant status, and collected documentation.

- Prepare simple reports or updates on weekend recruiting activity.



Skills & Qualifications:

- SPEAKS FLUENT ENGLISH

-Strong communication and interpersonal skills.

- Ability to conduct structured interviews and assess candidate fit.

- Organized with strong attention to detail and follow-through.

- Comfortable handling sensitive information with professionalism.

- Previous recruiting, staffing, or customer service experience preferred (home care experience is a plus).



Performance Indicators That We Will Track:

- Number of interviews conducted

- Applicant conversion rate (interview ? hire)

- Timeliness of document collection and onboarding completion

- Accuracy and completeness of applicant records

- Communication responsiveness with applicants



Reports To:

Recruiting Manager

HR

Operations

Help implement and monitor standard operating procedures (SOPs)

Prepare agendas, take notes, and follow up on action items when necessary fro
etings

Minimum 2-3 years experience in HR/Operations required.

title: Transaction Coordinator
description:
As a Real Estate Transaction Coordinator, you will be responsible for overseeing and coordinating all aspects of real estate transactions from contract to closing. Your meticulous attention to detail, strong communication skills, and in-depth knowledge of real estate processes will be essential in maintaining a high level of client satisfaction and operational efficiency.



Responsibilities:



Transaction Management: Manage and oversee the entire lifecycle of real estate transactions, ensuring all parties are informed and deadlines are met.



Document Preparation: Prepare, review, and organize all necessary transaction documents, contracts, disclosures, and paperwork accurately and promptly.



Communication: Serve as the main point of contact for clients, agents, lenders, escrow officers, and other relevant parties, maintaining clear and open communication throughout the transaction.



Coordination: Schedule and coordinate inspections, appraisals, title searches, and other necessary activities to facilitate a smooth transaction process.



Compliance: Ensure transactions adhere to all local, state, and federal regulations, as well as company policies and procedures.



Problem Solving: Identify and address any potential issues that may arise during the transaction process, finding effective solutions to keep transactions on track.



Data Management: Maintain accurate and organized transaction records, utilizing appropriate software and tools.



Client Support: Provide exceptional customer service to clients, addressing their inquiries, concerns, and needs throughout the transaction.



Collaboration: Collaborate closely with agents, brokers, and other tea
mbers to ensure a seamless and efficient transaction process.



Continuous Learning: Stay updated on industry trends, regulations, and best practices to enhance your expertise and contribute to the team's success.





Qualifications:



Real Estate Experience: minimum 2 years of experience as a Real Estate Transaction Coordinator or similar role within the real estate industry.



Knowledge: Solid understanding of real estate transaction processes, contracts, and regulations.



Communication: Excellent verbal and written communication skills, with the ability to communicate effectively with clients and various stakeholders.



Organization: Strong organizational skills, attention to detail, and the ability to manage multiple tasks simultaneously.



Technology: Proficiency in real estate software, document management systems, and Microsoft Office Suite.  Proficiency with Skyslope is preferred.



Customer Focus: Dedication to providing exceptional customer service and ensuring a positive client experience.



Team Player: A collaborative attitude with the ability to work effectively within a team-oriented environment.



Adaptability: Flexibility to adapt to changing priorities and handle unexpected challenges in a fast-paced environment.

title: YouTube-to-Reels Content Curator — 60,000 PHP/Month
description:
BENEFITS



- Full-time position: 7.5 hours/day

- Schedule: Monday to Friday, 8 AM – 5 PM (Philippine Time)

- 60,000 PHP/month after the first month + performance-based bonuses

- 40,000 PHP during the first (test) month

- Paid every two weeks via Wise

- Fully remote position

- Young, supportive team

- Clear growth path with opportunities to expand your role



ROLE OVERVIEW



You will extract short, high-value clips from a YouTube channel.



Your main responsibility is to:



- Watch long-form YouTube videos

- Deeply understand our target audience (pain points, goals, objections)

- Identify valuable, engaging, and on-brand 
nts

- Select clips that align with our short-form SOPs

- Turn them into 15–45 second Instagram Reels

- Add clean and accurate subtitles

- Ensure smooth audio

- Deliver 2–3 clips per day



You are not creating content from scratch.

You are selecting and packaging the best parts — strategically.



TASKS



- Clip 2–3 short videos per day (15–45 seconds each)

- Follow our short-form SOPs consistently

- Select clips based on audience relevance and brand alignment

- Clearly explain your thought process when submitting clips:

- Ensure subtitles are accurate and easy to understand

- Ensure a smooth audio experience

- Review your work carefully before submitting



Note: There may be additional small tasks as needed.



REQUIREMENTS



- Excellent English skills (C1 or above)

- Strong understanding of audience psychology and content-market fit

- Ability to follow and execute based on SOPs

- Previous experience in short-form editing or video clipping

- Strong judgment for identifying valuable, on-brand content

- Detail-oriented with critical thinking skills

- Ability to work independently while staying communicative

- Efficient and solution-focused mindset



HOW TO APPLY



ROUND 1: Fill in the application form and record a Loom introducing yourself:




/to/v0OA9cFs



Important note: Put “VC” + [Your Name & Family Name] in the “Name” field.



ROUND 2: Paid test task. You will receive long-form videos and create short clips in the same style.



MORE ABOUT US



Young Publisher:

title: YouTube AI Content Creator
description:
We are seeking a YouTube AI Content Creator who can leverage AI Agent tools to research, collect data, and transform insights into engaging, high-quality videos. The ideal candidate will have a strong sense of storytelling, visual creativity, and hands-on experience in video editing and channel management.



Key Responsibilities

* Use AI Agent tools to automate workflows, streamline research, and organize data efficiently

* Handle graphic design, scriptwriting, footage collection, AI voiceovers, video editing, and background music integration

* Create eye-catching thumbnails, SEO-optimized descriptions, and tags to boost visibility and engagement

* Set up and manage a YouTube channel, including profile design, cover art, logo, intro/outro, and ongoing content updates

* Ensure all content complies with YouTube’s policies and community guidelines



Qualifications

* Proven experience managing and growing YouTube channels

* Strong understanding of AI Agent tools, YouTube analytics, and content optimization

* Proficiency in video editing software (e.g., Premiere Pro, Final Cut, CapCut, or similar)

* Knowledge of SEO strategies and audience engagement techniques

* Excellent attention to detail, creativity, and communication skills



If you’re a creative professional who can blend AI innovation with YouTube storytelling, we’d love to work with you.

title: Real Estate Prospector (200+ Dials Daily | High Performance Only)
description:
If you’ve never done 200+ dials per day, this is not for you.



We are building a high-performance real estate acquisitions machine. This role is for someone who can execute at a high level inside a structured system, not someone looking to “try” cold calling.



Over the last 6 months, we’ve:



Generated 1500+ leads

Built a consistent pipeline across NJ markets

Created a system where prospectors feed directly into trained Lead Managers and Closers



Your job is simple:

???? Create conversations and route opportunity.



WHAT YOU ACTUALLY DO

200+ dials per day minimum

Leave voi
 on EVERY attempt

Send a text after EVERY attempt

Follow our script + qualification process

Identify motivation, timeline, condition, and price

Log EVERY call correctly in DataSift CRM

Route warm leads immediately to Lead Manager



No missed logs. No shortcuts. No guessing.



THIS IS A SYSTEM, NOT JUST CALLING



You will be trained on:



Seller Intake process

Lead qualification framework

CRM tagging + pipeline movement

Appointment setting system

Real estate conversation flow



You are part of a machine that turns calls into deals.



DAILY WORKFLOW

Review call list from Data Manager

Start dialing 

Track calls and activity

Follow SOPs for:

Seller Intake

Lead Qualification

CRM tagging

Lead routing

Send warm leads to Lead Manager SAME DAY

Complete end-of-day reporting





SCHEDULE (STRICT)

Sunday: 10am–6pm EST

Monday: 12pm–2pm EST

Tuesday: OFF / 2pm–8pm EST

Wednesday: OFF / 2pm–8pm EST

Thursday: 1pm–8pm EST

Friday: 1pm–8pm EST

Saturday: 10am–6pm EST



You must consistently perform during these hours.



ONBOARDING (FIRST WEEK)

System + CRM training

Review SOPs (Seller Intake, Qualification, Tagging, CRM workflows)

CRM training

1-on-1 with Lead Manager

Team integration

We train fast. We expect execution immediately.



You are directly feeding deals to closings.



CRM

Dialer

Seller Tracker

Google Calendar

KPIs (NON-NEGOTIABLE)

200+ dials/day

100% CRM accuracy

Same-day lead handoff

Consistent activity tracking



WHO THIS IS FOR

You’ve handled 150–200+ dials daily before

You are disciplined with CRM tracking

You don’t slow down after rejection

You follow systems exactly

You care about output, not excuses



WHO THIS IS NOT FOR

Beginners

Low-energy callers

People who skip CRM updates

Anyone who needs constant supervision

COMPENSATION

$750/month

Performance bonuses tied to deals



One deal can cover months of salary. We reward production.



IMPORTANT RULE (AUTO-DISQUALIFY)



DO NOT:



 us

Call us

Message outside OnlineJobs



If you do, you will be disqualified immediately.













HOW TO APPLY



Apply through OnlineJobs ONLY



Include a 1–2 minute voice recording

In your recording:

Introduce yourself

Explain your dialing experience

Show your energy

Also include in your application:

Your level of English fluency

Any additional languages you speak



We are actively looking for multilingual callers for multiple markets, especially:



Spanish

Mandarin

Cantonese

Hindi

Urdu

Korean

Tagalog



No voice recording = no review.

title: Acquisition Manager (Paid Media & Digital Growth) Remote
description:
THE OPPORTUNITY





Are you a strategic powerhouse who knows how to buy growth? KaliHome Builders is looking for an Acquisition Manager focused specifically on Online Ad Spend. Unlike traditional real estate sourcing, this role is about mastering the digital landscape to acquire high-intent remodeling leads. You will own the strategy, execution, and optimization of our paid marketing channels to fuel our sales pipeline.



WHAT YOU’LL DO:

? Strategic Ad Spend: Allocate and manage a significant monthly budget across Google Ads, Meta, and Local Services Ads (LSA) to hit aggressive lead-gen targets.

? Master the Funnel: Build, test, and scale paid acquisition funnels that convert cold traffic into qualified residential remodeling appointments.

? Data-Driven Sourcing: Analyze "Cost Per Lead" (CPL) and "Cost Per Acquisition" (CPA) daily to ensure we are buying the highest quality traffic at the best possible price.

? Creative Strategy: Partner with designers to develop high-converting ad copy and visual assets that stop the scroll and drive action.

? Performance Reporting: Provide transparent, high-level reporting on how every dollar spent translates into revenue for the company.



WHAT YOU BRING:

? Proven Performance: 2+ years of experience in Paid Digital Acquisition, specifically managing high-velocity lead generation (Home Improvement or Service Industry experience preferred).

? Platform Expertise: Advanced mastery of Google Ads (Search/LSA), Meta Ads Manager, and emerging paid social channels.

? Analytical Precision: Expert at using GA4, Google Tag Manager, and CRM data to track the full "Click-to-Contract" journey.

? Budget Stewardship: Experience managing and optimizing monthly spends of $5k with a focus on ROI, not just traffic.

? Conversion Obsession: A deep understanding of landing page optimization and A/B testing frameworks.



WHY JOIN US?

? Competitive Compensation: High base salary (DOE) plus performance-based bonuses tied to acquisition efficiency.

? Impact: You are the engine of our growth. Your success directly dictates the company's scaling potential.

title: Experienced Medical Biller
description:
I am a Virtual Assistant posting this position on behalf of our dermatology clinic. We have a dedicated team of VAs, some of whom have been with us for over a year, reflecting our commitment to growth and long-term opportunities. We offer annual raises, paid lunches and breaks, and a collaborative, supportive environment.



We are seeking an organized and detail-oriented Experienced Medical Biller to join our team. You will manage medical billing and coding tasks to ensure accurate and timely reimbursements. Dermatology experience is a plus but not required. Candidates must have at least two years of medical billing experience and be available for 20 hours per week during Pacific Time hours. You can work 40 hours if you’re open to other roles (answering phones).



Key Responsibilities:

Prepare and submit claims to insurance companies, ensuring accuracy and compliance.

Review and resolve claim denials and rejections, working with insurance companies for prompt payment.

Maintain accurate patient billing records and update patient information.

Assist patients with billing inquiries, insurance coverage, and payment options.

Collaborate with the healthcare team to support seamless billing and coding processes.

Handle ad hoc administrative tasks related to billing and revenue cycle management.

Maintain HIPAA compliance and confidentiality at all times.

As you become proficient, opportunities to take on additional responsibilities will arise, with the potential to grow into a full-time role



Requirements

Minimum 2 years of experience as a medical biller; dermatology experience preferred but not mandatory.

Strong knowledge of medical billing and coding, including CPT, ICD-10, and HCPCS codes.

Excellent attention to detail and organizational skills.

Ability to work 20 hours per week during Pacific Time hours.

Proficiency with medical billing software and EMR/EHR systems.

Strong communication skills and a customer-focused attitude.

Ability to handle ad hoc tasks and multitask in a fast-paced environment.

Willingness to be cross-trained in additional tasks such as patient scheduling and answering phone calls.



Trial Period

Candidates will undergo a one-week paid trial period to evaluate performance, workflow compatibility, and overall fit for the role

This trial also allows candidates to assess if the position aligns with their expectations and availability

Continued engagement or employment will be determined based on mutual fit and performance during the trial period



Technical Requirements:

Laptop or desktop with 8GB RAM, Core i5 or above.

USB headset with noise-cancellation feature.

Willingness to use video and conduct screen shares during shifts.

Hubstaff (time tracking).

Main internet speed: at least 75 Mbps (wired connection preferred)



Application Instructions

To apply, please submit the following in a single Google Drive folder (PDFs only) with view access enabled:

1) Updated resume

2) Screenshot of typing speed test (60–80 WPM minimum)

3) Screenshot of internet speed test (minimum 75 Mbps)

4) Screenshot or list of your full work setup and specifications



Important: To ensure you’ve read the full job description, please include “MEDICAL BILLING DERM” in the subject line of your application.

title: Fractional Marketing Operations Manager (GHL Enforcer) – Executive Coaching Program
description:
The Role:

I am an executive coach focused on high-ticket B2B sales. I have invested in a major marketing program (
) and am using GoHighLevel (GHL). I need an Architect/Enforcer to act as my "Fractional COO/Marketing Ops Lead" to manage the implementation, police the vendors, and ensure lead quality.



You are my buffer. You will deal with the "Ads Guy," the GHL specialists, and the Account Managers so that I only have to focus on coaching and closing.



Key Responsibilities:

Vendor Accountability: Act as the primary contact for the program account managers. Attend meetings on my behalf, audit their claims, and push back assertively when lead quality is low or deadlines are missed.



Training Translation: Watch program training/strategy videos, extract the "must-do" action items, and either implement them or manage the GHL team to ensure they are done correctly.



System Audit: Review our GoHighLevel (GHL) setup. Ensure workflows, tracking (CAPI/Pixel), and automation are high-caliber and formatted for an Executive audience (not "get rich quick" style).



Lead Quality Control: Review incoming leads daily. If quality drops, diagnose the cause (messaging, targeting, or friction) and force the ads team to fix it.



Weekly Executive Reporting: Deliver a simple 1-page "Friday Report" featuring:

Ad Spend vs. Revenue Signal (Green/Yellow/Red)

Lead Quality (Qualified vs. Unqualified)

Booked Calls vs. Show Rates

Key bottlenecks for the following week.



Must-Haves:

GHL Mastery: You must know GoHighLevel well enough to spot errors in workflows and tracking within minutes.

Direct Response Experience: You understand high-ticket funnels ($5k - $15k offers).

Assertive Communication: You are comfortable holding people accountable and stating, "This isn't good enough for an executive audience," without being prompted.



Native/Fluent English: Since you are representing me to US-based vendors, your communication must be professional and sharp.

Budget & Hours:

Hours: 5–10 hours per week to start.

Rate: Competitive based on experience ($20–$35/hr depending on region and seniority).

title: Operations & Sales Growth Executive Assistant
description:
About Us

The Event Engineer helps entrepreneurs scale to 7-figures and beyond. Led by Lisa Barry, we build high-converting event systems and world-class client experiences. Our mission is helping visionary founders grow wealth that fuels meaningful change.



The Role

This is not a "task-taker" role; this is a high-level partnership. As the Executive Assistant, your primary mission is to protect Lisa’s time, energy, and focus. You are the gatekeeper of the brand and the architect of the founder's daily life. 



While you handle high-level EA duties, you will also manage the "backend" systems (GoHighLevel & ClickUp) and AI automations that keep the 7-figure engine running smoothly behind the scenes. You are the bridge between brand exposure and revenue.



---



1. Primary Responsibility: Executive Support & Gatekeeping



Zone of Genius Protection: You own Lisa’s calendar. You don’t just book meetings; you architect her week to ensure "Deep Work" for software development and high-level sales is never interrupted.

Inbox Zen & Triage: You are the first line of defense. You filter, label, and respond to 80% of incoming communication so Lisa only sees what truly requires her eyes.

High-EQ Representation: Whether in the DMs or via
, you represent a premium brand. You interact with high-level clients and partners with warmth, professionalism, and absolute precision.

The Digital Housekeeper: You ensure Lisa’s digital environment (Google Drive, Slack, Inbox) is organized, clutter-free, and optimized for speed.





2. Secondary Responsibility: Systems & AI (Behind the Scenes)



ClickUp Command Center (Non-Negotiable): You manage the team’s workflow. You ensure the Creative Architect, Tech Guy, and Developer are on track, using ClickUp Automations to move tasks through to the "Wednesday Drop."

GHL Pipeline Mastery (Non-Negotiable): You ensure the CRM is 100?curate. You manage lead tags and nurture sequences, ensuring no "Golden Opportunity" ever falls through the cracks.

AI Integration: You leverage AI to make the business faster. This includes using AI for meeting transcriptions, instantly turning "voice notes" into formatted SOPs, and overseeing AI-driven lead responses.



---------------------------------------------------------------
. Who You Are



The Proactive Partner: You think three steps ahead. You solve problems before the founder knows they exist.

Systems-Minded: You get a dopamine hit from a clean CRM, a perfectly structured ClickUp board, and a zero-inbox.

Owner Mentality: You don't wait for a to-do list. You see a gap in the business and you build a bridge.

Flawless Communicator: Your written English is impeccable, persuasive, professional, and polished.



---------------------------------------------------------------
. Qualifications & Skills



2–3+ Years as an EA or Ops Manager for a high-ticket coach, consultant, or agency.

GoHighLevel (GHL) Proficiency: Experience managing leads, pipelines, and workflows.

ClickUp Experience: Ability to build and manage complex project boards and automations.

AI Literacy: Comfortable using AI tools (ChatGPT, Claude, Otter, etc.) to automate repetitive admin tasks.



---------------------------------------------------------------
. Application Requirements



Please provide the following to be considered for Phase 1:

1.  Resume: A brief history of your experience in operations and sales support.

2.  DISC Profile: Please include your results (D% I% S% C%).

3.  Rate your proficiency (1–10) with ClickUp, GoHighLevel, and AI tools.

4.  Tell us about one specific time you "saved the day" for a founder by fixing a system or managing a chaotic inbox.



---------------------------------------------------------------
. Work Arrangement & Compensation



Remote: 9am – 5pm AEDT (Australian Eastern Time)

Hours: 40 Hours / Week

Compensation: $1,000 AUD / month (Full-Time)

title: Digital Marketing Specialist
description:
Please apply through the below link: 
=



Compensation: $1,300 – $1,800 / month USD 



Contractual | California business hours | Compensation is based on experience, depth of B2B SEO/content expertise, and demonstrated results. There is strong potential for compensation growth based on performance and impact within the first 3–6 months. 



ABOUT CDMS 



CDMS is a B2B Environmental, Health & Safety (EHS) services company. We work directly with manufacturing and industrial clients, helping them stay compliant, safe, and operationally sound. 



We have strong technical expertise and a clear brand. This role is about turning that expertise into a consistent, credible, and results-driven digital presence. 



THE ROLE 



This is a senior contractual role, not a management position, but one that requires you to operate independently and with sound judgment. You will own our digital marketing output end-to-end: SEO strategy and implementation, content creation, LinkedIn presence, and brand collateral. You will deeply learn our voice, our clients, and our industry, and use that knowledge to build a presence that earns trust in a technical, compliance-driven space. 



You will work closely with our leadership team, who will brief you directly from client conversations and field intelligence. Your job is to transform that raw material into polished, on-brand content that sounds like us: credible, clear, and grounded in real EHS work. 



If you have ever built a B2B content engine from a standing start and you understand what it takes to earn authority in a niche technical industry, this role was written for you. 



WHAT SUCCESS LOOKS LIKE (3–6 MONTHS) 



Grow LinkedIn presence by 50%–100%, with a focus on relevant, industry-aligned followers 

Increase qualified inbound leads by 30%–70%, supported by consistent content and targeted outreach 

Improve organic website traffic by 20%–40% through SEO optimization and new content 

Establish a consistent, high-quality content cadence across blog, LinkedIn, and newsletters 

Build an initial pipeline of case studies and thought leadership content based on real client work 

Deliver clear monthly reporting with actionable recommendations - not just data 



Note: These targets are supported by timely input from leadership, tool access (Ahrefs, etc.), and shared alignment on priorities. We treat this as a two-way commitment. 



WHAT YOU'LL DO 



SEO 



Conduct and maintain a full SEO audit using Ahrefs; implement and track on-page optimizations 



Perform ongoing keyword research and monitor rankings across target terms 



Identify content gaps and build a topic roadmap based on search demand and competitive analysis 



Own SEO reporting — surface insights to leadership in plain language with clear action items 



Content & Ghostwriting 



Write blog posts, LinkedIn articles, and newsletters in the voice of our leadership team 



Turn client conversations and project outcomes (fed to you by our team) into compelling case studies 



Curate RSS feeds from EHS, manufacturing, and safety industry sources; develop timely, opinionated content based on those topics 



Maintain a consistent editorial calendar across all channels 



Develop and refine our brand voice guide over time — so the standard is documented, not just in your head 



LinkedIn Management 



Manage our leadership team's LinkedIn presence — posting, commenting, and connecting on their behalf 



Engage daily with content from existing clients and prospects in the EHS and manufacturing space 



Grow our LinkedIn network through targeted, strategic outreach 



Track follower growth, engagement rate, and lead signals — report monthly with clear takeaways 



Collateral & Internal Branding 



Apply our existing brand guidelines to materials provided by our technical team — one pagers, site posters, and laminated sheets for client locations 



Coordinate with our onsite admin assistant for printing and lamination, and with the EHS team for client delivery 



Keep all materials current and on-brand 



WHAT WE'RE LOOKING FOR 



4+ years of B2B content marketing or digital marketing experience 



Expert-level SEO with demonstrated ranking results — Ahrefs is your daily driver 



Proven ghostwriting for C-suite or senior executives in B2B industries 



Experience managing full editorial calendars independently, with minimal direction 



Strong track record growing LinkedIn presence for a company or executive 



Excellent written English — you catch errors others miss and you have range 



Canva or basic design skills to adapt brand templates 



Proficient in WordPress or equivalent CMS 



Comfortable with AI writing tools to accelerate output — without sacrificing voice or accuracy 



Self-directed: you manage your own priorities and deadlines without hand-holding 



NICE TO HAVE 



Familiarity with EHS, safety, manufacturing, or industrial compliance industries 



Experience with newsletter platforms (ActiveCampaign or similar) 



Background in managing or mentoring junior content contributors 



WORK SETUP 



Engagement Type: Independent Contractor 



Schedule: California business hours (PST/PDT) 



Location: Remote — Philippines-based candidates preferred 



Equipment: You provide your own setup; stable internet required 



Tools: Ahrefs, WordPress, Canva, LinkedIn — we provide access on hire 



Next Step: To move forward in the hiring process, please complete the assessment below. Once finished, you’ll receive a second assessment. Completion of both is required for consideration.

title: Sales Virtual Assistant / Appointment Setter
description:
**Important – Read This Job Post Carefully**

! DO NOT APPLY IF YOU ARE NOT FLUENT IN ENGLISH ! 



We are a fast-growing home service company based in California looking to hire a reliable and motivated Virtual Assistant to help manage incoming leads, customer communication, outbound calls, and appointment scheduling.



Our industry is extremely competitive. Customers often contact multiple companies at the same time, and the company that responds first and communicates most professionally usually wins the job.



Because of this, speed, persistence, and professionalism are extremely important.



Your role will be to contact new leads, communicate with customers, follow up on previous inquiries, and schedule technician appointments.



You will also assist with basic data entry and updating customer information inside our CRM system.



You do not need previous experience with our software, as we will train you on how to use our CRM, call system, and internal tools.



This position is ideal for someone who is comfortable speaking with customers, organized, and able to work in a fast-paced environment.





Please read this job post in its entirety before applying.



This position requires attention to detail and the ability to follow instructions carefully.



Applications that do not follow the instructions outlined in this post will not be reviewed.



ABSOLUTE REQUIREMENTS (READ BEFORE APPLYING)



DO NOT APPLY if you do not meet these requirements.



We will not review applications that do not meet them.



Applicants must have:



• Strong and reliable internet connection (strong WiFi)

• Backup power in case of power outages

• Excellent English speaking ability with minimal accent

• Quiet and dedicated workspace (no background noise)

• Professional quality headset for customer calls



Strongly recommended:



• Dual monitor setup (two screens) to efficiently manage calls and CRM tasks.



Voice Recording Requirement (MANDATORY)



This role requires speaking with customers on the phone throughout the day.



Because of this, all applicants must submit a voice recording reading the script below.



This recording allows us to evaluate:



• English fluency

• Accent clarity

• Professional tone

• Communication ability



Any application submitted without a voice recording will NOT be reviewed or considered.



Please record yourself reading the script below clearly and naturally, as if you are leaving a voi
 for a real customer.



Record in a quiet environment using your headset.



Voice Recording Script



Please read the following message exactly as written:



Hello, this is (insert your name) calling with Professional Garage Door Services.



Our phone number is
, that’s
.



The reason I’m calling is because you recently submitted an inquiry regarding garage door assistance, and we would like to learn a little more about the issue you are experiencing and how we can help.



Our company specializes in garage door repairs, maintenance, and new garage door installations, and our technicians are equipped to handle most issues the same day.



At the 
nt, we actually have a technician working in your area, and because of that we may be able to provide same-day service depending on availability.



What we normally do is send one of our technicians out to perform a quick inspection of the garage door system, identify the issue, and provide you with a free, no-obligation estimate before any work is done.



During the inspection, the technician may also check torsion springs, track alignment, reinforcement struts, roller assemblies, cable tension, opener limits, and the safety sensor system to determine the exact cause of the problem.



The inspection typically only takes a few minutes and it allows our technician to explain exactly what is going on with the door and what options are available for repair or replacement.



If you would like to schedule a visit from one of our technicians, please give us a call at
, and we will be happy to get that arranged for you.



Once again, that phone number is
.



Thank you very much for your time, and we look forward to assisting you. Have a great day.



Scope of Work



Your responsibilities will include:



• Data entry and updating customer information in our CRM

• Placing outbound calls to new leads

• Following up with previous customers

• Scheduling technician appointments

• Sending text messages and
s to customers

• Updating lead notes and tracking communication history

• Coordinating with our internal team



You will be trained on how to use our CRM, dialing systems, and internal tools.



Work Schedule



This position requires working during U.S. daytime hours, which is night shift in the Philippines.



Shifts are 9 hours in length and will fall between the hours of:



7:00 AM – 9:00 PM PST



Exact shifts will be assigned during the hiring process.



Ideal Candidate



The ideal candidate is someone who:



• Is comfortable speaking with customers on the phone

• Has strong communication skills

• Is organized and detail-oriented

• Can follow instructions carefully

• Works well in a fast-paced environment

• Is reliable and punctual



Compensation



The starting rate for this position is $5 per hour.



That said, we actively reward performance—if you show excellent English, strong communication, and the ability to perform effectively in your role, we can increase your pay to $6 per hour.



We’re also building a long-term team, and there will be opportunities to grow into management positions.



If you demonstrate initiative, leadership qualities, and responsibility, you’ll have the chance to move up and take on a larger role within the company..



Tea
mbers who show strong communication skills, reliability, and the ability to consistently perform in this fast-paced environment will be considered for raises over time.



This position is intended to be a long-term role for the right candidate.



Application Instruction



To confirm that you carefully read the entire job description, please start your application with the word:



Technician



*Applications that do not include this word at the beginning will not be reviewed!*

title: Virtual Assistant — LinkedIn Lead Generation and GoHighLevel Specialist
description:
We are looking for an experienced Virtual Assistant based in the Philippines to support LinkedIn outreach, lead generation and GoHighLevel pipeline management.



This is a part-time ongoing role (15 hours per week) with room to grow as the business scales.



This is not a general admin role.



We are looking for someone who can take ownership of lead generation activity, from outreach through to tracking, follow-up and conversion.



What You Will Be Doing

LinkedIn (Primary)



• Send targeted connection requests to our ideal client profile

• Run DM conversations to move connections towards a free masterclass and paid programme

• Engage meaningfully with relevant posts to build visibility

• Track all outreach activity accurately and keep the pipeline up to date

• Maintain clear visibility of where every lead sits and what the next step is



GoHighLevel (GHL)



• Manage CRM, pipelines, tagging and lead tracking

• Ensure all leads from LinkedIn and Instagram are captured correctly

• Support funnels, landing pages and automation workflows

• Identify and fix gaps in the lead flow where needed



What We Are Looking For



Essential

• Proven experience with LinkedIn outreach and lead generation

• Hands-on experience with GoHighLevel (funnels, CRM, automations)

• Strong written English (UK English)

• Highly organised with strong attention to detail

• Able to work independently and manage your time against clear KPIs



Important

• You can follow a structured process, but you also apply judgement

• You understand that not every contact should be treated the same

• You take ownership of outcomes, not just tasks



HOW TO APPLY

To be considered for this role please send the following:



1. A short cover message: no more than 200 words, telling us why you are the right person for this role

2. Evidence of your GoHighLevel experience: screenshots, portfolio or brief description of what you have built

3. Evidence of your LinkedIn outreach experience: describe a campaign you have run, what the results were and how you tracked activity

4. Your availability during Australian Eastern Standard Time hours

5. Your expected hourly rate in AUD



Applications that do not include all five items above will not be considered.



We are looking for someone who takes initiative, communicates proactively and is results-focused. If that is you, we would love to hear from you.

title: Content & Creative Specialist
description:
About Us

The Event Engineer helps entrepreneurs scale to 7-figures and beyond. Led by Lisa Barry, we build high-converting event systems and world-class client experiences. Our mission: helping visionary founders grow wealth that fuels meaningful change.



The Role

We are seeking a high-level Creative Marketing Architect to own the visual and written soul of our brand. You are responsible for total brand dominance. This role goes beyond social media management; you will architect our front-end aesthetic and create original, scroll-stopping content that establishes Lisa Barry as the preeminent voice in the industry.



Key Responsibilities



1. Native Social Media & Audience Growth



Original Production: Create high-impact Reels, TikToks, and Shorts from scratch. Research trends, develop unique hooks, and execute flawless transitions.

YouTube Mastery: Own the end-to-end production of the weekly 20-minute "Deep Dive." Manage high-retention editing, SEO, and thumbnails that command clicks.

Viral Exposure: Execute the strategy to reach 50,000 – 100,000 followers through elite content and engagement.

Community Connection: Engage daily to build deep relationships using Lisa’s authentic voice.



2. Full-Spectrum Marketing & Asset Design



Product Design: Create high-converting lead magnets, PDF guides, and workbooks that look like 7-figure products.

Funnel Aesthetics: Ensure landing pages and sales funnels in GHL/Canva are visually stunning and premium.

Marketing Collateral: Design pitch decks, onboarding assets, and event-specific graphics (ads, banners, promos).



3. High-Authority Copywriting & Creative Direction



The Written Voice: Ghostwrite the weekly Substack, the "Wednesday Drop" Newsletter, and all social captions. Capture Lisa’s voice perfectly to inspire action.

Brand Guardianship: Ensure every touchpoint—from
 headers to YouTube descriptions—is visually elite.

Innovation: Stay ahead of marketing trends to keep the brand fun and innovative.



Who You Are



A Storyteller: You build authority through original visuals and marketing psychology.

An Owner: You don't wait for a task list. You see gaps and fill them with brilliance.

Design-Obsessed: If it isn’t world-class, it doesn’t get published.

High-Performance: You thrive in fast-paced environments and take pride in hitting growth targets.



Qualifications & Skills



Proven Results: Documented experience growing personal brands to 50k+ followers (metrics required).

Experience: 2–3+ years as a Creator or Marketing Assistant for high-ticket coaches or agencies.

Exceptional Communication: Flawless near-native English with a talent for voice matching.

Technical Mastery: Expert in Video Editing (CapCut/Premiere) and Visual Design (Canva/Photoshop/Figma).

Marketing Savvy: You understand how design impacts funnel conversion.



Application Requirements



Resume: A professional history of your experience.

Portfolio: Links to original social content, voice-matching copy, and marketing designs.

Growth Case Study: Breakdown of an account you grew and the strategy used.

DISC Profile: Please include your results.



Work Arrangement & Compensation



Remote: 9am – 5pm AEDT

Compensation: $1,000 AUD / month (Full-Time)

Long-term Growth: We are looking for team to grow with the brand; as we scale, your role and compensation will scale with it.

title: Children’s Book Designer & Publishing Production Specialist (KDP + IngramSpark)
description:
We are seeking a talented and detail-oriented Children’s Book Designer & Production Specialist to help bring our fully illustrated children’s book series to life.



This role is focused on execution and consistency, not creating concepts from scratch. We already have existing books, established fonts, and a clear design blueprint that you will follow and apply across the series.



You will be responsible for interior layout, typography (typecasting), and cover design (text only), ensuring each book is professionally formatted for both print and digital publishing.



You will work closely alongside our illustrator and author, collaborating to thoughtfully integrate text with artwork and maintain the creative vision of each story. All illustrations will be provided—this role does not include creating or modifying artwork. Your focus will be on placing and styling text within the existing illustrations to create a cohesive, engaging reading experience.



We have 7 books in the series, with 4 books that need to be updated/redesigned first. These initial projects are more straightforward and structured, as the work will primarily involve replacing and adjusting text using updated manuscripts while following an existing layout and design style.



All layouts must be created in Adobe InDesign, and final deliverables should include editable InDesign files (INDD) and print-ready PDFs that meet specifications for platforms such as Amazon KDP and IngramSpark, as well as print-ready versions for in-person sales.



Compensation Structure:



$100–$125 per book for the initial 3–4 books (text updates + existing layout execution)

Potential for adjusted rates for future books based on scope

title: Appointment Setter SDR
description:
Cold Caller – SDR | Imperon | Remote |

Full Commission  Only Role 

Performance Base



Imperon is a startup AI business. We help service-based businesses automate their calls and bookings using AI. The person we hire works directly with the founder, gets real feedback, We're not a big company. We're building something from the ground up and looking for someone who's okay with that.



Cold Call service businesses, introduce what we do, and book demo appointments. That's it. Demos booked is your #1 metric. You'll hit 100 calls per day on your working days and keep simple notes on who you called and what happened. 



What Makes This Role Easy

You're just asking if they want to see something we already made for their business. People say yes out of curiosity alone.



Who This Is For

This role is for someone who is hungry. Someone who does not need a manager breathing down their neck to show up and perform. Someone who sees no base pay and thinks — good, that means no ceiling either. If you have ever bet on yourself and won, this is your role.

	•	You are self-motivated and do not need hand-holding

	•	You are okay with hearing no 90 times a day and still dialing

	•	You want your income to reflect your results — not a fixed salary

	•	You are coachable

	•	You are hungry to grow into a closer role



Who Is Not a Good Fit

	•	You need a fixed salary

	•	Rejection slows you down or kills your 
ntum

	•	You need someone to check on you to stay consistent

	•	You want stability over opportunity

If that is you — this is not your role and that is completely okay.



What we need from you



Preferred 2 years experience in sales ( not required, if hungry)

Clear spoken English and solid written English — non-negotiable

Coachable — we'll give you a script and feedback, and we need you to actually use it

Comfortable making a lot of calls — rejection is part of the job and you're okay with that

Reliable — show up on your days and do the work

has some experience  with google calendar ,crm ,etc

Cold calling experience is a plus, but we'll train the right person

100 calls per day

Target 30 booked appointments per month

Internet seed 40mbps

backup power supply







Pay & schedule

Commission Only 

$10 Per Booked Appointment 

5% of profit on every deal that closes from your appointments (Standard Deal $1,000)

On Target Earnings 625/month

Pay is on the 1st & 15th every month.

Profit share commission (same-day payout option available)

6 hour shifts

Monday-Thursday,  Saturday 

100% remote  quiet space and good internet required



How to apply

Send a 60-second voice memo introducing yourself, just talk naturally and tell us why you want the role. Include a short note or resume with any relevant experience. YOU WILL NOT BE CONSIDERED UNLESS YOU SEND VIDEO.

title: Sales & Tech Representative
description:
We’re Hiring!



Are you a skilled salesperson with a background in gas plumbing and/or electrical work? Do you enjoy helping customers find the right solution while using your technical knowledge? Join our growing team and work with a US online home goods retailer that values expertise, professionalism, and customer satisfaction.





Position:

Sales & Tech Representative – Technical Products (Gas & Electrical Focus)

Location: Remote (Philippines-based)

Schedule: Monday-Friday, 11:00 AM to 7:00 PM EST (40 hours/week)

Salary: Competitive + Performance Bonuses





About the Role:

As a Salesperson, you will assist customers with product selection, provide technical support during the sales process, and close sales with confidence. You’ll work with gas fireplaces, heaters, stoves, and other appliances, so previous hands-on experience or technical knowledge of gas or electrical systems is a MUST.





Job Duties and Responsibilities:

Receive incoming phone calls and live chats from potential customers (prospects) who indicated that they need shopping assistance. This does not include calls and chats from existing customers that need help with their orders (that’s a job for a different department)

Help customers choose the right gas or electric heating appliance for their needs

Makes follow-up calls, writes follow-up
s, and text messages to potential buyers. We try to follow up 5x with each person that contacted us (unless they indicate that they are no longer interested). We don’t do cold calling. Only reaching out to prospects who interacted with our online store and left their contact information.

After each interaction with a prospect/customer, writes notes & comments in our CRM (Asana)

Communicate efficiently and build rapport with potential customers

Assists prospects in their shopping journey and helps make the purchase decision

Ensures that all prospects’ questions and objections are addressed

Leads every interaction to a close sale, which means an order is placed on our online store

Prepares custom quotes, price matches competitors if necessary, and offers custom discounts. This requires calculating margins & ensuring profitability.

Answering questions about the products we offer, including technical questions. Learns the specifications, features and benefits of our bestsellers. Over time, becomes an expert in the industry.

Explain technical specifications and installation requirements in simple terms

If not able to answer product-specific questions, conducts research in the materials provided by the supplier, or reaches out to the supplier to get the information

Confirms stock availability and lead times when offering products to prospects

Documents standard procedures and best practices in a written form, so that other tea
mbers can learn from them





Requirements:

Sales Experience – 2+ years, preferably with B2C or B2B technical products

Gas Plumbing or Electrical Experience – Formal training or work experience (installer, technician, or similar roles preferred)

Excellent English – Both written and spoken

Confident Communicator – Can explain complex concepts to non-technical customers

Tech-Savvy – Comfortable using CRMs,
 platforms, order tools, etc.

Reliable and Proactive – Takes initiative and works independently

Home Office Setup – Stable internet, noise-free environment, backup power is a plus





Preferred but Not Required:

Knowledge of venting, HVAC, or hearth appliances

US product or code familiarity

Experience in the construction or home improvement industry





Why Join Us?

Sales commission: 8% of gross profit from all orders closed. Gross profit means the sale amount minus the product and shipping cost. Paid monthly. No upper limit. Monthly commission payouts range between $1,200 (the guaranteed minimum) and as high as $3,000 (for the top performer). The average monthly payout is $1,465 (average from the last 2 years).

$1,200/month minimum guaranteed pay

15 days paid days off per year (also convertible to min. guaranteed commission)

Paid training on all aspects of the role

Opportunities for professional development

Friendly atmosphere

Online Interview process

Fully remote position





How to Apply:

Apply through OnlineJobs.ph with the subject line: "Sales Pro - [Your Name]"
