title: Amazon Listing & AI Integration Specialist
description:
***Very important: Do take note that the applicant is required to share their updated CV with appropriate access. Applicants who are non compliant with this will be automatically ignored.***



We are seeking a meticulous, data-driven Amazon Listing Specialist who leverages cutting-edge technology to scale brand performance. The ideal candidate is an expert in the Amazon ecosystem and an early adopter of AI-driven workflows. You will navigate complex technical workflows, manage account health, and use AI to optimize asset management and PDF editing.



Key Responsibilities:

1. Technical Platform & AI Integration

• Create new product listings (ASINs) from scratch in Seller Central while ensuring full data and compliance accuracy.

• Manage bulk data uploads and complex template transformations using flat files.

• Use AI tools to streamline the creation and editing of product documentation and PDF assets, ensuring professional-grade formatting.

• Troubleshoot and resolve complex Parent/Child variation issues to ensure a seamless customer experience.

2. Account Health (AHR) & Crisis Management

• Monitor and maintain the Account Health Rating (AHR) by independently resolving "High Severity" policy violations, such as restricted claims or image issues.

• Diagnose and fix sudden drops in organic ranking or sales using a structured, data-driven approach.

• Swiftly resolve suppressed ASINs to minimize revenue loss.

• Develop an immediate action plan for compliance warnings to protect the store's standing without outside help.

3. Content Optimization & SEO

• Develop sophisticated keyword strategies across Titles, Bullet Points, and Backend Search Terms to maximize visibility.

• Write high-converting copy that balances aggressive SEO with human readability.

• Design and implement A+ Content (Enhanced Brand Content) to drive significant sales lifts.

• Analyze low Conversion Rates (CR) and implement critical content changes to improve performance.

4. Quality Control & Prioritization

• Maintain a meticulous personal checklist to ensure 100?curacy in product data before publishing.

• Manage a high-volume queue, prioritizing tasks such as fixing suppressed ASINs over new listing creation when necessary to protect the bottom line.



Required Qualifications & Skills

• Amazon Expertise: Expert-level proficiency in Amazon Seller Central, inventory flat files, and variation logic.

• AI & Technical Skill: Proven experience using AI tools for content generation and PDF editing/manipulation.

• Policy Knowledge: Deep understanding of Amazon compliance to maintain a strong Account Health Rating.

• Strategic SEO: Advanced knowledge of Amazon’s search algorithm and keyword placement.

• Meticulous Execution: A highly reliable work ethic with a focus on precision to avoid costly data mistakes.



***Very important: Do take note that the applicant is required to share their updated CV with appropriate access. Applicants who are non compliant with this will be automatically ignored.***

title: Senior IT Engineer / IT Architect
description:
Job Title Senior IT Engineer / IT Architect

Department Managed Services & Client Solutions

Employment Type Full-Time

Location Remote – Philippines (US Overnight Shift)

Hours 2:00 PM – 11:00 PM PST (flexibility available, Mon–Fri)

Experience Required 5+ years in a senior IT/MSP or architecture role



ABOUT CIRCLE TWICE CONSULTING



Circle Twice Consulting is a Pacific Northwest-based Managed Service Provider (MSP) delivering IT management, cybersecurity, cloud solutions, and AI automation to small and mid-sized businesses across Washington and Oregon. We are a tight-knit, high-trust team that values technical depth, ownership, and a genuine commitment to our clients' success.

As we grow our technical practice, we are looking for a seasoned IT professional who can operate at both the strategic architecture level and the hands-on execution level — someone who can design solutions, resolve complex escalations, and elevate the engineers around them.



ROLE OVERVIEW



The Senior IT Engineer / IT Architect is a senior individual contributor and technical leader responsible for advanced client engagements, architecture design, Level 3 escalations, and mentoring junior technicians. You will serve as a utility-level resource — equally comfortable defining a Microsoft 365 security baseline for a 100-seat client as you are troubleshooting a complex Azure hybrid environment or leading a network redesign project.  This role is well-suited for a highly capable IT professional looking to grow their career with a US-based MSP that values expertise, autonomy, and long-term partnership.



KEY RESPONSIBILITIES



Technical Design & Architecture

• Design and document Microsoft 365, Azure, and hybrid infrastructure solutions for SMB clients

• Lead architecture-level projects including tenant migrations, cloud transformations, and security hardening engagements

• Produce solution design documents, network diagrams, and implementation playbooks

• Evaluate and recommend technology solutions aligned with client business needs and budget

Level 3 Support & Escalation Handling

• Own and resolve complex Level 3 escalations across Microsoft 365, Azure, networking, and security domains

• Serve as the final internal escalation point before vendor support engagement

• Document root cause analyses and contribute to the internal knowledge base

Microsoft 365 & Security Operations

• Configure and manage Microsoft 365 security features: Defender for Business/Endpoint, Conditional Access, Intune MDM/MAM, Entra ID (Azure AD), and Purview

• Conduct Microsoft Secure Score reviews and implement hardening recommendations

• Support security i
 response including investigation and containment in M365 Defender

• Implement and manage MFA, SSPR, PIM, and identity governance policies

Networking & Infrastructure

• Design and troubleshoot LAN/WAN environments, VLANs, SD-WAN, and VPN configurations

• Support client firewall platforms (SonicWall, Fortinet, or similar)

• Assess and optimize network performance and security posture for client environments

Mentorship & Team Development

• Provide technical mentoring and guidance to Level 1 and Level 2 technicians

• Review junior technician documentation, ticket notes, and solutions for quality and accuracy

• Contribute to internal training, standard operating procedures, and onboarding materials



REQUIRED QUALIFICATIONS



Experience

• 5+ years of hands-on experience in a senior MSP, IT consulting, or enterprise IT role

• Demonstrated experience designing and managing Microsoft 365 environments at scale

• Strong working knowledge of Azure infrastructure services (VMs, VNets, Azure AD, Entra, Azure Backup, etc.)

• Solid networking background: TCP/IP, DNS, DHCP, routing, VLANs, firewalls, VPN

• Experience supporting Windows Server environments (AD DS, GPO, DNS, DHCP, file services)

Microsoft 365 & Security Skills (In-Depth Required)

• Microsoft Defender for Business / Defender for Endpoint – policy management, alert triage, i
 response

• Entra ID / Azure Active Directory – Conditional Access, identity governance, PIM, MFA enforcement

• Microsoft Intune – device enrollment, compliance policies, app management (MDM/MAM)

• Exchange Online – mail flow, anti-spam, mail hygiene, shared mailboxes, migration

• Microsoft Purview – data loss prevention, sensitivity labels, compliance basics

• Microsoft Secure Score – assessment and remediation planning

Certifications (Required or Preferred)

• Required: Microsoft 365 Certified: Administrator Expert (MS-102) or equivalent

• Strongly Preferred: Microsoft Certified: Azure Administrator Associate (AZ-104)

• Preferred: Microsoft Certified: Security, Compliance & Identity Fundamentals (SC-900) or SC-200

• Preferred: CompTIA Network+ or Security+, or equivalent vendor networking certification



NICE TO HAVE



• Experience with RMM/PSA platforms (ConnectWise, Autotask/Datto, NinjaRMM, etc.)

• Familiarity with NIST CSF, CIS Controls, or other security frameworks

• Exposure to BCDR platforms (Veeam, Datto BCDR, Azure Backup)

• Experience with Microsoft Teams Rooms or Teams Phone deployments

• PowerShell scripting experience for M365 and Azure automation

• Familiarity with AI tools and Microsoft Copilot deployments

• Prior experience working US business hours remotely from the Philippines



WORK SCHEDULE & LOGISTICS



This role is designed for a Philippines-based professional working a US overnight / Pacific Time shift. Our core client base operates in the Pacific Northwest (PST/PDT), and this schedule ensures strong overlap with late-day US business hours and early evening escalation coverage.

Core Hours (PST) 2:00 PM – 11:00 PM PST (flexible start 1:00–3:00 PM by arrangement)

Philippines Local Time 6:00 AM – 3:00 AM PHT (approx.) | Overnight role

Schedule Monday – Friday, 40 hours/week



WHAT WE OFFER



• Competitive compensation 

• US-based client exposure with real project ownership and architectural responsibility

• Career growth in a growing MSP with an expanding AI and cybersecurity practice

• Collaborative, low-bureaucracy environment with direct access to leadership

• Paid time off and recognition for certifications and continued learning

• Opportunity to become a key long-term technical pillar of our team



HOW TO APPLY



To apply, please submit the following:

• Your current resume or CV with a 1-3 minute video of you explaining why you'd be a good fit for this position.  Job submissions without an introductory video will NOT be considered.  

• A brief cover message describing your relevant experience with Microsoft 365 security and any MSP background

• A list of current Microsoft certifications held



We review applications on a rolling basis. Qualified candidates will be contacted within 5–7 business days for an initial video interview.



Circle Twice Consulting is an equal opportunity employer. We welcome applicants from all backgrounds and do not discriminate on the basis of race, gender, religion, nationality, or any other protected characteristic.

title: Dermatology Medical Virtual Assistant
description:
I’m a Virtual Assistant posting this position on behalf of our dermatology clinic. We have a strong team of VAs, several of whom have been with us for over a year, some even longer! We value growth, long-term collaboration, and making sure everyone has a positive work experience, including paid breaks and lunch.



We’re looking for a reliable and detail-oriented Medical Virtual Assistant to help with patient communication, scheduling, and scribing. This role is fully remote but requires availability during Pacific Time hours. 



Key Responsibilities

Schedule and confirm patient appointments, including consultations, follow-ups, and treatments

Conduct patient reminder calls/texts and provide appointment directions

Answer calls, greet patients virtually, and route inquiries to the appropriate staff

Provide information on dermatology procedures and treatments

Accurately document patient encounters in the EHR (scribing)

Maintain and update patient records, ensuring accuracy and confidentiality

Upload incoming faxes and organize them in Google Drive or the correct filing system

Assist with insurance eligibility checks and prior authorizations

Coordinate prescription refills with pharmacies

Respond to patient
s and chat messages promptly and professionally

Schedule representative lunches and manage related logistics

Handle ad hoc administrative tasks as needed



Required Qualifications

Associate’s or Bachelor’s degree in a related field

Minimum 1 year experience as a Medical Virtual Assistant, scribe, or similar role (dermatology preferred but not required)

Strong communication skills with a patient-focused approach

Knowledge of medical terminology and clinical workflows

Ability to work 40 hours/week during Pacific Time hours, including weekends, while maintaining a 5-day workweek

Comfortable using video, Hubstaff, and sharing screens during shifts

Proficiency in Google Workspace (Docs, Sheets, Drive, etc.)

Understanding of HIPAA and patient data confidentiality

Strong organizational and multitasking skills

Adaptability to learn and navigate new software quickly



Preferred Qualifications

Experience in dermatology or a similar medical specialty

Familiarity with prior authorizations and/or medical billing

Proficiency with EHR/EMR systems

Tech-savvy, with the ability to troubleshoot basic technical issues



Technical Requirements

Mac desktop or laptop (8GB RAM, Core i5 or above)

USB noise-cancelling headset

Working webcam

Wired internet connection with minimum 75 Mbps

Ability to conduct video calls and screen shares during shifts



Trial Period

Candidates will undergo a one-week paid trial period to evaluate performance, workflow compatibility, and overall fit for the role

This trial also allows candidates to assess if the position aligns with their expectations and availability

Continued engagement or employment will be determined based on mutual fit and performance during the trial period



Application Instructions

To apply, please submit a single Google Drive folder (PDFs only, view access enabled) with:

1) Updated resume

2) Screenshot of typing speed test (minimum 60–80 WPM)

3) Screenshot of internet speed test (minimum 75 Mbps wired)

4) Screenshot or list of full work setup and specifications



Important: Include “SkinCare CS” in your subject line to confirm you’ve read the full job description.

title: SEO Content Writer
description:
ABOUT US

Engage Studio is a fast-growing custom jewelry company based in Toronto, Canada. We specialize in designing meaningful engagement rings and custom jewelry that mark some of the most important 
nts in our clients' lives.



Unlike traditional jewelry stores, our process is a guided journey. We collaborate closely with each client to design a ring that reflects their unique story.



Our team works with clients both in-person in our Toronto showroom and virtually with clients worldwide.

We are building a world-class support team in the Philippines and are looking for a talented SEO Content Writer who wants a long-term role with a growing international company.



This is a long-term role for the right person. We value reliability and consistent quality over speed.



WHO THIS ROLE IS FOR

This role is perfect for someone who:

- Has experience writing SEO content for lifestyle, fashion, beauty, or luxury brands

- Knows how to structure a post for both readers and search without it feeling mechanical

- Writes in a voice that sounds human — warm, specific, and free of filler

- Is comfortable working from a detailed brief without needing heavy direction

- Is reliable — hits deadlines and communicates early when something comes up

- Jewelry or bridal industry experience is a plus





WHAT SUCCESS LOOKS LIKE

- Every post you deliver is publish-ready with minimal revisions needed

- Your writing sounds like a real person wrote it — not a content machine

- Briefs are followed closely and deadlines are met consistently

- You flag questions early rather than delivering something off-brief

- Clients and readers find the content genuinely useful and engaging





CORE RESPONSIBILITIES

1. SEO Blog Writing

You will write blog posts from detailed briefs provided by our team. Responsibilities include:



- Writing SEO blog posts from detailed briefs — topic, angle, audience, and structure are all provided

- Producing content that is warm, clear, and genuinely useful — not keyword-stuffed or generic

- Following SEO fundamentals: logical heading structure, natural keyword integration, scannable formatting

- Researching thoroughly and incorporating supporting elements like data, external sources, and internal links where they add real value



2. Publishing and Formatting

You will be responsible for taking posts from draft to published. Responsibilities include:

- Publishing approved posts directly in WordPress

- Formatting posts correctly — headings, images, links, and layout

- Ensuring each post meets our quality standards before submission



3. Communication and Reliability

You will work independently but stay connected with our team. Responsibilities include:

- Turning around drafts within the agreed window for each post

- Flagging questions or blockers early — before they become delays

- Incorporating feedback efficiently when revisions are requested





REQUIREMENTS

- Minimum 2 years of experience writing SEO content, ideally for lifestyle, fashion, or consumer brands

- Excellent written English — clear, warm, and natural

- Comfortable working from a brief independently

- Familiar with WordPress publishing and basic on-page SEO formatting

- Strong attention to detail with specifications and brand voice guidelines

- Reliable communicator — responsive and proactive



Schedule

This is a fully flexible role. You set your own hours — deadlines matter, not when you work.

Volume is approximately 5 posts per month, each roughly 1,200–1,400 words.



COMPENSATION AND BENEFITS

- Rate: 2,500–3,000 PHP per article (based on experience and quality)

- Approximately 5 articles per month — estimated monthly earnings of 12,500–15,000 PHP

- Flexible schedule — work on your own time

- Paid trial post before committing to an ongoing arrangement

- Long-term opportunity with a growing international company



HOW TO APPLY

- Share one writing sample you are proud of — ideally a blog post or article for a lifestyle, fashion, or consumer brand. In 2–3 sentences, tell us what the brief was and what you were trying to achieve with the piece.

- Record and share a short 1–2 minute video of yourself answering the following question: "Tell us about your writing process — how do you approach a brief from start to a finished draft?"



Applications without both a writing sample and a video will not be reviewed.

We respond quickly to strong applicants. If it's a good fit, we'll start with a paid trial post before committing to an ongoing arrangement.



WHY JOIN OUR TEAM

We are building a long-term international team and we invest in the people who join us.

Our tea
mbers value:



- A supportive and communicative team culture

- Clear briefs and systems — no guesswork

- Long-term career opportunities with a growing company

- Working on content that actually matters to real people at meaningful 
nts in their lives



As our company grows, we promote from within whenever possible.

, Instagram, and TikTok.

What You’ll Be Doing

Adding motion graphics, kinetic text, transitions, and sound design to hook attention



Storyboarding or interpreting creative briefs into ad sequences



Repurposing long-form videos into engaging short-form edits



Collaborating with creative strategists and project managers



Continuously improving your edits based on performance data

Experience editing for high-ticket offers or service-based businesses



Knowledge of ad platforms 
, TikTok, YouTube) and what makes videos convert



Skills in color grading, audio mixing, and sound effects



What’s In It for You?

$1,200 USD/month paid on time, every month



Flexible schedule – we care about output, not hours

Direct feedback and collaboration with performance marketers

How to Apply

Apply now and show us what you’ve got. We're excited to see how you bring stories to life through powerful edits.

Dave

title: In house Video Editor
description:
JOB OVERVIEW



Hello! I run a real estate media business in Southwest Florida and I’m looking to bring our video editing in-house. There are plenty of “big box” editors out there, but since they all have giant teams you never know what you’re going to get back each time. I want to bring on someone who can be a true part of our team and work with us to create a consistent, premium look across all of our videos.



We specialize in high-end real estate media and aim to produce some of the highest quality content in our market. I’d love to find someone who can come in confidently, offer suggestions, stay on top of current trends, and even give input on where we can improve on our side of filming as well. We are a team here and want someone who feels like an equal part of the crew. Strong English communication and attention to detail are very important in this role.



Proficiency in Final Cut Pro is preferred, but not required. We’re also open to DaVinci Resolve or Adobe Premiere Pro if that’s what you use. We also create agent on-camera videos and talking head style content, so experience with that type of editing is a plus.



Looking for someone who is familiar with:

    •    Current real estate video editing trends

    •    Cinematic color grading

    •    Creative transitions / masking transitions

    •    Higgsfield AI or similar tools for effects such as day-to-night, virtual staging, or other tasteful enhancements

    •    Understanding sound design

    •    Premium captions / text animations

    •    Editing both property tour videos and agent-led videos



We are looking to onboard someone fairly soon in preparation for the busier season coming up.



A test edit will be required with your application. We will provide RAW files from a recent shoot so you can show us your style and ability. There will be opportunities for day-to-night transitions, door openings, and other creative edits. You do not need to put together a full-length video. Something around 30–45 seconds is totally fine, as long as it gives us a strong feel for your color grading, music selection, sound design, and most importantly your creativity.



Instructions for the test video:

    •    Cinematic look and feel

    •    Color grading is a priority

    •    Okay to have deeper shadows for a more moody feel if it works

    •    At least one day-to-sunset transition

    •    At least one door opening

    •    Use as many or as few clips as needed to create something strong



Please also add 3D text for at least one key point of speaking, only 1x agent on camera necessary for test and please zoom in and out and track the agents face.



We strive to stay on top of current trends and keep innovating so we can put out the best possible product for our clients. Video is a big part of what drives new business for us, so this role matters.



Looking for someone with full-time availability. I look forward to speaking with you.



RAW Video Files





Please do not apply unless capable of sending this text edit. Thanks very much :D

title: Virtual Assistant – Property Management (Full-Time)
description:

title: Instagram/Youtube Video Editor
description:
I am a nutrition/fitness/food content creator looking for another 1-2 skilled and reliable video editors to join my team. If you have graphic design experience/abilities as well, that’s great. My Instagram accounts 
 
 (Check them out so you have an idea of my videos).



Key roles

- Edit multiple Instagram reels weekly w/ thumbnails. These usually range from 5-60 seconds. I will pay you $4 per reel w/ thumbnail. You can edit as many or as few as you prefer.

- You will need experience editing YouTube videos for the future. I pay more for these, but have not assigned them yet. Right now, I am primarily focused on short form content for the next few months.



Requirements

- Reliable internet w/ computer access.

- Reliable, hard working person w/ good communication: responding to
s/messages within 24 hours during the week.

- Experienced w/ common editing softwares/apps/AI.

- Understanding of engaging, viral, and storytelling content. (Look at these IG 
 

- Speaks English well. I send instructions via Loom videos.



I expect my editors to edit with any advanced technique necessary. Some of my videos are simpler and some are more complex, but be prepared for anything.



Benefits

- Clear systems: If you get hired, there are clear instructions for expectations and work flow while allowing for creative freedom.

- Growth opportunities: I have experience working with plenty of other editors for many years. If you do good work on time, are constantly improving, and your videos go viral often, I will increase your pay in the future. However, the pay is non-negotiable at first because that would be unfair to my current editors.

- Education: I periodically send out creators to study to all my editors so they can get better.

- Reliable and flexible work: You will have work every single week and you can take on as many or as few videos as you prefer every week (minimum: 2 videos per week).

- Reliable pay and job security: I always pay my editors on time once the final draft of videos are completed. I pay through Wise and you will never lose your job so long as you continue to meet expectations.

- Easy boss: I am easy to work with and communicate with. If you need a vacation or need to communicate anything, just let me know ahead of time.



Only apply if you are highly skilled and reliable. You should be reliable enough to meet reasonable deadlines. Vacations and emergencies are ok, but I will not allow them constantly especially at first.



If I think you might be a good match, I will
 you back with a test project after you apply. I expect the first draft to be completed within 24-72 hours. After that, we will go over a few sets of revisions. You’re welcome to ask as many questions throughout as needed.



After your revisions, I will determine if your test project meets publishing standards. If it does, I will pay you for the test project and likely hire you onto my team.



There will be a lot of people applying, so be patient yet ready for a potential response. It might take me a few weeks or more to look through all applications.



To apply, send me an
 
 that includes the word “FitFoodie” in the subject line so I know you read everything. In the
, include any portfolio of your work editing Instagram reels and YouTube videos. You can optionally attach a resume as well. Feel free to type me a short message of anything else you’d like me to know about you.

title: Assistant Accountant (Hybrid, Full-Time)
description:
Assistant Accountant

Offshore X | Supporting Australian Client | Full-time

Offshore X is an Australian-backed business providing high-quality offshore professional services to Australian companies. We are currently seeking a Senior Bookkeeper to support a WA-based client, working directly with an experienced Partner.



Responsibilities

- Support half-year and full-year reporting in compliance with ASX and Corporations Act requirements

- Perform day-to-day bookkeeping activities, including accounts payable and receivable processing

- Maintain accurate financial records, including data entry and transaction processing

- Prepare and post journal entries and assist with month-end close procedures

- Reconcile bank accounts, general ledger accounts, and supplier/customer balances

- Maintain and update the fixed asset register and depreciation schedules

- Assist with statutory reporting, including BAS, GST, and tax compliance

- Support the external audit process by preparing audit schedules and documentation

- Assist in cash flow reporting and forecasting

- Ensure compliance with AASB (Australian Accounting Standards Board) standards

- Assist in preparing board and management reports

- Assist in the preparation of monthly, quarterly, and annual financial reports

- Support continuous improvement of financial processes and internal controls

 



Qualifications and skills

- Bachelor’s degree in accounting, Finance, or a related discipline.

- CA/CPA qualification is desired.

- 3+ years of professional experience in accounting, preferably with exposure to international entities and exploration companies.

- Strong technical knowledge of IFRS, AASB, and financial reporting requirements.

- Proficiency in accounting software, particularly Xero and MYOB.

- Familiarity with exploration company compliance, including ASX-listed reporting obligations.

- Excellent communication skills and the ability to manage stakeholders across multiple time zones.

- Proficiency with Microsoft software suite

 



Personal Attributes

- Detail-oriented with exceptional analytical skills.

- Proactive and adaptable with a solution-focused mindset.

- Strong organizational abilities to manage competing deadlines effectively.

- Collaborative team player with the ability to work independently in a remote and international setting.



Why Join Offshore X?

- Work directly with Australian clients and experienced legal professionals

- Exposure to high-quality corporate and transactional work

- Supportive team environment with strong systems and processes

- Long-term role with an established business

- Clear opportunity for development and progression



Note: Hybrid to Bocaue, Bulacan.

Budget: 45,000 PHP - 65,000 PHP

title: Social Media Manager - Virtual Assistant

Employment Type: Contract / Remote

Compensation: $820.00 – $1,000 per month depending on experience



About ICAN Clothes



ICAN Clothes is a purpose-driven fashion brand that promotes confidence, identity, and empowerment through fashion. Our brand combines meaningful storytelling with modern fashion design to inspire youth and communities.



We are seeking a high-level Social Media Growth Manager who understands fashion marketing, Instagram growth, and e-commerce conversion strategies.

This is not an entry-level position.

The Social Media Growth Manager will be responsible for managing and growing our social media presence across Instagram and
, with a focus on driving engagement, building organic followers, and increasing traffic to our Shopify store.

 growth strategies

title: CREATIVE BRAND BUILDER — Motion, Characters & AI Video Remote | Full-Time | Above Market Rate
description:
CREATIVE BRAND BUILDER — Motion, Characters & AI Video

Remote | Full-Time | Above Market Rate



This is not a typical design job.



We are building a brand from the ground up, characters, motion, story, and a website that makes people feel something. If you are a creative who gets excited by brand building, character design, and the new world of AI-assisted video, keep reading.

The work



You will be taking a cast of original characters and building them into a fully realised brand presence across every format, static design, motion, and AI video. The centrepiece of this work is producing video content where human characters and animated brand characters interact naturally and convincingly. Think brand film, not corporate demo.

Alongside the character and video work you will manage social media channels, build website visuals, and create promotional content that blends real human imagery with character assets seamlessly. You will also take ownership of the website, ensuring every element, layout, imagery, typography, and character placement is polished, cohesive, and visually perfect across all devices.



You are the right person if you can:



Take one character and recreate them consistently across 50 different scenarios without losing who they are. Produce motion content and AI-assisted video using whatever tools get the best result, After Effects, HeyGen, Runway, CapCut, anything. Create AI video content featuring human and character interaction sequences that feel real and emotionally engaging. Build brand assets, guidelines, and a visual library from scratch. Blend human photography with illustrated characters cohesively across a website and social media. Have a sharp eye for website design and the ability to take a site from functional to visually outstanding, ensuring every element fits the brand and feels intentional.

We do not care how you execute. AI tools, traditional software, hybrid workflows, results are all that matter.

What we need from you



A portfolio showing character work across multiple executions, same character, different scenarios, different formats. Examples of motion work or AI video content you have produced. A short note telling us what excites you about this role.

Shortlisted applicants will be invited to a live video interview.



What you get



Above market rate full time salary. Fully remote, work your own hours. Creative freedom to use any tools and methods you choose. Work on a brand with genuine commercial ambition and a principal who values great creative work. Long term role with growing scope as the brand scales.



To apply



Send a link to your portfolio and a short message directly to the hiring manager at

You're calling cleaning company owners and managers, qualifying their interest, and locking in a short call with our team. That's the job — one clear outcome per conversation.

Everything is provided:



Script tailored to commercial cleaning business owners

Verified prospect list of commercial cleaning companies

Dedicated outbound number

Power dialler — no manual dialling

Full briefing on our service before you start

Pitching Upscale's contract generation service in a natural, conversational way

Qualifying interest and booking discovery calls with our team

Logging outcomes in the dialler/CRM

Hitting a KPI of 2–3 booked calls per 100 dials

title: Senior Video Editor & Content Strategist
description:
The Role

We are looking for an elite Senior Video Editor with 5+ years of professional experience to join our high-growth marketing team. This is not just a "cutter" role; we are looking for a creative partner—someone who understands why people watch, how to keep them engaged, and how to turn raw footage into high-performing assets for YouTube and social media. You should bring experience with ideas and growth in the content space to elevate our work beyond base expectations.



The Standard

Self-checking your work is a critical pillar of this role. We produce a high volume of content within the Marketing Department; time wasted by management Quality Checking (QC’ing) sloppy work or simple mistakes is time wasted from other important tasks. You are expected to be your own toughest critic and deliver "ready-to-post" files every time.



Core Responsibilities

*   Performance Optimization: You must have the ability to surgically "cut out" bad performance 
nts from on-screen talent. You are responsible for manufacturing the best possible version of the speaker to ensure the clearest communication of ideas.

*     High-Volume Management: Ability to keep up with our high-volume weekly workload (3 long-form videos and 2–6 shorts per week).

               - Phase 1: Ownership of one main weekly podcast + shorts (~7–20 min runtime).

               - Phase 2: Transitioning to take over a second weekly series (~17–23 min runtime).

*     Custom Animation: Build high-quality animations from scratch (not just utilizing templates). You will build animated graphics and bullet point lists to help our audience follow along and significantly improve their ability to understand complex material.

*     Advanced Post-Production: Professional-grade Color Grading using DaVinci Resolve and surgical Audio Mixing skills to ensure broadcast-quality clarity.

*     AI Asset Creation: Proficiently create visual elements using AI tools (GPT, Gemini, Nano Banana, etc.) to enhance storytelling and supplement B-roll.



Qualifications & Skills

*     Professional Experience: 5+ years working with clients on commercial, narrative, documentary, or social-media projects. Prior experience with financial planning content is a plus.

*     Technical Mastery: Expert proficiency in Adobe Premiere, Adobe After Effects, and DaVinci Resolve.

*     Strategic Thinking: A deep understanding of YouTube retention metrics and a track record of work that has earned viral results.

*     Communication: Exceptional English communication skills and high-level organizational habits are crucial for this role.

*     Reliability: Comfort working fixed US office hours (9:00 AM – 5:00 PM PST) with a stable, high-speed internet connection and backup power when needed.



Why You?

*     You have a portfolio that shows "viral" or high-retention results.

*     You can take a "bad" on-camera performance and turn it into a seamless, authoritative presentation through clever cutting and pacing.

*     You are looking for a long-term home where you can influence the creative direction of a growing brand.



Interested candidates should submit a resume, an intro video, and a brief cover note describing their experience managing administrative and coordination tasks in a remote environment.



About Falcon Wealth Planning

Falcon Wealth Planning is a fiduciary, fee-only wealth advisory firm on a mission to redefine how Americans experience financial planning. We translate complex tax and investment strategies into clear, human stories that build trust, because wealth decisions are emotional before they’re logical.

title: Digital Marketing and Sales Expert
description:
Overview

We are looking for a Digital Marketing & Sales Expert who can both generate demand and close deals. This role is ideal for someone who understands retail marketing, paid advertising, and how to convert conversations into paying customers. You will be responsible for managing ad campaigns across multiple platforms while also handling client communication, sales calls, and onboarding.



This is a hybrid role combining marketing execution with direct sales responsibility.



Key Responsibilities



Sales & Client Acquisition



Conduct outbound and inbound sales calls to convert leads into clients

Clearly explain services, pricing, and value propositions to potential customers

Identify client pain points and position solutions effectively

Close deals and ensure smooth transition into onboarding

Maintain a consistent sales pipeline and meet monthly targets



Client Onboarding & Communication



Lead onboarding calls with new clients and set expectations

Build strong relationships through clear and confident communication

Provide ongoing updates, performance insights, and recommendations

Handle objections, questions, and client concerns professionally



Digital Marketing Execution



Plan, launch, and manage paid ad campaigns on:

Google Ads

Meta Ads

TikTok

Optimize campaigns for conversions, ROAS, and lead generation

Conduct audience targeting, A/B testing, and creative optimization

Monitor daily performance and adjust budgets and strategies accordingly



Retail-Focused Strategy



Develop marketing strategies tailored to e-commerce and retail brands

Understand product positioning, pricing psychology, and customer behavior

Align campaigns with promotions, product launches, and seasonal trends



Additional Responsibilities



Support additional marketing, sales, or operational tasks as assigned by management

Stay up to date with platform changes, new features, and advertising policies across all supported channels

Adapt to evolving business needs, including testing new platforms, tools, or campaign strategies

Qualifications

Proven experience in digital marketing and sales (agency or retail experience preferred)

Strong knowledge of paid advertising platforms (Google, Meta, TikTok)

Comfortable speaking on the phone and closing deals confidently

Experience with CRM tools and lead tracking systems

Ability to manage multiple clients and campaigns simultaneously

Results-driven mindset with a focus on revenue and growth

Key Skills

Sales closing and objection handling

Strong verbal communication and presentation skills

Campaign optimization and performance analysis

Time management and organization

Strategic thinking with a focus on ROI

Performance Expectations

Meet or exceed monthly sales targets

Maintain strong client retention and satisfaction

Deliver measurable improvements in campaign performance

Consistently generate and convert qualified leads

title: Funding Specialist
description:

Which lenders to hit first:

Navy Federal Credit Union (relationship-based)

PenFed Credit Union (strong approvals)

SoFi (personal loans)

Order of applications (VERY important)

Timing (same day vs spaced out)

Type of funding:

Credit cards (0% APR)

Personal loans

Business funding



???? If they don’t build strategy ? they’re useless. Period.



???? 3. Client Funding File Management



Every client should have a funding file:



Credit report saved

Income docs

Login info (securely)

Application tracking sheet:

Date applied

Result (approved/denied/pending)

Amount approved

Notes on lender behavior



???? This becomes YOUR database = long-term goldmine



???? 4. Application Execution (No sloppy work)

Submit applications accurately

Avoid red flags (wrong income, mismatched info)

Use correct employer formatting

Handle reconsideration calls if denied



???? A real specialist can turn a denial into an approval.

Most people are lazy here—this is where you win.



Call underwriting departments

Push manual reviews

Submit docs if needed

Follow up until final decision



???? This alone can add $10K–$50K extra approvals



???? 6. Credit Optimization (BEFORE funding)



They should guide clients like:



Pay down cards to under 10–30%

Remove small collections (if needed)

Don’t apply randomly

Add primary tradelines (if strategy calls for it)



???? This ties directly into your credit repair services ????



???? 7. Business Funding Setup (BIG MONEY PLAY)



If client wants business funding:



Make sure LLC is structured properly

EIN verified

Business address legit (no BS virtual address flagged)

Help client:

Set up business bank account

Build relationship with banks



???? This is where you hit $50K–$150K+ deals



???? 8. Client Communication (No ghosting)



They must:



Update client after every application

Explain approvals/denials clearly

Set realistic expectations



???? If your clients feel confused = you lose referrals



???? 9. Weekly Reporting to YOU



You’re the boss—track everything.



They should send weekly:



of clients processed

Total approvals $

Total denials

Pending deals

Problems / bottlenecks



???? Run it like a real business, not vibes.



???? 10. Upsell & Backend Revenue



This is where you scale HARD:



They should:



Identify clients ready for:

Higher limits

Business funding

Additional rounds

Push second funding rounds after 60–90 days



???? One client can turn into $100K+ lifetime funding

title: Online Business Manager
description:
Part-time (20 hrs/week, with growth potential) | Remote | AEST-aligned



Are you the kind of person who reads a messy inbox and immediately sees the system that's missing?

Do you take ownership without being asked, flag problems before they become fires, and genuinely enjoy making a creative business run more smoothly than its founder ever could alone?

Then keep reading...



About I for Design Studio

We're a small-but-mighty brand and web design studio based on the Sunshine Coast, QLD Australia. Led by Indiah (Creative Director). We work with premium service-based businesses (think interior designers, lawyers, architects, creative studios, and wellness practices) who care deeply about how their brand shows up and want a digital presence that matches the quality of their work.



The work is great. The clients are great. And we need someone to make sure the business behind it all runs just as well as the creative.



What's in it for you:

• A creative director who will actually let you own your role, not micromanage it

• Inspiring, well-positioned clients across creative and wellness industries

• 20 hours per week to start, with real growth potential as the business scales

• Remote work with clear expectations and excellent communication

• A role where your initiative is actually noticed



What you'll own:

• Managing client communications: drafting responses, following up, keeping things moving

• Project management across multiple client deliverables using our systems and tools

• Keeping our internal operations tight: processes, workflows, task management

• Onboarding and offboarding clients smoothly

• Spotting gaps before I do and coming to me with solutions, not just problems

• Occasionally supporting with content scheduling, admin, and light marketing coordination



You're a fit if you:

• Have at least 2 years experience as an OBM, senior VA, or operations manager ideally in a creative service business

• Write in clear, professional English and can adapt your tone to suit a premium brand

• Are comfortable with project management tools (we use ClickUp)

• Can work autonomously and don't need hand-holding to get things done

• Are available and responsive between 10am and 2pm AEST, Monday to Friday

• Communicate proactively: you flag things early, you ask the right questions, you have incredible attention to detail and you follow through



Bonus points for:

• A background in creative service-based businesses, specifically brand and web design

• Understanding of brand voice and the ability to write client-facing copy that sounds human



How to apply:

 
 with the subject line: "I'm your next OBM"



Include:

• A short note about who you are and why this role makes sense for you

• A specific example of a time you took initiative and solved a problem without being asked

• Your CV and any relevant portfolio or client references

• Your availability

• Your ideal hourly rate in USD

title: Video Editor - Fitness and Anime YouTube Channel
description:
About the channel



Gokuflex is one of the longest-running fitness channels on YouTube. The brand blends Dragon Ball Z mythology with real-world training, identity transformation, and fatherhood. We have been doing this for over 11 years and our audience is here to become the best version of themselves.

We are not looking for a basic editor. We need someone who trains, knows anime inside and out, and is obsessed with making videos that stop the scroll.



What you will be editing



YouTube long-form videos including vlogs, training content, transformations, and motivation

YouTube Shorts and Instagram Reels

Client transformation spotlights and social proof content

Motivational Saiyan Dad identity content



Hard requirements - non-negotiable



Deep Dragon Ball Z knowledge. You must know the arcs, characters, power levels, and lore. Not optional.

Broad anime knowledge including One Piece, Naruto, Jujutsu Kaisen and beyond.

Real fitness understanding. You need to know training, body transformation, nutrition, and gym culture. If you have never been in that world, this role is not for you.

Professional-level skill in Premiere Pro, Final Cut Pro, or DaVinci Resolve.

Expert at pacing, jump cuts, music sync, and keeping viewers locked in from hook to CTA.

Able to meet deadlines and communicate clearly in English.

Fast, reliable internet and a computer that can handle 4K footage.



Skills that will make you stand out



Motion graphics, anime-style transitions, After Effects or CapCut, color grading, sound design and SFX, DBZ power-up effects, thumbnail creation, YouTube SEO awareness, short-form viral instincts.

Bonus: If you personally train or have your own transformation story, include it. We value people who live the brand.



What makes the best Gokuflex editor



You know the first 3 seconds either win or lose the viewer and you edit accordingly.

You can use DBZ power-up 
nts, transformation sequences, and iconic music as storytelling tools, not just cool effects.

You can take a raw training vlog and turn it into a cinematic Saiyan origin story.

You study what is going viral on YouTube Shorts, Reels, and TikTok every single week.

You obsess over retention and understand the difference between a video that gets clicked and one that gets finished.

You bring ideas, not just execution.



Work structure



100% remote, work from home

Full-time preferred, part-time considered based on experience and output

Consistent weekly video schedule with real deadlines

Direct collaboration with the channel owner via WhatsApp and Google Drive

Paid in USD via Wise or similar. Starting at $800/month scaling to $1,200 based on experience and performance.



How to apply



Send your application with the subject line: SAIYAN EDITOR - [Your Name]

Applications without this subject line will not be reviewed.



Your application must include:



Links to 2 to 3 samples of your video editing work (YouTube, Google Drive, or Vimeo)

A short paragraph on why you are the right editor for this channel. Be specific.

Your software stack including any plugins or tools you use

Your available hours per week and your time zone

Your answer to the question below



REQUIRED - Answer this to prove you read the full ad:



Goku has reached Ultra Instinct. In the world of fitness, what does Ultra Instinct represent in a person's training journey and how would you show that 
nt visually in a YouTube video? Give a specific editing idea, not a general answer.

title: Website developer
description:
Job Title: Web Developer (AI Integration – Dental Smile Visualization)



Location: Remote (Preferred: U.S.-based)  

Company: Dental Concepts & Orthodontics  



About Us:  

We are an elevated, luxury-focused dental practice committed to delivering a high-end patient experience through innovation, aesthetics, and advanced technology. We are currently seeking a skilled Web Developer with AI experience to build a modern, visually stunning website that integrates cutting-edge dental technology.



Project Overview:  

We are looking to develop a custom website that includes an AI-powered smile visualization tool—allowing patients to see realistic before-and-after transformations of their smile (veneers, whitening, orthodontics, etc.). This feature will be a key driver in patient engagement and case acceptance.



Key Responsibilities:

- Design and develop a sleek, high-end, mobile-optimized dental website

- Build or integrate an AI-driven before-and-after smile simulation tool

- Collaborate with our team to ensure branding reflects a luxury experience

- Ensure fast load times, SEO optimization, and strong user experience (UX/UI)

- Implement secure patient interaction features (forms, uploads, consultations)

- Integrate booking functionality and CRM compatibility if needed



Required Skills & Experience:

- Proven experience in web development (front-end & back-end)

- Strong knowledge of AI/ML integration, especially image processing or computer vision

- Experience working with healthcare or dental-related platforms (preferred)

- Familiarity with tools such as TensorFlow, OpenCV, or similar AI frameworks

- Ability to create realistic image simulations (before/after transformations)

- Experience with UI/UX design for premium/luxury brands

- Strong portfolio showcasing relevant work



Bonus Qualifications:

- Experience building smile design or cosmetic simulation tools

- Knowledge of dental workflows (veneers, Invisalign, smile makeovers)

- Experience integrating 3D imaging or facial recognition technology



Project Type:

- Contract-based (with potential for ongoing collaboration)



To Apply:

Please submit:

- Your portfolio (especially AI or visualization projects)

- Examples of similar work (dental or aesthetic industries preferred)

- A brief overview of how you would approach building an AI smile simulation tool

- Estimated timeline and pricing



Our Goal:  

We are not looking for a basic website—we want a standout digital experience that reflects innovation, luxury, and results. If you have the skillset to bring this vision to life, we want to hear from you.





This could be a part-time position or a one time gig

title: Travel Assistant (Insurance Support) | Full-Time | Training Provided
description:
Travel Insurance Assistant / Specialist



(Full-Time, Remote, EST)



PLEASE READ CAREFULLY BEFORE APPLYING



$7/Hour Starting Rate | 40 Hours | Full-Time



Opportunity for increases based on performance

Strong performers in this role have earned consistent pay increases.

We review every application manually, so thoughtful, tailored applications are prioritized.



Full-time remote role focused on:



Travel insurance coordination and related tasks: drafting travel insurance for review, calling Viking/speaking directly with guests, and maintaining HubSpot CRM and trackers.



DO NOT APPLY if:



-You do not have clear, confident spoken English that can be easily understood by senior clients.



-You do not have experience in the travel industry or working with detailed, client-facing processes.



-You submit template applications or generic resumes. Please keep your introduction natural and personal so we can understand you.



-You're seeking part-time, short-term, or freelance work.



-You cannot commit to U.S. Eastern Time business hours (9am–5pm EST, night shift PHP)



-You do not carefully follow application instructions. Applications missing steps may not be reviewed.



DO APPLY if:



-You have worked in the travel industry OR have strong experience handling detailed client support, bookings, or coordination tasks.



-You have experience explaining policies, handling client questions, or working with structured documentation (insurance experience is a strong advantage, but not required).



-You can send a short video introduction.



-You are looking for a long-term, full-time remote role with a stable team that invests in your growth.



-You are professional, detail-oriented, and take pride in doing things correctly.



-You can work independently, follow documented processes, and ask questions when something is unclear.



-If you have handled complex client situations, briefly mention one example in your application.



-If you have worked with senior or high-touch clients before, please highlight this.



About Us



We are a boutique travel agency based in Atlanta, GA (EST). We specialize in luxury river cruises with Viking and provide high-touch support for our clients.



We're warm, organized, and focused on delivering excellent service. Our team is small, collaborative, and values doing things right.



We have clear processes (SOPs) for most tasks. You will be trained and supported.



We're looking for someone who wants to grow into this role long-term.



Who We're Looking For



Must-Have:



Prior experience as a virtual assistant or in a similar remote support role



Excellent written English with a professional and friendly tone



Proven ability to work independently and manage detailed tasks



High attention to detail, follow-through, and accountability



Reliable high-speed internet and a quiet workspace



Bonus Points:



Experience with TripMate, Allianz, or Travel Insured



Any experience with Viking Cruises or river cruising



HubSpot CRM experience (or experience with similar CRMs)



Familiarity with booking systems, invoices, or client records



Experience reviewing, explaining, or processing insurance (any industry)



Your Role



As our Virtual Assistant, you'll be responsible for:



Drafting client
s



Updating HubSpot CRM and internal trackers



Calling Viking Cruises and partners to verify information or resolve questions



Supporting the insurance department with administrative tasks



Accuracy matters. Small mistakes in names, dates, or policies can impact the client experience.



You will be trained and supported as you learn our systems.



So expectations are clear:



You'll work directly with our team as internal support



Guest/client
s are drafts for review



You'll have autonomy for routine tasks, with guidance on when to escalate



You'll be supported by an experienced team invested in your success



Schedule



Target hours: 9:00am to 5:00pm EST (evening/night shift in the Philippines — please confirm this works for you)



Hours may vary slightly based on business needs



Saturday coverage may be introduced later via rotation



How to Apply



Applications that don't follow these instructions may not be reviewed. This helps us identify candidates with strong attention to detail.



Candidates who clearly follow all steps are prioritized.



Step 1:



Send your application with the subject line or first sentence including: "Meghan's #1"



Step 2:



Include a short video introduction that:



Explains your relevant experience (insurance experience is a bonus, not required)



Shares why you're interested in this role



Describes what excites you about working with a team like ours



Keep it natural and concise. We are looking for clarity, not perfection.



Step 3:



Attach your CV or resume (if using Google Drive, ensure access is granted)



We're excited to meet someone who cares about doing great work and wants to grow with a strong team.



If that sounds like you — we encourage you to apply today.

title: Insurance Account Manager
description:
Offshore Insurance Account Manager (Philippines)



Maverick Insurance Brokers



About Maverick



Maverick is a new-age commercial insurance brokerage built for business owners who expect more than just a policy.



We don’t do passive, once-a-year broking.

We proactively manage risk, move fast, and make sure our clients are properly covered as their businesses evolve.



We’re building a high-performance brokerage from day one with a strong pipeline, sharp systems, and a focus on growth.



The Role



We’re hiring an Offshore Insurance Account Manager based in the Philippines to operate as a core part of our broking team.



This is not a support role.



You’ll be expected to think, act, and operate like an Australian-based broker — managing policies, preparing submissions, reviewing coverage, and driving outcomes for clients.



The only difference: you’ll spend less time on the phone, and more time executing at speed and precision.



What You’ll Be Responsible For



Managing a portfolio of commercial insurance clients (behind the scenes)

Preparing high-quality market submissions for insurers

Reviewing policies, endorsements, and wordings for accuracy and coverage gaps

Building renewal strategies and identifying opportunities to improve cover

Comparing quotes and preparing recommendations for clients

Managing policy changes, renewals, and documentation end-to-end

Working closely with onshore brokers to move deals forward quickly

Following up insurers and keeping 
ntum across all placements

Maintaining clean, structured data in CRM (HubSpot)

Identifying risks, issues, or gaps before they become problems

What We’re Looking For



We are looking for someone who is:



Highly competent technically - you understand commercial insurance inside out

You are very familiar with insurance platforms like Sunrise, Ebix.

Fast and proactive - you don’t wait to be told what to do

Detail-obsessed - you catch what others miss

Commercially minded - you understand client outcomes, not just policies

Structured thinker - you can manage multiple clients, policies, and deadlines without dropping the ball

You take responsibility and get things done



Experience Required

3+ years in commercial insurance (brokerage, account management or underwriting)

Strong knowledge across multiple lines (Property, Liability, Financial Lines, Motor, etc.)

Experience preparing submissions and managing renewals

Comfortable reviewing policy wordings and identifying gaps

Experience working with Australian brokers or insurers



How This Role is Different



Most offshore roles are admin-heavy.



This is not.



You will:



Be treated like a core broker

Be trusted with real responsibility

Work directly with founders and senior brokers

Be expected to move fast and think commercially

What Success Looks Like

Submissions go to market faster and at higher quality

Renewals are proactive, not reactive

Clients are better covered without needing to chase

Onshore brokers can focus on winning and relationships because you’ve handled the engine room



Why Join Maverick

Be part of a high-growth brokerage from the ground up

Work with a team that values speed, quality, and ownership

Clear progression as the business scales

Competitive offshore salary + performance upside



To Apply



Submit your resume along with a short answer:



“Walk us through how you would prepare a commercial client for renewal from 90 days out to binding cover.”

title: CX Specialist
description:
WHO WE ARE

We don’t just build dream homes and mansions— we create sanctuaries in nature where artists, athletes, and visionaries come to disconnect from the noise, recharge, and find inspiration to create what’s next.



WHY YOU’LL LOVE THIS

- Starting at Php 45K+ (85K when you included our numerous benefits – Free Unemployment Insurance, Bonuses, etc.)

- 100% remote. Work from the beach, the mountains, or another city, you’re free!

- Low stress, no burnout

- Minimum of 24 days off a year. Not to escape life, but to live it on your terms

- Free & Full Healthcare coverage (HMO & Health Insurance)

- Free Mental Health coverage

- HAVE FUN at our team-building events in BGC with our Beverly Hills & Manila teams. We're talking about haunted houses, yoga, muay thai, painting, Korean BBQ, rooftop happy hours, dancing, and karaoke!



WHAT YOU’LL BE DOING

- Follow-Up with Warm Leads: Talk to guests who already showed interest—like people who canceled a booking or stayed with us before. You’ll reach out by phone or
 to see how we can help, share new spots they might like, and help them plan their next stay. No cold calling, ever!

- AI Assistance: We use AI to identify users who either abandoned their cart during checkout or are no longer actively staying with us. The AI calls these users to see if they need help completing their booking. If they do, we connect them with you to finalize their reservation.

- Subscription: We offer a subscription plan that gives guests access to all of our locations. When someone calls to cancel, your job is to explain the benefits and value of staying subscribed, and help them make the most of their membership.

- Mega Team Retreats: We fly everyone in from our U.S. and Asia team to Bonifacio Global City for Mega Team Retreats. All expenses paid. Flights. Hotels. Vibes. Steak Dinners. Pilates. MMA. Painting. Drinks. Connection.



Apply here: 





See the vibe:

title: Sr. Web Developer-PH
description:
ABOUT THE ROLE: 



THIS IS A PART-TIME TO FULLTIME ROLE (will start as part-time for 60-90 days then transition to fulltime)!



We’re looking for a Senior Web Developer to join our dev team. You thrive building beautiful, high-performing websites and digital experiences for top-tier brands. You can lead multiple projects, mentor other developers, and communicate clearly with clients while still getting deep in the code when needed.



RESPONSIBILITIES: 



In this role, you'll get to...



lead development of WordPress using ACF, custom blocks, Twig templating, custom post types, and block-based themes, with performance, accessibility, SEO, and high-quality execution built in

build projects with headless CMS platforms like Contentful, Storyblok, or WordPress as a headless backend, leveraging REST API or GraphQL, and using frontend frameworks like Next.js or Nuxt.js with headless architectures

create pixel-perfect, fully functioning frontends using Tailwind CSS, GSAP , and other modern frontend technologies, ensuring responsive, interactive, and high-performance experiences

integrate backend systems, APIs, CRMs, marketing automation (Salesforce, Marketo, HubSpot, careers platforms), AI tools, and eCommerce solutions

own CI/CD workflows and deploy sites across Vercel, Netlify, AWS, Kinsta, and WP Engine, including edge/CDN optimizations

serve as a primary technical point of contact for internal teams (PM, design, SEO) and clients, translating complex ideas into clear recommendations

mentor junior developers and provide technical leadership across multiple projects

collaborate using Figma, Slack, Teamwork, and Pastel to bring designs to life efficiently

perform other ad hoc duties related to the role as assigned

REQUIREMENTS: 



On day one, we'll expect you to...



have 7+ years of web development experience, ideally in agency environments

have strong full-stack expertise, comfortable with both frontend and backend

have deep knowledge of modern WordPress, headless CMS, Next.js or Nuxt.js, Tailwind, GSAP, CI/CD, deployments, and integrations

have proven experience leading multiple projects and teams, with excellent client-facing communication

have hands-on experience with API integrations, marketing automation, AI tools, eCommerce, SEO, security, and DevOps

be detail-oriented, proactive, and capable of translating technical decisions into actionable solutions

be open to part-time to fulltime opportunity

have a fully functional and up-to-date computer with which to perform duties

be willing to install next-generation endpoint protection on the computer

be willing to work in US Pacific time zone (8:00am-5:00pm PST) corresponding to 12:00am -9:00am PH time

be a current resident of the Philippines and legally able to perform work from there

What separates the best from the rest:



advanced GSAP/ animations experience

mentorship, client management, and cross-team collaboration experience

experience optimizing performance, accessibility, SEO, security, and DevOps at scale

Edge and CDN strategy experience for modern web projects

NOTES:



Benefits await full-time contractors. 

This is a remote (work from home) position.



TO APPLY: ** DO NOT SEND YOUR APPLICATION HERE IN INDEED** Follow the instructions below:



1. COPY & PASTE this link to your browser: 

2. Fill out the form and submit your resume to our system.



We will reach out to you via
 using our system!

Thank you!

title: Outbound Phone Consultant
description:
We're a fast-growing B2B outbound lead generation team based in Australia that's currently looking for outbound telemarketers to join our team.



All of our clients are Australian based so enjoy working daytime hours while working for a company that cares and has a great culture among our staff.



As a cold caller we expect you to have very high standard of spoken English and some cold calling experience is preferred. You will be an excellent sales person, not just reading from a script but having high level conversations with prospects. If you're good then we'll reward you.



You will be paid a base salary with generous commissions so expect to earn $600-$850+ usd per month minimum. This will be scaled based on performance



As part of your application, we require the following

- voice recording (if you're stuck for things to say tell us why you love sales and want to work as a cold caller)

- DISC profile that shows us the breakdown of your scores (no tony robbins reports please)



If you don't provide the above your application will not be considered.

title: Rockstar Cold Caller | Strictly B2B Experience Only
description:
We’re an Australian telemarketing company that partners with high-performing businesses across Australia. Our team specializes in generating qualified B2B appointments and building strong client relationships through professional outreach.



We’re looking for an experienced B2B Cold Caller who can confidently engage decision-makers, handle objections, and book quality appointments. This is a full-time role (no double jobs, please — we value focus and consistency).



Key Responsibilities: Conduct outbound B2B calls to company decision-makers in Australia. Qualify leads and set appointments based on campaign requirements. Maintain accurate records of calls and outcomes in CRM. Follow scripts and objection-handling frameworks effectively. Deliver results aligned with daily and weekly KPIs.



Qualifications: 

At least 1 year of solid B2B cold calling experience (required — we won’t consider applicants without this). 

Excellent English communication skills — clear, confident, and engaging. 

Strong understanding of sales communication and lead qualification. 

Comfortable working independently and meeting targets. 

Stable internet connection and noise-free work environment. 

Willing to work 6AM–3PM Manila Time (Australian shift).



Compensation & Growth: 550+ USD/month base depending on experience. Performance-based scaling and incentives available.



Important: We’re hiring for dedicated full-time tea
mbers only. Holding multiple jobs may affect your performance — if we find this to be the case, we’ll unfortunately have to let you go.



Application Requirements: Please include your DISC profile report (with a clear breakdown of your scores — no Tony Robbins reports, please) along with your resume and a short voice recording introducing yourself.



If you’re a driven cold caller who thrives on results and wants to grow with a supportive, fast-paced team — we’d love to hear from you!

title: Wordpress Developer [Full Stack]
description:
About the Role

We are looking for a highly skilled and experienced Senior WordPress Full Stack Developer to join our growing team. In this role, you will lead end-to-end development of complex WordPress-based web applications, from database architecture and server-side logic to custom themes, plugins, and front-end interfaces.

You will collaborate closely with designers, project managers, and stakeholders to deliver scalable, high-performance digital solutions. The ideal candidate is self-driven, detail-oriented, and passionate about clean, maintainable code.



Key Responsibilities

- Design, develop, and maintain custom WordPress themes and plugins from scratch

- Build and integrate RESTful APIs and third-party services (payment gateways, CRMs, etc.)

- Develop responsive, cross-browser compatible front-end interfaces using HTML5, CSS3, and JavaScript

- Architect and optimize MySQL databases for performance and scalability

- Manage and configure web hosting environments (cPanel, Linux servers, Nginx/Apache)

- Implement security best practices, including WordPress hardening and vulnerability patching

- Conduct code reviews and provide technical mentorship to junior developers

- Collaborate with UI/UX teams to translate wireframes into fully functional pages

- Optimize website performance including Core Web Vitals, page speed, and caching strategies

- Manage version control using Git and participate in CI/CD workflows

- Troubleshoot and resolve bugs, performance issues, and compatibility conflicts

- Document technical specifications, development processes, and API integrations



Required Qualifications

- Minimum 5 years of hands-on WordPress development experience

- Strong proficiency in PHP (OOP), JavaScript (ES6+), HTML5, and CSS3/SASS

- Deep understanding of WordPress core, hooks, filters, the WP REST API, and WP-CLI

- Experience with popular page builders (Elementor, Divi, Gutenberg/Block Editor)

- Proficiency with MySQL — query optimization, stored procedures, and schema design

- Solid experience with React.js or Vue.js for modern front-end development

- Familiarity with Node.js and headless/decoupled WordPress architectures

- Strong command of Git, GitHub/GitLab, and collaborative branching workflows

- Experience with cloud platforms such as AWS, Google Cloud, or DigitalOcean

- Knowledge of SEO best practices and technical SEO implementation

- Proven ability to work independently and deliver projects on schedule



Preferred Qualifications

- Experience with WooCommerce development, customizations, and payment gateway integrations

- Familiarity with Docker, Kubernetes, or containerized development environments

- Knowledge of GraphQL and headless CMS setups (e.g., WPGraphQL + Next.js)

- Experience with Multisite WordPress installations and management

- Background in Agile/Scrum development methodologies

- Contributions to open-source WordPress themes or plugins

- Experience with testing frameworks (PHPUnit, Jest, Cypress)



How to Apply:

Fill this form:
