title: Client Support Specialist
description:
Woflow is the leading merchant experience platform that empowers technology platforms to onboard and manage their merchant data. By deploying AI and human-in-the-loop processes, we extract, enhance, and connect catalog and image data. To date, our platform has supported millions of businesses – from SMBs to enterprise retailers – in succeeding on platforms like Uber, Walmart, Square, DoorDash, Toast, Lightspeed, and many others.



We are looking for a Client Support Specialist who can bring expertise and dedication to supporting our clients and ensuring a seamless onboarding process onto our platform.



Role Overview:

As a Client Support Specialist, you will be responsible for onboarding merchants to our tech platform and providing ongoing support to American clients. You’ll play a vital role in ensuring client satisfaction by assisting with technical issues and fostering a positive user experience.



This role requires someone who can operate effectively under pressure, manage urgent timelines, and confidently handle escalations while maintaining a high level of professionalism and empathy.

You should be highly organized, with strong project management skills, and capable of balancing multiple client needs without compromising quality or responsiveness.



Key Responsibilities:

- Support merchants through a full end-to-end platform onboarding process, guiding them in adapting to our tool and troubleshooting any issues.

- Engage with clients via
 and phone, ensuring all interactions are handled with professionalism and clarity.

- Respond to and resolve technical inquiries in a timely and efficient manner.

- Maintain accurate records of interactions and follow up to ensure client satisfaction.

- Collaborate with cross-functional teams to escalate and resolve complex issues.

- Own and manage urgent client requests and escalations, ensuring timely resolution while keeping stakeholders informed.

- Prioritize and manage multiple workflows simultaneously, ensuring deadlines and service-level expectations are consistently met.

- Exercise strong judgment in client communication, especially during escalations, by acknowledging issues, demonstrating accountability, and avoiding overly scripted or tone-deaf responses.





Requirements:

- Experience: At least 5 years of experience in client success or account management, with a proven track record of overseeing client accounts and effectively managing interactions across multiple communication channels (chat,
, and calls). Prior experience in a senior, lead, or managerial capacity is highly preferred.

- B2B Technical Solutions: Proven experience in providing B2B technical solutions, including resolving complex technical issues, assisting with system integrations, and delivering tailored product implementations, while maintaining strong client relationships and ensuring adherence to service-level agreements (SLAs). 

- Client Engagement: Demonstrated expertise in supporting U.S. clients, prioritizing exceptional customer satisfaction.

- Language: Fluent in English, with strong written and verbal communication skills. You can break down and articulate complex ideas in simple, understandable ways.

- Organization: Highly organized with strong attention to detail. Have a great approach to high-level accuracy within a deadline-driven environment.

- Organization & Project Management: Highly organized with strong project management skills, capable of managing competing priorities, tracking progress across multiple clients, and delivering within tight deadlines.

- Escalation Management: Proven ability to handle high-pressure situations, urgent timelines, and client escalations with professionalism, accountability, and sound judgment.

- Communication Judgment: Demonstrated ability to communicate thoughtfully during sensitive situations, ensuring responses are empathetic, context-aware, and not overly reliant on templates or scripts.

 - Adaptability: Comfortable working in a dynamic startup environment and taking ownership of client issues. You are highly proactive, curious, driven, and self-sufficient.



Benefits:

- Fully remote full-time job - work from anywhere in the world!

- Competitive salary

- Initial training and continued team support provided.

- Grow with us as we grow!



If you are interested, please submit your application along with your resume. 



Thank you.

title: Video Editor for Weekly YouTube Channel (must understand retention & hooks)
description:
About the channel:

I run a small YouTube channel (6000+ subscribers) focused on classical yoga (in the tradition of Sadhguru), coaching, identity work, emotional intelligence, and personal transformation for ambitious professionals and entrepreneurs.





What I'm looking for:

A long-term collaboration with a skilled, reliable video editor to produce one fully edited video per week (with a minimum of 2–3 videos per month). You will handle the complete editing process from raw footage to final upload-ready video.





Yourresponsibilities include:

- Editing a strong, scroll-stopping intro (first 90 seconds to 3 minutes) — this is the most critical part of each video and where most editing effort goes

- Creating re-hooks between chapters — short visual or editorial moments (B-roll transitions, jump cuts, text elements) designed to maintain viewer attention and reduce drop-off

- Cutting out verbal mistakes and filler (I typically say "okay, let's do this one again" on camera to mark retakes)

- Selecting and placing B-roll footage (from a provided personal collection and from HiggsField, an AI tool we subscribe to for generating custom images and video clips)

- Selecting background music that fits the mood and content

- Adding text overlays such as chapter titles, key terms, and references where indicated

- Editing guided meditation or practice segments, which typically involve a static screen with background music





How we collaborate:

For each video, I share either the full script or a detailed outline as a document. I use comments within the document to mark where specific text overlays, chapter headings, references, or particular B-roll should be inserted. This gives you clear structure and minimizes back-and-forth.

Once we're in sync, very few revision rounds should be needed. During the initial onboarding phase, some additional iterations are expected and completely normal.





Time allocation:

Editing each video will likely take approximately 6–10 hours to edit depending on complexity (usually 40 minutes of raw video with fillers / gaps into 25 minutes of final cut). Most of the editing time is spent on the intro section; the remainder of the video tends to follow a more consistent structure. 





Reference videos:

Please review these three sample videos to understand the style, pacing, and quality level we expect:













How to apply:

Before we begin working together, I'd like to see a 30-90 second edited intro based on a raw video file and its script (see below).

Please deliver the result as a Google Drive link. This gives both of us a clear picture of fit and quality before committing.

No need to invest more than 1 hour for this.





Here's the input for the trial intro:

- raw files in German (video):





- raw file with English voiceover:





- script with notes on what to edit:





Once we start working together, I'll also provide:

--> Personal B-roll collection (access granted once collaboration starts)

--> Higgs Field subscription for generating custom AI images and video B-roll





I look forward to finding a long-term editing partner!

If you have experience with coaching, wellness, or educational YouTube content, that's a plus — but strong editing instincts and reliability matter most.

title: Junior HTML Content Assistant (Template-Based Page Creation)
description:
We are seeking a detail-oriented individual to assist with creating

location-based HTML pages using a predefined template. This is a

structured, repeatable workflow. The role does not require advanced

programming knowledge, but does require strong attention to detail,

solid written English, and the ability to follow instructions

precisely.



Scope of Work



The individual will be responsible for producing multiple HTML pages

per day based on provided templates, training materials, and examples.

Each page corresponds to a specific geographic location and must

follow consistent formatting and content guidelines.



Core Responsibilities



Create HTML pages using a pre-built template

Follow a step-by-step video walkthrough and written instructions

Generate location-specific content using AI tools (instructions provided)

Insert and format content correctly within the template

Source 2 to 4 relevant images per location (when available)

Ensure consistency, formatting accuracy, and completeness for each page

Work through assigned locations sequentially (typically grouped by county)

Upload completed work to Google Drive at the end of each workday



Daily Workflow



Identify assigned locations within a county

Source relevant images for each location

Generate page content using provided AI workflow (Google Gemini and GPT)

Build the HTML page using the template

Review for formatting and accuracy

Upload completed files to Google Drive



Required Skills



Strong written English (critical requirement)

High attention to detail and ability to follow instructions exactly

Basic familiarity with HTML structure (no advanced coding required)

Ability to use a code editor such as Visual Studio Code

Comfort working with structured, repetitive workflows



Required Tools / Access



Code editor (e.g., Visual Studio Code)

Access to Google Gemini

Access to ChatGPT

Google account for Drive access and file uploads



Nice to Have (Not Required)



Prior experience with HTML page creation

Familiarity with AI-assisted content workflows

Basic understanding of SEO formatting principles



Output Expectations



Clean, properly formatted HTML files

Accurate placement of content within the template

Consistent structure across all pages

Daily delivery of completed work via Google Drive



Notes



This role is process-driven. Success depends more on consistency,

accuracy, and instruction-following than on technical expertise. We

will provide training materials, templates, and examples.

title: Ecommerce Merchandising Assistant
description:
The Ecommerce Merchandising Coordinator manages the operational side of our Shopify store and product catalog. You will build and maintain product pages, manage collections, edit meta fields, and ensure that every product is presented accurately and consistently across the store. You will work closely with our existing Ecommerce Merchandising Assistant, who will cross-train you on our systems and SOPs, and collaborate with our web team and design team to support product launches and catalog updates.



**Key Responsibilities**



Shopify Product Management



- Build and update product pages including titles, descriptions, meta fields, tags, pricing, and images

- Organize and maintain Shopify collections, including sort order and merchandising logic

- Ensure all product pages meet brand standards for completeness, consistency, and visual presentation

- Support product launches and catalog updates in coordination with the broader team



Product Catalog Systems



- Maintain and update the Product Catalog in Notion

- Keep Notion and Shopify in sync across product names, SKUs, statuses, and assets

- Flag missing information, broken links, or inconsistencies in the catalog



Merchandising & Store Experience



- Assist with navigation structure and collection organization so products are easy to find

- Work on product page templates to ensure a consistent store experience

- Support campaign alignment by ensuring product pages and collections reflect active marketing priorities



Cross-functional Coordination



- Work closely with the existing Ecommerce Merchandising Assistant and web team

- Communicate weekly priorities and task updates through Slack

title: Executive Assistant – Bookkeeping & Tax Firm
description:
I’m looking for a proactive Executive Assistant to help run my bookkeeping and tax firm.



This role will act as my right-hand person to keep the firm organized, track deadlines, and ensure nothing falls behind.



Your job is to track client documents, monitor deadlines, and make sure financials are completed and sent.



Responsibilities:

• Track client documents (bank statements, credit cards, receipts)

• Follow up with clients for missing documents

• Track tax return deadlines (1040, 1120S, 1065, etc.)

• Track payroll deadlines

• Track payroll tax filing deadlines (941, 940, state payroll, etc.)

• Track state revenue deadlines (sales tax, excise tax, DOR, etc.)

• Track monthly financials for all clients

•
 bookkeepers if financials are missing

• Maintain trackers for documents, financials, payroll, and taxes

• Send daily update of priorities

• Manage task lists and help prioritize my workload

• Help keep the firm organized and running smoothly



You will help keep the firm organized and ensure nothing falls behind.



Requirements:

• Strong English

• Organized and proactive

• Executive assistant or operations experience preferred

• Experience with bookkeeping or accounting firms preferred

• Comfortable following up with clients and team members

• Detail oriented and deadline focused

• Available during US business hours



This is a long-term role, starting part time with the potential for full time.

title: Salesforcde Experince admin
description:
Here’s your final job ad with the test built in — clean, sharp, and filters out weak candidates immediately



Salesforce Admin / Automation Specialist (Part-Time

12



We’re a fast-moving UK promotional merchandise company working with major global brands. We are looking for a high-level Salesforce Admin who can go beyond basic admin and actively build, optimise, and automate workflows.



If you’re just doing data entry or basic CRM upkeep — this role is not for you.



?



What You’ll Be Doing:

   •   Designing and building automated workflows in Salesforce

   •   Creating systems that reduce manual work

   •   Cleaning and structuring data for automation readiness

   •   Building and maintaining reports, dashboards, and pipelines

   •   Managing integrations (Apollo, APIs, third-party tools)

   •   Identifying inefficiencies and fixing them proactively



?



What We’re Looking For:

   •   Strong experience with Salesforce automation (Flows, Process Builder, etc.)

   •   Ability to think commercially, not just technically

   •   Experience building end-to-end CRM workflows

   •   Confident working independently and making decisions

   •   High attention to detail

   •   Excellent written English



?



Bonus (Highly Valuable):

   •   Experience with 
 or outbound sales tools

   •   API / integration experience (Zapier, Make, etc.)

   •   Experience in sales-driven businesses



?



Hours & Pay:

   •   10–15 hours per week

   •   Flexible working hours

   •   Long-term role

   •   Pay reflects skill level — we want quality, not cheap



?



Test Task (Required – Do Not Skip)



We want to see how you think.



Scenario:

We generate leads via Apollo and import them into Salesforce.

The data is messy, duplicated, and not structured properly.



We want to:

   •   Clean the data automatically

   •   Assign leads to the correct salesperson

   •   Trigger follow-ups and tasks

   •   Track everything clearly in Salesforce



Your Task:

Explain briefly:

 1. How you would structure this workflow in Salesforce

 2. What automations (Flows/processes) you would build

 3. How you would handle duplicate data

 4. How you would assign leads automatically

 5. What key fields and stages you would create



Bonus:

Suggest improvements or tools you would use



Keep your answer concise. No generic answers.



?



To Apply:

Include:

 1. Your Salesforce experience (brief)

 2. Example of a workflow/automation you’ve built

 3. Your hourly rate

 4. The word “AUTOMATE” at the top of your application

 5. Your answer to the test task above



?



We’re looking for someone who can take ownership, build systems, and make the business more efficient — not someone who waits for instructions

title: Virtual Assistant for Instagram (Fitness & Sports)
description:
If you have an eye for talent, live and breathe the fitness world, and want to be rewarded for spotting the next big creator, keep reading.



About Us

We are building an exclusive, high-level community for top-tier sports, health, and wellness creators. We help fitness influencers and athletes scale their impact and their business.



We are currently looking for a driven, remote Creator Scout to help us identify and recruit the next generation of fitness stars. Your job is simple: be our "head scout," find high-potential talent across social platforms, and bring them into our ecosystem.



What You’ll Do

You are the first point of contact for future stars. Your daily wins will include:

Scouting: Actively searching platforms (Instagram) to find emerging athletes and health influencers who fit our criteria.



Note: You are not managing the creators. Your singular focus is discovering high-quality talent.



What We Provide

- Clear Targeting: We will train you exactly on what our ideal creator "avatar" looks like.

- Resources: Proven systems and programms to deliver high performance.

- Coaching: Regular feedback to help you improve your working system and your numbers.

- Growth: A clear progression path into senior talent management or recruitment roles for top performers.



Pay and Progression

This role is designed to reward results. It includes:

- A fixed monthly base amount, plus

- Additional performance-based pay for every qualified creator you find.



Motivated scouts who consistently hit their targets can build a highly lucrative income stream. Exact details of the compensation structure and progression path will be explained during the interview process.



Who You Are (You're a fit if...)

- Reliable & Honest: You show up, do the work, and communicate transparently.

- Highly Motivated: You are a self-starter who loves the thrill of the hunt and hitting targets.

- Culturally Plugged In: You naturally consume fitness content and know what makes a good creator stand out from the crowd.

- Adaptable: You like having a framework to follow, but you can pivot and personalize your approach based on the creator you are talking to.

- Equipped: You have reliable internet, a working computer, and a quiet place to work.



Requirements

- Strong written and spoken English.

- Comfortable using Instagram.



How to Apply



This is a short form where we ask about your experience, your familiarity with the fitness space, and your expectations. If it looks like a potential fit on paper, we will reach out with the next steps for an interview!

title: Ecommerce - Shopify / Etsy/ Tiktok
description:

We are seeking a highly skilled SEO Product Specialist to join our growing Filipino-based eCommerce team. You will be responsible for optimizing product listings across Etsy, Shopify, and Tiktok to ensure our products rank high and convert effectively. We operate 5 eCommerce stores that require ongoing SEO updates and A+ content creation. You will create graphics, update listings, add new products, update pricing, and more.



You will be working directly with our team lead/team that is based in the Philippines; however, work hours are 10 PM GMT to 3 AM GMT, and PHP time  25 to 30 hours per week 



Responsibilities

Optimize product titles, tags, descriptions, and backend SEO across multiple platforms.

Upload and configure Shopify product listings with SEO-optimized content.

Add products, manage, and update TikTok Seller Central listings.

Create engaging A+ Content (Amazon Enhanced Brand Content) with strong visuals and persuasive copy.

Stay up to date with platform algorithm changes (Etsy SEO, Amazon SEO, Shopify SEO, TikTok SEO).

Collaborate with our remote team on product strategy and performance tracking.

Amazon PPC ads are a plus.



Skills & Requirements

Strong understanding of Shopify product setup and management.- 

Minimum 2-3 years of proven SEO experience (multi-platform preferred).

Knowledge of TikTok Seller Central functions. & how to sync products from Shopify to Tiktok. (we do not do direct setup in Tiktok) 

Dependable, detail-oriented, and serious about long-term work.





Graphic design skills for creating A+ content, banners, and product images. ( Photoshop & Canva) is a plus 





Must have a Wise account for payments.

Must be fluent in English - written and verbal.





Application Instructions

Resume

Interview Policy

Interviews will not be conducted without video.



This role is designed for individuals who are committed to building a stable, long-term career and are eager to grow with our team. If that sounds like you, we’re excited to meet you!

title: High Level Video Editor
description:
Join The Collaborative Co. - a fast-growing boutique Virtual Assistant agency supporting small businesses, solo entrepreneurs, and service providers across Australia.



We are looking for a High-Level Reel & Video Editor to create premium, scroll-stopping content for both Meta ads and organic social media. 



This is not a standard social media editing role. This position requires a video editor level of skill, with strong experience transforming still images and raw footage into engaging, high-performing content using cinematic motion, advanced transitions, and intentional pacing.



This role will support trade businesses and clients by producing high-quality reels and short-form video content designed to capture attention and drive performance.





About the Role



You will work closely with us to produce polished, engaging content assets for our trade business clients. The standard of work expected is closer to a YouTube or short-form video editor than a typical social media content creator. Every still image is an opportunity for motion, depth, and storytelling - and you will know exactly how to bring that to life.





Key Responsibilities



Edit high-level reels for Meta ads and organic social content

Transform still images and raw footage into engaging motion-based content

Apply cinematic motion techniques including zooms, pans, parallax, and layered movement

Use advanced transitions and pacing to maintain viewer engagement

Create scroll-stopping content optimised for performance

Ensure all content aligns with brand guidelines and client expectations

Deliver polished, professional edits suitable for paid advertising

Optimise content for Instagram Reels and short-form video formats

Collaborate with the creative team on content direction and improvements

Manage editing workflow and meet deadlines consistently





Qualifications & Skills



Minimum 2 to 3 years experience in content editing, motion graphics, or video production

A portfolio demonstrating high-quality still editing with motion, transitions, and cinematic techniques — examples of Instagram Reels or Meta ad creatives strongly preferred

Expert-level proficiency in Adobe Premiere Pro, After Effects, CapCut Pro, or equivalent editing software

Strong eye for visual design, colour, and pacing

Experience editing content for Meta ads or social media platforms

Ability to work independently and manage your own output against deadlines

Strong written communication skills for client-facing file notes and feedback

Proactive and solutions-focused — you bring ideas, not just completed tasks

Honest, reliable, and transparent in how you communicate progress and blockers

Industry experience in trade or construction is not required — a willingness to learn our clients' world is highly valued





Tools You Will Use



Editing & Motion: Adobe Premiere Pro, Adobe After Effects, CapCut Pro (or equivalent)

Design Support: Canva

File Management & Delivery: Google Drive

Communication: Slack, WhatsApp

Project Management & Coordination: ClickUp, Google Workspace (Docs, Sheets, Gmail)





Hours & Schedule



Part-time role starting at 10 hours per week

Flexible working hours with alignment to Melbourne Timezone for meetings and delivery deadlines





Work Requirements



Reliable, fast internet connection — large file uploads and downloads are part of the role

Quiet working environment suitable for virtual meetings

Own hardware capable of running professional editing software without performance issues

Ability to receive, organise, and return raw content files via shared cloud storage





Location



Remote

Reliable, high-speed internet connection capable of uploading and downloading large video and image files

Quiet, professional working environment suitable for virtual meetings

Personal hardware capable of running professional editing software at full performance

Backup plan for internet or hardware issues to minimise delivery disruption





How to Apply



If you have the skills, the portfolio, and the drive to produce content at this level - we want to hear from you. Please complete our application form at the link below. Make sure to include a link to your portfolio or examples of previous editing work. Applications without a portfolio will not be considered.







We look forward to seeing your work.

title: Senior Business Development Manager (B2B Healthcare & NDIS) - ANZ Market
description:
Senior Business Development Manager (B2B Healthcare & NDIS) - ANZ Market

Location: Remote (Philippines)



Engagement Type: Full-Time Independent Contractor (40 hours per week, Australian Business Hours)



Company: CDM Direct



About Us CDM Direct is a leading provider of outsourced operational support and customer experience solutions. We are currently executing a major expansion across the Australia and New Zealand (ANZ) markets, specifically targeting the Aged Care and National Disability Insurance Scheme (NDIS) sectors.



We provide high-value, tech-enabled operational support—including our flagship 'Rostering as a Service' (RaaS) solution powered by Zoom Contact Centre AI—to solve severe administrative, financial, and compliance bottlenecks for healthcare providers.



The Role This is not a scripted call centre role. This is a highly strategic, consultative B2B sales position working directly alongside our Australian leadership team.



As our market expansion lead, you will be responsible for driving new business acquisition across the ANZ health sector. You will:

• Conduct highly targeted, unscripted outreach to engage senior business decision-makers (CEOs, CFOs, Partners, and Operations Managers).

• Lead commercial conversations to uncover operational chaos, staffing bottlenecks, and financial pain points.

• Position CDM Direct’s RaaS and outsourced solutions with absolute clarity and commercial credibility.

• Secure "Qualified Meetings" (QMBs) for our senior sales executives, directly driving the top of the revenue pipeline.



The Ideal Candidate (The "Hunter") We are exclusively recruiting Tier 1 B2B sales talent. To succeed in this role, you must possess severe commercial resilience and a genuine "hunter" mentality. You will be dealing with busy executives in a highly regulated industry; you must be comfortable handling objections, navigating gatekeepers, and creating commercial urgency from scratch.



• Minimum 3+ years of proven success in outbound B2B sales, KPO, or SaaS business development.

• Exceptional, polished English communication skills capable of peer-to-peer conversations with Australian C-Suite executives.



• Deep discipline, self-management, and the resilience to execute daily strategic outreach in a remote environment.

• A stable, private home office with reliable high-speed internet.



What We Are NOT Looking For



• Entry-level customer service or call centre agents.

• Telemarketers who rely on rigid scripts.

• Candidates seeking a passive account management role; this is a proactive pipeline-generation position.



Remuneration & Commercial Benefits



We offer a highly lucrative, performance-driven commercial package designed to reward top performers:



• Base Retainer: PHP 85,000 per month.

• Health & Wellbeing: Up to PHP 50,000 annual allowance to fully reimburse the cost of a premium private HMO plan for you and one dependent.

• Year-End Bonus: An annual service bonus equivalent to one month's base fee (13th month), paid in December.

• Activity Bonus: NZ$50 for every Qualified Meeting Booked (QMB) to supplement your income while your pipeline builds.

• Revenue Commission: An uncapped 2.5% commission on the Year 1 Contract Value of closed deals, with an accelerator to 5% for high performance.



• Leave & Lifestyle: You will observe standard Australian public holidays as non-working days without any reduction to your base fee. After 12 months, you are permitted 10 days of planned unavailability per annum.



How to Apply



If you have the resilience and the commercial acumen to drive this expansion, please submit:

1. Your updated CV.

2. A link to your LinkedIn profile.

3. A brief cover letter outlining your most successful experience generating outbound B2B meetings with senior executives.

title: Virtual Assistant Content Management (VA)
description:
About Us:



We are a rapidly growing digital marketing agency specializing in online brand development and audience engagement. Our team operates within a structured, performance-driven framework, guided by core values of discipline, organization, and continuous improvement.



If you are seeking a long-term, stable Virtual Assistant position that allows you to master a specific skill set within a well-defined system, free from chaotic management then this role is an ideal fit.



Role Overview:



As a Content Management VA, you will be responsible for publishing and optimizing content across major online discussion boards and aggregators



This is a high-volume, process-oriented role. It does not involve writing lengthy articles or creating graphic designs. Success depends on precision, timing, and strict adherence to established checklists.



Candidates who enjoy completing structured task lists and achieving a focused workflow will excel in this position. Those who require frequent variety and creative autonomy should consider whether this role aligns with their preferences.



Key Responsibilities:



-Publish pre-written content across targeted online communities following our Standard Operating Procedures (SOPs).



-Research trending posts and make minor caption adjustments to comply with specific community rules.



-Ensure full compliance with platform-specific guidelines (training will be provided).



-Monitor live posts and escalate issues in real time.



-Record daily activity metrics in a simple spreadsheet.



Essential (Hard Requirements):



-Extreme attention to detail, You notice even minor discrepancies, such as misplaced punctuation.



-SOP adherence, You prefer clearly defined instructions for completing tasks.



-Reliable internet connection, Non-negotiable; a stable connection is mandatory.



-Self-sufficiency, You can work independently from home without requiring direct supervision.



Preferred (Not Required):



-Previous experience as a Virtual Assistant.



-Basic understanding of online trends and why certain content performs well.



No prior experience? No problem. Full training is provided. We value attitude and reliability over years of experience.



Compensation & Growth



Base Salary: Competitive monthly rate (above standard VA rates on this platform for the right candidate).



Growth: Top performers within 90 days will receive a 15–25% salary increase and opportunities for leadership roles.



Environment: 100% remote. No phone calls; communication is conducted via text-based Slack.



How to Apply (Read Carefully)



If you are organized, reliable, and results-driven, please complete our short application form (2–3 minutes).

title: Virtual Assistant – Property Management (Remote)
description:
We are seeking a highly organized, proactive, and detail-oriented Virtual Assistant to support our property management operations. The ideal candidate will have experience in guest and client relations, maintenance coordination, and administrative support within the short-term rental industry.



Experience with short-term rentals (STR) is required, and mid-term rental experience is strongly preferred. Familiarity with property management software and tools used in the STR space is essential.



This is a fully remote position requiring approximately 8 hours per day. As our company is actively expanding, this role offers significant opportunities for increased responsibility, compensation, and career growth within the first year and beyond.



?Key Responsibilities

?Guest & Tenant Management

?Respond promptly to guest and tenant inquiries, and manage communication regarding property-related concerns.

?Maintain a strong understanding of systems and processes related to short-term rental operations.

?Track guest payments, service issues, and important documentation.

?Assist with guest screening, move-in and move-out coordination, and lease renewals.

?Anticipate guest needs and deliver a hospitality-focused service experience.



?Maintenance Coordination

?Coordinate maintenance and repair requests and ensure issues are resolved efficiently.

?Communicate with cleaners, vendors, and maintenance personnel to ensure smooth operations.

?Maintain detailed records of work orders, repairs, and service history.



?Client (Property Owner) Management

?Maintain regular communication with property owners and prospective clients.

?Provide updates on property performance, guest issues, and upcoming lease renewals.

?Assist with onboarding new properties and clients, ensuring a smooth and professional transition.

?Anticipate client needs and maintain a high level of service and professionalism.



?Bookkeeping & Accounting

?(Preferred but not required)

?Assist with rent collection, invoicing, and payment tracking.

?Maintain financial records and assist with account reconciliation as needed.

?Track property expenses and provide financial updates to management.



?Administrative Support

?Strong familiarity with AI productivity tools is highly preferred.

?Support and maintain operational systems used in short-term and mid-term rental management.

?Manage and organize property documents, contracts, and operational records.

?Assist with pricing adjustments and listing optimization.

?Draft and respond to
s, messages, and other communications as required.



?Software & Systems Management

?Utilize property management systems and operational tools to maintain accurate records and streamline workflows.



?Digital Marketing (Preferred but not required)

?Assist with social media efforts to strengthen brand awareness and attract new guests and clients.

?Support content creation and maintain social media channels as needed.



?Lead Generation & Business Development Support

?Assist with lead generation efforts to identify potential property owners and new client opportunities.

?Research and compile lists of prospective clients in target markets.

?Support outreach efforts by contacting and following up with potential clients through
, messaging platforms, or social media.

?Help maintain and update lead tracking systems or CRM tools to ensure organized follow-up.

?Assist management in nurturing relationships with prospective clients and converting leads into new property management partnerships.



?Qualifications

Experience

?Proven experience in short-term rental property management or real estate operations is required.

?Experience with Hospitable PMS is strongly preferred.

?Experience managing both short-term and mid-term rental properties is highly desirable.



?Skills

?Excellent written and verbal communication skills (strong English proficiency required).

?Technically proficient and comfortable learning new software platforms.

?Strong organizational and time management skills with the ability to manage multiple tasks simultaneously.

?Ability to identify operational challenges and implement effective solutions.



?Soft Skills

?Highly organized and detail-oriented.

?Ability to work independently with minimal supervision.

?Comfortable asking questions and seeking clarification when needed.

?Strong critical thinking and problem-solving abilities.

?Professional, reliable, and collaborative in communication.



?Preferred Tools

Experience with the following tools is highly valued:

?Google Workspace

?Hospitable

?Turno

?Relay Bank

?QuickBooks

?Canva

?Slack

?PriceLabs

?AirDNA



?Working Hours

?Approximately 8 hours per day, 40 hrs per week

?Flexible scheduling depending on operational needs

?Opportunity for expanded hours and compensation based on performance



?Compensation

?Competitive hourly rate, based on experience and qualifications.



?Application Process

Please submit your resume along with a self-recorded video answering the following questions. If you do not have experience with a particular scenario, simply move on to the next question.



?Describe a short-term rental property you managed that was underperforming. What metrics did you review, what changes did you implement, and what were the results?

?A guest messages at 9:45 PM saying the home is not clean. What is your immediate response, and what steps do you take within the next hour?

?Share a time when you sensed a guest was unhappy before they explicitly complained. What were the signs, and how did you respond?

?A property owner reports that occupancy has dropped 12% over the past two months and attributes it to management. How do you respond, and what data would you review?

?Describe a system or process you built or significantly improved in a short-term rental operation. What problem were you solving and what improved afterward?

?What PMS, channel managers, and pricing tools have you used? How do you take a property from onboarding to fully operational inside a PMS?

?What operational differences exist between short-term rentals and mid-term rentals? What changes in screening, policies, or systems are required?

?If you were managing 20 properties, how would you structure your daily and weekly workflow to ensure nothing falls through the cracks?

?If bookings are slow 21 days out, what actions would you take before lowering prices?

?Describe a situation where you escalated an issue to a property owner. Why was escalation necessary?

?What makes you stand out from other candidates applying for this role?

?Do you have any questions about the role or responsibilities?

title: Senior Video Editor ( US-Based Brand )
description:
Application Requirements:

1. Use at least 10AP for your application.

2. Include "Senior Video Editor Pro" in your subject line.



Note: Applications missing either requirement will not be considered.

_________________________________________________________



About Veritas Vans

Veritas Vans builds the most trusted accessories for Starlink Mini and Starlink Standard. Our mission is to give people the freedom to work, explore, and stay connected anywhere. From Baja coastlines to deep forest trails, our customers rely on our gear for capability, protection, and unlimited connection.



Your role is to help visually tell this story across all platforms.



Role Overview

We are hiring a Senior Video Editor who can own our long-form YouTube content, high-retention short-form content, and graphic design needs. You must be highly experienced, creative, fast, and able to work autonomously within a growing brand.



Responsibilities



Video Editing – Long Form

- Edit 6–15 minute YouTube videos with strong retention, pacing, and narrative clarity.

- Add b-roll, overlays, captions, music, and brand-consistent graphics.

- Build engaging openings with proven YouTube hook methods.



Video Editing – Short Form

- Execute the Hook ? Retain ? Reward method for Reels, TikTok, and Shorts.

- Add dynamic subtitles, zooms, cuts, 
 inserts, and pacing adjustments.

- Produce scroll-stopping, high-retention content.



Graphic Design & Photo Editing

- Create YouTube thumbnails and graphic assets.

- Design text treatments, overlays, and promotional visuals.

- Edit lifestyle and product photos for multi-platform use.



Brand Storytelling

- Align all edits with our brand themes: freedom, connection, capability, control.

- Contribute creative ideas and concepts for future video content.



AI-Driven Editing & Workflow Optimization

- Use AI tools (ChatGPT, Adobe AI, Topaz, Descript, etc.) as a core part of your editing workflow.

- Generate high-performing hooks, captions, and on-screen text callouts using AI.

- Use AI to research and improve storytelling, pacing, and content structure.

- Continuously explore and implement new AI workflows to improve output quality, speed, and efficiency.

- Leverage AI to enhance both creative output and production throughput, not just assist basic tasks.



Cross-Platform Optimization

- Edit in multiple aspect ratios: 16:9, 9:16, 4:5, 1:1.

- Prepare final deliverables in organized, structured folders.

- Optimize content for YouTube, Instagram, TikTok,
.



Collaboration

- Work closely with the content team and leadership.

- Follow SOPs and meet deadlines consistently.

- Join scheduled calls proactively (no reminders required)

- Be punctual and prepared for feedback sessions



Work Discipline & Delivery Standards

- Be actively available and responsive during working hours (PST schedule).

- Address tasks, revisions, and team communication within working hours.

- Meet deadlines consistently and communicate early if delays occur.

- Submit deliverables early in the workday whenever possible to allow time for review and revisions.



Quality & Output Standards

- Deliver edits that are near publish-ready on first submission.

- Ensure drafts require minimal revisions and are not incomplete or partially executed.

- Perform a full self-review before submission to ensure:

- all feedback is applied

- no new issues are introduced

- output meets brand and quality standards

- Maintain consistently high production quality across all deliverables.



Note:

Include the phrase “Senior Video Editor Pro” in your subject line. Applications missing this phrase will not be considered. Use at least 5AP for your application.



Required Skills



- Ability to work graveyard shift (PST hours)

- 3–5+ years professional video editing experience

- Expert in Adobe Premiere Pro

- Strong skills in After Effects, Photoshop, Illustrator, or Figma

- Proven experience editing YouTube content and high-performing short-form videos

- Strong understanding of retention, pacing, story structure, and attention engineering

- Experience creating high-converting thumbnails

- Strong understanding of modern content trends across YouTube, Instagram, and TikTok

- Ability to edit lifestyle, outdoor, product, and UGC-style content



AI & Workflow Skills (Required)

- Strong proficiency in using AI tools (ChatGPT, Adobe AI, etc.) within editing workflows

- Ability to generate hooks, captions, and on-screen text using AI

- Experience using AI to improve storytelling, pacing, and video performance

- Ability to research and implement new AI workflows to improve efficiency and output quality



Work Ethic & Discipline

- Highly reliable, responsive, and accountable

- Strong attention to detail and ability to self-review work

- Ability to follow feedback precisely and minimize repeated revisions



Bonus Experience

- Motion graphics or animation skills.

- Experience in e-commerce, outdoor brands, or creator channels.

- Understanding of YouTube SEO (titles, thumbnails, keywords).

- Ability to generate ideas for hooks, storylines, and visual treatments.



What We Offer

- Long-term employment with growth potential.

- Competitive salary based on experience.

- Consistent weekly workload.

- Direct impact on a fast-scaling global brand.

- Creative freedom and an opportunity to lead our video direction.



How to Apply



Submit the following:

- Resume

- Short explanation of why you’re the right fit

- Brief explanation of how you use AI in your editing workflow

- 1 example where you improved video performance (retention, CTR, etc.)

- Portfolio of your best long-form and short-form edits

- Links to YouTube channels or brands you’ve edited for



Learn About Us:









Website:

title: English Tutor
description:
Job Title: Academic Tutor (English)



Location: Remote (Global)



Type: Part-Time



Reports To: Director of Academic Programs



About the Role:

Telos Prep is seeking an ethical, professional, and reliable English Tutor to join our remote team. We operate on a specialized team-based model, where students receive comprehensive support from a network of Head Counselors, Essay Editors, and Subject Tutors. As a tutor, you will provide critical subject-specific support to help our students strengthen their academic foundations.



What You'll Do:



- Subject-Specific Tutoring: Provide expert tutoring in English Literature and Language (including AP/Honors levels), focusing on building student confidence in reading comprehension, analytical writing, and academic excellence.

- Student-Centered Instruction: Emphasize clear explanations and a Socratic, student-participation approach to learning rather than simple lecturing.

- Team Collaboration: Work seamlessly within our team-based model, aligning your academic support with the broader strategic goals set by the student's Head Counselor.

- Prompt Communication: Maintain professional, timely communication to support students and families. Respond to client and internal communications promptly, typically within 24 business hours.



Who You Are:



- Educational Background: A Bachelor's degree in English, Literature, Education, or a closely related field is required.

- Tutoring Experience: Proven experience tutoring high school students in English, with a strong preference for candidates familiar with the AP English Language and AP English Literature curricula.

- Tech-Savvy: Comfortable working in a remote, AI-enhanced environment where technology is used to serve the relationship and optimize operations.



Schedule & Work Environment:



- Remote Setup: This role is structured as remote (Global).

- Flexible Hours: Work hours are flexible within reason, provided all deliverables are completed on time and client communication remains timely and professional.

- Availability: Must be available during after-school hours (3:00 PM to 10:00 PM U.S. Time) and on weekends. *(Note: Please consider the time zone difference from your local region when evaluating these hours).*



What We Offer:



- Pay: $10/hour

- Resources: Telos will provide the necessary software subscriptions and tools required for the role.

title: Project Manager
description:
Job Title: Project Manager

Location: Remote (Philippines-based)

Type: Contractual

Reports To: Principal & Founder (with close collaboration with the COO/Head of Operations)



About the Role:

Telos Prep is seeking an ethical, professional, and reliable Project Manager to join our team. We operate on a highly specialized "Team-Based Model," meaning our students are supported not just by one counselor, but by a network of Head Counselors, Essay Editors, Tutors, and Purpose Project Mentors. In this role, you will be the operational glue holding this model together, ensuring our academic advising and project mentorship programs run smoothly. You will serve as the central hub for our team, requiring strong leadership skills to manage workflows and coordinate our remote staff.



What You'll Do:



- Team Coordination & Leadership: Act as the primary point of contact and operational leader for our cross-functional team. Support Head Counselors by ensuring that Essay Editors, Tutors, and Purpose Project Mentors are aligned and executing on their deliverables.

- Progress Tracking: Track student progress and application deadlines across the counseling team, as well as manage and track internal projects being executed by the Telos team.

- Scheduling & Logistics: Coordinate and manage complex schedules between students, Head Counselors, Editors, Tutors, and internal stakeholders.

- Process Improvement: Assist with the development and refinement of internal tracking tools and standard operating procedures (SOPs) within Notion to boost team efficiency.

- Prompt Communication: Respond to client and internal communications promptly, ensuring our standard of a 24-business-hour turnaround is met.



Who You Are:



- Team Management Experience: Proven experience leading, coordinating, or managing teams in a similar remote, agency, or educational setting. Comfortable overseeing workflows for multiple stakeholders and ensuring team accountability.

- Project Management: Strong background in tracking deliverables, managing timelines, and handling logistics for multiple ongoing projects simultaneously.

- Tech-Savvy Operations: Experience working in an "AI-Enhanced" environment. Proficiency in project management databases (e.g. Notion) is highly preferred.



Schedule & Work Environment:



- Fully Remote: This role allows you to work primarily from home.

- Flexible Hours: Work hours are flexible within reason, provided all deliverables are completed on time, team oversight is maintained, and client communication remains timely and professional.

- Availability: Must be available during after-school hours (3:00 PM to 10:00 PM Pacific Time) and on weekends. (Note: 3:00 PM to 10:00 PM Pacific usually translates to 6:00 AM to 1:00 PM or 7:00 AM to 2:00 PM PHT, depending on US Daylight Saving Time).



What We Offer:

- Pay: $900/month

- Resources: Telos will provide the necessary software subscriptions and tools required for the role.

title: Professional Website Builder Shopify/Wordpress
description:
We are an Australian based branding and apparel company looking for a Shopify or Wordpress expert to assist with building a Shopify store for a short term project.



This is a project based role, however if the work is done well there may be ongoing opportunities for future projects.



We are looking for someone who is confident building a store from the ground up and can work efficiently without constant supervision.



Scope of Work



The project will involve:



• Setting up a Shopify/Wordpress store from scratch

• Creating Installing and configuring a Shopify/Wordpress theme

• Creating collections and navigation menus

• Uploading products with variants (Price, sizes and colours)

• Uploading product images and descriptions

• Setting up policies and basic store settings

• Ensuring the store layout is clean and professional

• Making sure everything is organised and easy to manage



Some products will include multiple variants, so experience working with Price, size and colour variants is essential.



Requirements



• Strong experience building Shopify/Wordpress Sites

• Confident working with product variants

• Good understanding of store layout and organisation

• Attention to detail

• Ability to follow instructions

• Fast and reliable communication

• Able to complete work within agreed timeframe

• Experience working with apparel products

• Experience building Shopify/Wordpress stores for clothing brands is a MUST

• Basic graphic design skills

• Experience optimising images for web use



Project Details



• Short term project

• Estimated duration: 1 to 3 weeks

• Potential for ongoing work if successful

• Must be able to communicate clearly and provide progress updates



To Apply



Please include:



• Examples of Shopify/Wordpress stores you have built

• A brief description of your role in those projects

• Your estimated timeframe to complete a store build

• Your hourly rate or project rate



Important:

Start your application with the word “STORE” so we know you have read this job description properly.



Applicants who have built Sites for custom apparel companies encouraged to apply

title: Survey Fielding Manager – Opinion Research
description:
FOR APPLICANTS WITH HANDS-ON SURVEY PROGRAMMING AND FIELDING EXPERIENCE IN PUBLIC OPINION OR MARKET RESEARCH



Remote, (Eastern Time Zone)



Who You Are

You program survey instruments, manage the field, clean the data, coordinate with vendors, and keep projects moving on schedule. You've done this work hands-on at a research firm (not in an academic setting), and you're comfortable owning the technical execution of multiple projects at once.



You may be a fit if:

* You have programmed surveys in Alchemer, Qualtrics, or a comparable professional survey platform - and can set up skip logic, quotas, randomization, piping, and multilanguage surveys without hand-holding

* You've managed survey fielding from launch through close: monitoring quotas, tracking sample quality, and keeping projects on timeline

* You've coordinated with external vendors - panel providers, call centers, mail houses - and can manage those relationships independently

* You have experience with sample preparation: lists manipulation, deduplication, creating clean sample files, generating unique identifiers

* You are meticulous about data quality - you catch errors before they reach anyone else

* You take initiative, ask questions when something is unclear, and don't wait to be told what to do next

* You're comfortable jumping between multiple projects in a fast-paced environment

* You are proficient in Microsoft Office, particularly Excel and PowerPoint

* You can create basic graphics using AI, Canva, or Adobe tools



What you'll do:

* Program and test online surveys in our survey platform, including
 and texting campaigns, logic testing, and distribution setup

* Monitor and manage survey fielding: track quotas, sample quality, response rates, and project timelines

* Coordinate with external vendors - online panel providers, call centers, and mail vendors - and provide regular updates to internal project managers

* Prepare and clean sample files: create organized sample files, generate unique data fields

* Develop mail materials and coordinate with internal team and external mail vendors

* Perform data cleaning on survey outputs to verify data quality and integrity

* Code and analyze open-ended responses

* QC all deliverables: cross-check data sets, verify formatting, catch errors before client delivery

* Build charts, reporting visuals, and basic dashboards in PowerPoint, Canva, or Looker Studio

* Support the research team across the full project lifecycle



What we're NOT looking for:

Someone whose survey experience is limited to academic research or distributing simple online links



Required qualifications:

* At least one year of experience programming and fielding surveys in a professional opinion or market research setting

* Proficiency in online survey programming with a survey platform (tell us which ones you know well)

* Experience managing fielding for market research or public opinion research studies

* Experience with data cleaning and response monitoring

* Strong English writing, proofreading, and communication skills

* Bachelor's degree in marketing, political science, communication, business administration, or a related field



Preferred:

* Experience with SPSS, R, Wincross, or similar statistical/tabulation software



What we provide:

* A collaborative team

* A supportive environment where asking questions is encouraged

* Company-paid PhilHealth or HMO

* 13th month pay

* Paid time off



TO APPLY:

Send a link to your resume and LinkedIn profile. Also tell us:?

1. Which survey platform(s) have you programmed in, and approximately how many surveys have you built?

2. Describe one project where you managed fielding from start to finish - what was the methodology, and what did you personally handle?



Put Survey Fielding Manager in the subject line. Use 5 apply points.

I am Adam Probolsky. I will read your application personally. This position is available immediately.



About Probolsky Research: We are a Latina- and woman-owned market and opinion research firm working for corporate, election, government, and nonprofit clients.

title: Social Media Manager + Growth Strategist
description:
We’re looking for a Social Media Manager that is results driven and can fully own our organic social presence end-to-end—from content planning to editing to posting to performance. You’ll take our raw footage and turn it into high-performing content for Instagram Reels, TikTok, and YouTube Shorts, while managing the full publishing workflow and voice. This is not just an editing role. We need someone who can run the organic social machine—plan, edit, write, publish, and improve performance weekly and most importantly delivery RESULTS!



What You’ll Do

1) Short-Form Editing & Repurposing (Core)

- Repurpose multiple raw video files into multiple short clips/variations optimized for Reels, TikTok, and Shorts

- Identify the best 
nts: angles, reactions, micro-
nts, emotional hooks, and product highlights

- Craft strong openings (first 1–2 seconds) that capture attention immediately

- Add high-converting on-screen text (captions/typography) that supports a luxury, premium look

- Deliver edits that are polished, on-brand, and platform-optimized (safe zones, formatting, pacing, clarity)

- Color-correct and enhance footage with clean, intentional grading

- Produce several variations so we can test hooks, text, and pacing across platforms



2) Social Media Management (End-to-End Ownership)

- Own our organic social execution: content planning ? creation/editing ? posting ? reporting

- Build and manage a simple weekly content calendar (Reels/TikTok/Shorts + supporting stories/posts as needed)

- Write premium, on-brand captions/copy (including hooks, CTAs, and event/product messaging)

- Handle posting/publishing across platforms with correct formatting, titles, hashtags/keywords (as appropriate), and timing

- Manage basic community engagement: replying to comments/DMs with brand voice guidelines (as assigned)

- Track performance weekly (views, retention, saves, shares, profile actions, clicks) and report what’s working

- Make iteration decisions based on performance: double down on winners, improve hooks, adjust pacing and messaging



Creative & Performance Mindset

- Maintain a natural, authentic feel (UGC energy is welcome) while still keeping everything clean and premium

- Trends are welcome only if applied in a sophisticated, intentional way (not loud or chaotic)

- Content should drive engagement and action (event ticket sales, product interest, brand trust) while reinforcing exclusivity and quality

- Communicate progress clearly and deliver within agreed timelines



Style & Brand Expectations (Very Important)

- Overall Style: Elevated luxury aesthetic — clean, polished editing

- No flashy effects, gimmicky transitions, overdone presets, or anything that cheapens the premium feel

- Tone & Feel: Minimal, high-end, cinematic foundation with UGC elements

- Goals: Virality + conversions



Requirements

- Proven experience managing and growing social accounts and editing short-form content (Reels/TikTok/Shorts)

- Strong video editing skills: pacing, storytelling, custom color grading, sound, and premium typography

- Strong understanding of hooks (especially the first 2 seconds) and retention

- Strong copywriting for social (hooks, captions, CTAs, event/product positioning)

- Reliable turnaround times + clear communication

- Familiarity with luxury/fashion & event brands and premium storytelling



Bonus (not required)

- Ability to produce AI-generated video when requested (specific concepts/campaigns we assign)

- Experience with AI video tools/models (e.g., Higgsfield, Gemini, Kling, etc.) with control over style and consistency

- Ability to integrate AI-generated clips into a polished edit

- Access to a personal creative studio or professional filming setup, with the ability to capture occasional high-quality footage to complement our existing assets.



What Success Looks Like

- Premium consistency: Every post looks and feels elevated, cinematic, and on-brand—no “cheap” edits.

- High-performing short-form machine: Raw footage becomes multiple polished clips with tested variations.

- Stronger attention + retention: Openings consistently grab attention in the first 1–2 seconds and keep viewers watching.

- Clear brand voice: Captions and on-screen text feel luxury, intentional, and aligned with our faith-based message.

- System + ownership: You run the weekly workflow (planning ? editing ? writing ? posting ? reporting) with minimal oversight.

- Growth that matters: Engagement rises (saves/shares), community strengthens, and content drives action (event tickets + product demand).



To Apply Please Share:

Your best short-form portfolio (Reels/TikTok/Shorts)

1–2 examples where you managed posting + copywriting (not just editing)

A brief note on your workflow: how you plan, batch edit, publish, and report performance

 • Long-term stable work for the right person

To Apply:

 1. Send your portfolio or 2–3 video samples

 3. Tell me your availability and working hours



Check out my content on 



Applications without a portfolio will not be considered.



— Dennis Leung

title: Video Editor for Fast Growing E-Commerce Company - Ready to start TODAY!
description:
We’re looking for a Video Editor who understands performance — not just aesthetics. Must have E-Commerce experience.



Someone who can turn raw footage, UGC, testimonials, and scripts into scroll-stopping ads that retain attention, tell a story, and convert.



About Us:

We’re a fast-growing DTC skincare brand focused on emotional storytelling, relatable content, and data-backed ad testing. Our videos don’t just “look nice” — they solve real skin problems, build trust, and drive sales.



What You’ll Do:

• Edit high-converting video ads for Meta, TikTok, Amazon, and landing pages

• Take raw UGC, product shots, testimonials, reviews, before/after clips — and turn them into persuasive ads

• Add hooks, subtitles, overlays, proof points, and call-to-actions based on provided scripts/briefs

• Use feedback and performance metrics (CTR, watch time, ROAS) to improve and refine ad versions

• Create multiple variations from the same footage to test different hooks, angles, pacing, and formats



You’d Be a Great Fit If You:

• Think in terms of retention, clarity, storytelling, and conversion — not just visuals

• Have experience editing for DTC brands (beauty, skincare, supplements, self-care is a plus)

• Understand how to build videos around: hook ? story/problem ? solution ? proof ? CTA

• Are comfortable editing content filmed by real people (UGC, phone footage, testimonials)

• Know platform formats and editing styles for TikTok, Reels, ads, and Amazon video placements



Bonus Points If You:

• Have edited ads that performed well (high ROAS, high retention, viral, or successfully scaled)

• Can organize and tag footage, build structured timelines, and create modular editable templates

• Have basic knowledge of direct-response psychology or what makes people click, trust, and buy

• Can repurpose long clips into short ads and short clips into engaging compilations



To Apply, please send:

• A few examples of video ads you’ve edited (preferably performance-focused, not cinematic reels)

• A short note on how you approach editing for conversion vs aesthetics

• Your typical availability (hourly, monthly, or project-based)

title: Senior AU Tax Accountant
description:
About the Role

 

We are seeking an experienced tax accountant with a strong background in Australian taxation and proficiency in Xero & BGLSF360. The ideal candidate will have at least four years of experience in Australian tax and accounting and will be responsible for preparing financial statements and tax returns for various entity types, including companies, trusts, partnerships, and individuals.

 

Key Responsibilities

 

• Prepare financial statements and tax returns for companies, trusts, partnerships, individuals and SMSFs.

• Ensure compliance with Australian tax laws, including income tax, GST, and BAS reporting.

• Reconcile accounts and manage general ledger entries.

• Work with Xero & BGLSF360 to process transactions, maintain records, and generate reports.

• Assist in tax planning strategies and provide general tax advice as required.

• Communicate with the team to ensure deadlines and client expectations are met.

• Looking at implementing and providing Advisory information to the Director

• Assist the Director with initial reviews of financial statements, tax returns, and supporting workpapers.

• Identify basic errors, inconsistencies, and missing information prior to final review.

• Support the team by helping improve accuracy and completeness of work before submission to the Director.

 

Key Requirements

 

• Minimum 4 years of experience in Australian tax and accounting.

• Strong English literacy and speaking skills

• Proficiency in Xero & BGLSF360 (negotiable) and cloud-based accounting software.

• Strong knowledge of Australian taxation, including company tax, trust distributions, BAS, IAS, and GST.

• Experience preparing tax returns and financial statements for various entity structures.

• Ability to work independently, meet deadlines, and manage workloads efficiently.

• Strong attention to detail and problem-solving skills.

• Excellent English communication skills, both written and verbal.

 

 

What We Offer

 

• Competitive salary based on experience.

• Flexible remote working environment.

• Opportunity to work with a growing Australian accounting firm.

• Ongoing training and development to enhance your skills.

• Long-term career growth potential.

 

If you meet the qualifications and are looking for a long-term opportunity in an Australian accounting firm, we’d love to hear from you!
